product.categoryIds : [];\n        cats.forEach(catId => {\n            counts[catId] = (counts[catId] || 0) + 1;\n        });\n    });\n    return counts;\n  }, [allProducts]);\n\n  // Helper to find category name map\n  const categoryNameMap = useMemo(() => {\n      const map = new Map<string, string>();\n      const traverse = (cats: Category[]) => {\n          cats.forEach(c => {\n              map.set(c.id, language === 'en' && c.nameEn ? c.nameEn : c.name);\n              if (c.children) traverse(c.children);\n          });\n      };\n      traverse(CATEGORY_TREE);\n      return map;\n  }, [language]);\n\n  const resolvePropKey = useCallback((label: string): string | null => {\n      const cleanLabel = label.toLowerCase();\n      const directMatch = columns.find(c => c.key.toLowerCase() === cleanLabel || tProp(c.label).toLowerCase() === cleanLabel);\n      if (directMatch) return directMatch.key;\n      const reverseKey = Object.keys(propertyMap).find(k => k.toLowerCase() === cleanLabel || propertyMap[k].toLowerCase() === cleanLabel);\n      if (reverseKey) return reverseKey;\n      return null;\n  }, [columns, tProp]);\n\n  const filteredData = useMemo(() => {\n    const syntaxRegex = /([\\u4e00-\\u9fa5\\w]+):([<>]=?|[-.0-9a-zA-Z]+)/g;\n    const syntaxFilters: { key: string, operator: string, value: string | number, max?: number }[] = [];\n    let processedQuery = searchQuery;\n    let match;\n    while ((match = syntaxRegex.exec(searchQuery)) !== null) {\n        const [full, label, condition] = match;\n        const key = resolvePropKey(label);\n        if (key) {\n            processedQuery = processedQuery.replace(full, '');\n            if (condition.includes('-') && !condition.startsWith('-')) {\n                const parts = condition.split('-');\n                syntaxFilters.push({ key, operator: 'range', value: parseFloat(parts[0]), max: parseFloat(parts[1]) });\n            } else if (condition.match(/^[<>]=?/)) {\n                const op = condition.match(/^[<>]=?/)?.[0] || '';\n                const val = parseFloat(condition.replace(op, ''));\n                syntaxFilters.push({ key, operator: op, value: val });\n            } else {\n                const numVal = parseFloat(condition);\n                syntaxFilters.push({ key, operator: '=', value: isNaN(numVal) ? condition : numVal });\n            }\n        }\n    }\n    const textKeywords = processedQuery.toLowerCase().split(' ').filter(k => k.trim());\n    return allProducts.filter(product => {\n      // Logic Update: Multi-select filtering with robust handling for empty/null categoryIds\n      if (selectedCategoryIds.size > 0) {\n          const pCats = Array.isArray(product.categoryIds) ? product.categoryIds : [];\n          const hasMatch = pCats.some(id => selectedCategoryIds.has(id));\n          if (!hasMatch) return false;\n      }\n\n      const matchesText = textKeywords.every(query => product.gradeName.toLowerCase().includes(query) || product.manufacturer.toLowerCase().includes(query) || Object.keys(product.properties).some(k => k.toLowerCase().includes(query)));\n      if (!matchesText) return false;\n      const matchesSyntax = syntaxFilters.every(f => {\n          const propVal = product.properties[f.key]?.value;\n          const val = typeof propVal === 'number' ? propVal : parseFloat(String(propVal));\n          if (isNaN(val) || typeof f.value === 'string') return String(propVal).toLowerCase().includes(String(f.value).toLowerCase());\n          switch(f.operator) {\n              case '>': return val > (f.value as number);\n              case '<': return val < (f.value as number);\n              case '>=': return val >= (f.value as number);\n              case '<=': return val <= (f.value as number);\n              case 'range': return val >= (f.value as number) && val <= (f.max || Infinity);\n              case '=': return val === (f.value as number);\n              default: return true;\n          }\n      });\n      if (!matchesSyntax) return false;\n      return Object.entries(numericFilters).every(([key, range]) => {\n          const propVal = product.properties[key]?.value;\n          const num = typeof propVal === 'number' ? propVal : parseFloat(String(propVal));\n          if (isNaN(num)) return true;\n          const min = range.min === '' ? -Infinity : parseFloat(range.min);\n          const max = range.max === '' ? Infinity : parseFloat(range.max);\n          return num >= min && num <= max;\n      });\n    });\n  }, [allProducts, selectedCategoryIds, searchQuery, numericFilters, resolvePropKey]);\n\n  const handleLogin = (user: User) => { setCurrentUser(user); localStorage.setItem('resindb-session', JSON.stringify(user)); };\n  const handleLogout = () => { setCurrentUser(null); localStorage.removeItem('resindb-session'); };\n  const handleToggleColumn = (key: string) => { setColumns(cols => cols.map(c => c.key === key ? { ...c, visible: !c.visible } : c)); };\n  const handleToggleAllColumns = (visible: boolean) => { setColumns(cols => cols.map(c => c.isSystem ? c : { ...c, visible })); };\n\n  const handleExport = async () => { setIsExporting(true); await new Promise(r => setTimeout(r, 800)); addToast('success', '分析报告已生成'); setIsExporting(false); };\n  const handleDelete = (ids: string[]) => { setAllProducts(prev => prev.filter(p => !ids.includes(p.id))); setSelectedIds(new Set()); addToast('success', `已同步删除 ${ids.length} 条记录`); };\n  \n  const handleImportData = (newProducts: Product[]) => { \n      setAllProducts(prev => [...newProducts, ...prev]); \n      setIsImportOpen(false); \n      addToast('success', `${newProducts.length} 条数据入库成功`); \n  };\n\n  const handleUpdateUserProfile = (updatedData: any) => {\n    if (!currentUser) return;\n    const newUser = { ...currentUser, ...updatedData };\n    setCurrentUser(newUser);\n    localStorage.setItem('resindb-session', JSON.stringify(newUser));\n    addToast('success', t('updateSuccess'));\n     else addToast('info', `库中未找到牌号: ${gradeName}`);\n  };\n\n  const toggleCategory = (id: string) => {\n      setSelectedCategoryIds(prev => {\n          const next = new Set(prev);\n          if product.categoryIds : [];\n        cats.forEach(catId => {\n            counts[catId] = (counts[catId] || 0) + 1;\n        });\n    });\n    return counts;\n  }, [allProducts]);\n\n  // Helper to find category name map\n  const categoryNameMap = useMemo(() => {\n      const map = new Map<string, string>();\n      const traverse = (cats: Category[]) => {\n          cats.forEach(c => {\n              map.set(c.id, language === 'en' && c.nameEn ? c.nameEn : c.name);\n              if (c.children) traverse(c.children);\n          });\n      };\n      traverse(CATEGORY_TREE);\n      return map;\n  }, [language]);\n\n  const resolvePropKey = useCallback((label: string): string | null => {\n      const cleanLabel = label.toLowerCase();\n      const directMatch = columns.find(c => c.key.toLowerCase() === cleanLabel || tProp(c.label).toLowerCase() === cleanLabel);\n      if (directMatch) return directMatch.key;\n      const reverseKey = Object.keys(propertyMap).find(k => k.toLowerCase() === cleanLabel || propertyMap[k].toLowerCase() === cleanLabel);\n      if (reverseKey) return reverseKey;\n      return null;\n  }, [columns, tProp]);\n\n  const filteredData = useMemo(() => {\n    const syntaxRegex = /([\\u4e00-\\u9fa5\\w]+):([<>]=?|[-.0-9a-zA-Z]+)/g;\n    const syntaxFilters: { key: string, operator: string, value: string | number, max?: number }[] = [];\n    let processedQuery = searchQuery;\n    let match;\n    while ((match = syntaxRegex.exec(searchQuery)) !== null) {\n        const [full, label, condition] = match;\n        const key = resolvePropKey(label);\n        if (key) {\n            processedQuery = processedQuery.replace(full, '');\n            if (condition.includes('-') && !condition.startsWith('-')) {\n                const parts = condition.split('-');\n                syntaxFilters.push({ key, operator: 'range', value: parseFloat(parts[0]), max: parseFloat(parts[1]) });\n            } else if (condition.match(/^[<>]=?/)) {\n                const op = condition.match(/^[<>]=?/)?.[0] || '';\n                const val = parseFloat(condition.replace(op, ''));\n                syntaxFilters.push({ key, operator: op, value: val });\n            } else {\n                const numVal = parseFloat(condition);\n                syntaxFilters.push({ key, operator: '=', value: isNaN(numVal) ? condition : numVal });\n            }\n        }\n    }\n    const textKeywords = processedQuery.toLowerCase().split(' ').filter(k => k.trim());\n    return allProducts.filter(product => {\n      // Logic Update: Multi-select filtering with robust handling for empty/null categoryIds\n      if (selectedCategoryIds.size > 0) {\n          const pCats = Array.isArray(product.categoryIds) ? product.categoryIds : [];\n          const hasMatch = pCats.some(id => selectedCategoryIds.has(id));\n          if (!hasMatch) return false;\n      }\n\n      const matchesText = textKeywords.every(query => product.gradeName.toLowerCase().includes(query) || product.manufacturer.toLowerCase().includes(query) || Object.keys(product.properties).some(k => k.toLowerCase().includes(query)));\n      if (!matchesText) return false;\n      const matchesSyntax = syntaxFilters.every(f => {\n          const propVal = product.properties[f.key]?.value;\n          const val = typeof propVal === 'number' ? propVal : parseFloat(String(propVal));\n          if (isNaN(val) || typeof f.value === 'string') return String(propVal).toLowerCase().includes(String(f.value).toLowerCase());\n          switch(f.operator) {\n              case '>': return val > (f.value as number);\n              case '<': return val < (f.value as number);\n              case '>=': return val >= (f.value as number);\n              case '<=': return val <= (f.value as number);\n              case 'range': return val >= (f.value as number) && val <= (f.max || Infinity);\n              case '=': return val === (f.value as number);\n              default: return true;\n          }\n      });\n      if (!matchesSyntax) return false;\n      return Object.entries(numericFilters).every(([key, range]) => {\n          const propVal = product.properties[key]?.value;\n          const num = typeof propVal === 'number' ? propVal : parseFloat(String(propVal));\n          if (isNaN(num)) return true;\n          const min = range.min === '' ? -Infinity : parseFloat(range.min);\n          const max = range.max === '' ? Infinity : parseFloat(range.max);\n          return num >= min && num <= max;\n      });\n    });\n  }, [allProducts, selectedCategoryIds, searchQuery, numericFilters, resolvePropKey]);\n\n  const handleToggleAllColumns = (visible: boolean) => { setColumns(cols => cols.map(c => c.isSystem ? c : { ...c, visible })); };\n\n  const handleExport = async () => { setIsExporting(true); await new Promise(r => setTimeout(r, 800)); addToast('success', '分析报告已生成'); setIsExporting(false); };\n  const handleDelete = (ids: string[]) => { setAllProducts(prev => prev.filter(p => !ids.includes(p.id))); \n      setIsImportOpen(false); \n      addToast('success', `${newProducts.length} 条数据入库成功`); \n  };\n\n  const handleUpdateUserProfile = (updatedData: any) => {\n    if (!currentUser) return;\n     else addToast('info', `库中未找到牌号: ${gradeName}`);\n  };\n\n  const toggleCategory = (id: string) => {\n      setSelectedCategoryIds(prev => {\n          const next = new Set(prev);\n          if (next.has(id)) {\n              next.delete(id);\n          } else {\n              next.add(id);\n          }\n          return next;\n      });\n  };\n\n  const selectSingleCategory = (id: string)                            }\n                            return <span key={j}>{part}</span>;\n                        })}\n                    </span>\n                </div>\n             );\n        }\n\n        const parts = line.split(/(\\*\\*.*?\\*\\*)/g);\n        if (line.startsWith('##')) {\n             return <h3 key={i} className=\"font-bold text-emerald-700 dark:text-emerald-400 mt-5 mb-2 text-base border-l-2 border-emerald-500 pl-3\">{line.replace(/#/g, '')}</h3>\n        }\n\n        if (!trimmed) return <div key={i} className=\"h-4\"></div>;\n\n        return (\n          <p key={i} className=\"mb-2 last:mb-0 leading-relaxed text-sm\">\n            {parts.map((part, j) => {\n              if (part.startsWith('**') && part.endsWith('**')) {\n                const grade = part.slice(2, -2);\n                return <strong key={j} onClick={() => onGradeClick?.(grade)} className=\"font-bold text-slate-800 dark:text-white hover:text-primary-600 hover:underline cursor-pointer transition-colors\">{grade}</strong>;\n              }\n              return <span key={j}>{part}</span>;\n            })}\n          </p>\n        );\n      })}\n      \n      <div className=\"flex flex-wrap gap-2 mt-4 pt-4 border-t border-slate-100 dark:border-slate-800\">\n          {(text.includes('Ashby') || text.includes('散点') || text.includes('构效')) && (\n              <ChartSuggestion type=\"Ashby\" onClick={() => onNavigateToChart?.('ashby')} />\n          )}\n          {(text.includes('Radar') || text.includes('雷达') || text.includes('指纹')) && (\n              <ChartSuggestion type=\"Radar\" onClick={() => onNavigateToChart?.('radar')} />\n          )}\n          {(text.includes('GPC') || text.includes('分布')) && (\n              <ChartSuggestion type=\"GPC\" onClick={() => onNavigateToChart?.('gpc')} />\n          )}\n      </div>\n    </div>\n  );\n};\n\nexport const AIAssistant: React.FC<AIAssistantProps> = ({ contextData, inlineView = false, onNavigateToChart, onGradeClick, initialPrompt }) => {\n  const [isOpen, setIsOpen] = useState(false);\n  const [isExpanded, setIsExpanded] = useState(false);\n  const [showSettings, setShowSettings] = useState(false);\n  const [input, setInput] = useState('');\n  const { t } = useLanguage();\n  const [messages, setMessages] = useState<Message[]>([]);\n  const [isLoading, setIsLoading] = useState(false);\n  const [useThinking, setUseThinking] = useState(true); \n  const [attachedImage, setAttachedImage] = useState<string | null>(null);\n  const [isSearchOpen, setIsSearchOpen] = useState(false);\n  const [searchQuery, setSearchQuery] = useState('');\n  \n  // Ref to track processed prompts to avoid loops\n  const lastProcessedPromptRef = useRef<string | undefined>(undefined);\n  \n  // API Configuration State\n  const [apiConfig, setApiConfig] = useState<ApiConfig>(() => {\n      const saved = localStorage.getItem('resindb-api-config');\n      return saved ? JSON.parse(saved) : {\n          provider: 'gemini',\n          baseUrl: 'https://api.openai.com/v1',\n          apiKey: '',\n          model: 'gemini-3-pro-preview'\n      };\n  });\n\n  const messagesEndRef = useRef<HTMLDivElement>(null);\n  const fileInputRef = useRef<HTMLInputElement>(null);\n  const chatContainerRef = useRef<HTMLDivElement>(null);\n\n  const quickPrompts = useMemo(() => {\n      const base = ['预测加工流动性', '检索高冲击牌号', '分析刚韧平衡'];\n      if (contextData.length > 0) {\n          if (contextData.length < 5) return ['对比这几个牌号的差异', '生成这些牌号的物性报告', ...base];\n          return ['分析当前筛选结果的分布规律', '找出其中流动性最好的牌号', ...base];\n      }\n      return base;\n  }, [contextData]);\n\n  useEffect(() => {\n    if (messages.length === 0) {\n        setMessages([{ \n            id: 'welcome', \n            role: 'model', \n            text: t('welcomeMessage') \n        }]);\n    }\n  }, [t]);\n\n  useEffect(() => {\n    messagesEndRef.current?.scrollIntoView({ behavior: 'smooth' });\n  }, [messages, isLoading, isOpen]);\n\n  const saveConfig = (newConfig: ApiConfig) => {\n      setApiConfig(newConfig);\n      localStorage.setItem('resindb-api-config', JSON.stringify(newConfig));\n      setShowSettings(false);\n  };\n\n  const filteredMessages = useMemo(() => {\n    if (!searchQuery.trim()) return messages;\n    return messages.filter(m => m.text.toLowerCase().includes(searchQuery.toLowerCase()));\n  }, [messages, searchQuery]);\n\n  const handleSendMessage = async (customInput?: string) => {\n    const textToSend = customInput || input;\n    if ((!textToSend.trim() && !attachedImage) || isLoading) return;\n\n    const userMsg: Message = {\n      id: Date.now().toString(),\n      role: 'user',\n      text: textToSend,\n      image: attachedImage || undefined\n    };\n\n    setMessages(prev => [...prev, userMsg]);\n    setInput('');\n    setAttachedImage(null);\n    setIsLoading(true);\n    if(searchQuery) {\n        setSearchQuery('');\n        setIsSearchOpen(false);\n    }\n\n    // Prepare Context string\n    let contextStr = \"\";\n    if (contextData.length > 0) {\n        contextStr = JSON.stringify(contextData.slice(0, 20).map(p => ({\n            grade: p.gradeName,\n            manufacturer: p.manufacturer,\n            mfr: p.properties['熔体质量流动速率']?.value,\n            density: p.properties['密度']?.value,\n            flex: p.properties['弯曲模量']?.value,\n            impact: p.properties['悬臂梁缺口冲击强度']?.value,\n            app: p.properties['典型应用']?.value\n        })));\n    }\n\n    const systemPromptText = \"You are ResinAI. A senior materials scientist at PetroChina Research Institute. Analyze data specifically. Wrap grade names in **double asterisks** like **HDPE 5000S**. Suggest using specific charts if appropriate (Ashby, Radar, GPC).\" + \n        (userMsg.image ? \"\\nFocus on image-based QC analysis.\" : \"\") + \n        (contextStr ? `\\n[Experimental Context]: ${contextStr}` : \"\");\n\n    try {\n      let responseText = \"\";\n\n      if (apiConfig.provider === 'gemini') {\n          // --- Google Gemini Logic ---\n          const ai = new GoogleGenAI({ apiKey: process.env.API_KEY });\n          const parts: any[] = [];\n          \n          if (userMsg.image) {\n             const base64Data = userMsg.image.split(',')[1];\n             const mimeType = userMsg.image.split(';')[0].split(':')[1] || 'image/jpeg';\n             parts.push({ inlineData: { mimeType, data: base64Data } });\n          }\n          parts.push({ text: userMsg.text });\n          if (contextStr) parts.push({ text: `\\nData: ${contextStr}` });\n\n          const response = await ai.models.generateContent({\n            model: 'gemini-3-pro-preview',\n            contents: [{ role: 'user', parts: parts }],\n            config: {\n                systemInstruction: systemPromptText,\n                thinkingConfig: useThinking ? { thinkingBudget: 2048 } : undefined,\n            }\n          });\n          responseText = response.text || \"Analysis result empty.\";\n\n      } else {\n          // --- OpenAI Compatible Logic ---\n          if (!apiConfig.apiKey) throw new Error(\"API Key Missing\");\n          \n          const openaiMessages: any[] = [\n              { role: \"system\", content: systemPromptText }\n          ];\n\n          let contentPayload: any = userMsg.text;\n          \n          if (userMsg.image) {\n              contentPayload = [\n                  { type: \"text\", text: userMsg.text },\n                  { type: \"image_url\", image_url: { url: userMsg.image } }\n              ];\n          }\n          \n          openaiMessages.push({ role: \"user\", content: contentPayload });\n\n          const response = await fetch(`${apiConfig.baseUrl}/chat/completions`, {\n              method: 'POST',\n              headers: {\n                  'Content-Type': 'application/json',\n                  'Authorization': `Bearer ${apiConfig.apiKey}`\n              },\n              body: JSON.stringify({\n                  model: apiConfig.model || 'deepseek-chat', \n                  messages: openaiMessages,\n                  temperature: 0.7,\n                  max_tokens: 2048\n              })\n          });\n\n          if (!response.ok) {\n              const err = await response.text();\n              throw new Error(`API ${response.status}: ${err}`);\n          }\n\n          const data = await response.json();\n          responseText = data.choices?.[0]?.message?.content || \"No response content.\";\n      }\n\n      setMessages(prev => [...prev, {\n        id: Date.now().toString(),\n        role: 'model',\n        text: responseText\n      }]);\n\n    } catch (error: any) {\n      console.error(\"AI Error:\", error);\n      \n      let friendlyMsg = \"I'm having trouble processing that request.\";\n      let errorType: Message['errorType'] = 'generic';\n\n      if (error.message.includes('API Key') || error.message.includes('401') || error.message.includes('403')) {\n          friendlyMsg = \"It looks like my access credentials (API Key) are missing or invalid. Please check the settings.\";\n          errorType = 'auth';\n      } else if (error.message.includes('fetch') || error.message.includes('Network') || error.message.includes('503')) {\n          friendlyMsg = \"I can't reach the data center right now. Please check your internet connection.\";\n          errorType = 'network';\n      }\n\n      setMessages(prev => [...prev, {\n        id: Date.now().toString(),\n        role: 'system',\n        text: friendlyMsg,\n        errorType: errorType\n      }]);\n    } finally {\n      setIsLoading(false);\n    }\n  };\n\n  useEffect(() => {\n      // Trigger if new prompt is provided and different from last processed one\n      if (initialPrompt && initialPrompt !== lastProcessedPromptRef.current && !isLoading) {\n          handleSendMessage(initialPrompt);\n          lastProcessedPromptRef.current = initialPrompt;\n      }\n  }, [initialPrompt]);\n\n  const renderInput = () => (\n    <div className=\"flex items-end gap-2 bg-slate-100 dark:bg-slate-800/50 p-2 rounded-[2rem] border border-slate-200 dark:border-slate-700 focus-within:ring-4 focus-within:ring-primary-500/10 focus-within:border-primary-500 transition-all shadow-inner relative\">\n        <input type=\"file\" ref={fileInputRef} accept=\"image/*\" className=\"hidden\" onChange={(e) => {\n            const f = e.target.files?.[0];\n            if(f){ const r = new FileReader(); r.onloadend = () => setAttachedImage(r.result as string); r.readAsDataURL(f); }\n        }} />\n        <button \n            onClick={() => fileInputRef.current?.click()} \n            className={`p-3 rounded-2xl transition-all shrink-0 ${attachedImage ? 'text-emerald-600 bg-emerald-100 dark:bg-emerald-900/30' : 'text-slate-400 hover:text-primary-600 hover:bg-white dark:hover:bg-slate-800'}`}\n        >\n            <ImageIcon size={22} />\n        </button>\n        <textarea\n            value={input} onChange={(e) => setInput(e.target.value)}\n            onKeyDown={(e) => { if(e.key === 'Enter' && !e.shiftKey) { e.preventDefault(); handleSendMessage(); }}}\n            placeholder={t('aiPlaceholder')}\n            className=\"w-full max-h-48 min-h-[44px] py-3 bg-transparent text-sm text-slate-800 dark:text-slate-200 outline-none resize-none leading-relaxed\"\n            rows={1}\n        />\n        <div className=\"flex items-center gap-2 self-center pr-1\">\n            <button \n                onClick={() => setUseThinking(!useThinking)}\n                className={`p-3 rounded-2xl transition-all ${useThinking ? 'text-indigo-600 bg-indigo-100 dark:bg-indigo-900/30' : 'text-slate-400 hover:text-primary-600'}`}\n                title=\"深度逻辑引擎 (Thinking)\"\n            >\n                <BrainCircuit size={22} />\n            </button>\n            <button \n                onClick={() => handleSendMessage()} \n                disabled={isLoading || (!input.trim() && !attachedImage)} \n                className=\"p-3 bg-slate-900 dark:bg-primary-600 hover:bg-primary-700 disabled:opacity-20 text-white rounded-2xl shadow-xl transition-all active:scale-95 flex items-center justify-center shrink-0\"\n            >\n                {isLoading ? <Loader2 size={22} className=\"animate-spin\" /> : <Send size={22} />}\n            </button>\n        </div>\n    </div>\n  );\n\n  const SuggestedPrompts = () => (\n      <div className=\"flex gap-2 mb-3 overflow-x-auto no-scrollbar pb-1 px-1\">\n          <div className=\"flex items-center gap-1 text-[10px] font-black text-slate-300 dark:text-slate-600 uppercase tracking-wider shrink-0 mr-2 select-none\">\n              <Lightbulb size={12} /> Suggestions\n          </div>\n          {quickPrompts.map((q, i) => (\n              <button \n                key={i} \n                onClick={() => handleSendMessage(q)} \n                className=\"whitespace-nowrap px-3 py-1.5 bg-white dark:bg-slate-800/80 border border-slate-200 dark:border-slate-700 rounded-xl text-[10px] font-bold text-slate-500 hover:text-primary-600 hover:border-primary-300 dark:hover:border-primary-700 transition-all shadow-sm active:scale-95\"\n              >\n                  {q}\n              </button>\n          ))}\n      </div>\n  );\n\n  const SearchBar = () => (\n    <div className=\"px-4 py-2 bg-white/80 dark:bg-slate-900/80 backdrop-blur-md border-b border-slate-100 dark:border-slate-800 animate-in slide-in-from-top-2 z-10 sticky top-0\">\n        <div className=\"relative\">\n            <Search className=\"absolute left-3 top-2.5 text-slate-400\" size={14} />\n            <input \n                autoFocus type=\"text\" value={searchQuery} onChange={(e) => setSearchQuery(e.target.value)}\n                placeholder=\"Search history...\"\n                className=\"w-full pl-9 pr-8 py-2 bg-slate-100 dark:bg-slate-800 border-none rounded-xl text-xs font-medium outline-none focus:ring-2 focus:ring-primary-500/20 text-slate-700 dark:text-slate-200\"\n            />\n            {searchQuery && (\n                <button onClick={() => setSearchQuery('')} className=\"absolute right-2.5 top-2.5 text-slate-400 hover:text-slate-600 dark:hover:text-slate-200\">\n                    <X size={14} />\n                </button>\n            )}\n        </div>\n        {searchQuery && (\n            <div className=\"mt-1 px-1 text-[10px] text-slate-400\">Found {filteredMessages.length} results</div>\n        )}\n    </div>\n  );\n\n  const SettingsPanel = () => (\n      <div className=\"absolute inset-0 bg-white/95 dark:bg-slate-900/95 backdrop-blur-xl z-[60] p-6 flex flex-col animate-in fade-in zoom-in-95 duration-200\">\n          <div className=\"flex items-center justify-between mb-6\">\n              <h3 className=\"text-lg font-black text-slate-800 dark:text-white flex items-center gap-2\">\n                  <Settings2 size={20} className=\"text-primary-500\" />\n                  AI 模型配置\n              </h3>\n              <button onClick={() => setShowSettings(false)} className=\"p-2 hover:bg-slate-100 dark:hover:bg-slate-800 rounded-xl\"><X size={20} /></button>\n          </div>\n          <div className=\"space-y-5 flex-1 overflow-y-auto custom-scrollbar p-1\">\n              <div className=\"space-y-2\">\n                  <label className=\"text-xs font-bold text-slate-500 uppercase tracking-widest\">API 提供商</label>\n                  <div className=\"grid grid-cols-2 gap-3\">\n                      <button onClick={() => setApiConfig(prev => ({...prev, provider: 'gemini'}))} className={`p-4 rounded-2xl border-2 text-left transition-all ${apiConfig.provider === 'gemini' ? 'border-primary-500 bg-primary-50 dark:bg-primary-900/20 text-primary-700 dark:text-primary-300' : 'border-slate-200 dark:border-slate-800 hover:border-primary-200'}`}>\n                          <div className=\"font-bold text-sm mb-1\">Google Gemini</div>\n                          <div className=\"text-[10px] opacity-70\">Google GenAI SDK (Internal)</div>\n                      </button>\n                      <button onClick={() => setApiConfig(prev => ({...prev, provider: 'openai_compatible'}))} className={`p-4 rounded-2xl border-2 text-left transition-all ${apiConfig.provider === 'openai_compatible' ? 'border-primary-500 bg-primary-50 dark:bg-primary-900/20 text-primary-700 dark:text-primary-300' : 'border-slate-200 dark:border-slate-800 hover:border-primary-200'}`}>\n                          <div className=\"font-bold text-sm mb-1\">OpenAI 兼容 / 国产</div>\n                          <div className=\"text-[10px] opacity-70\">DeepSeek, Moonshot, GLM...</div>\n                      </button>\n                  </div>\n              </div>\n              {apiConfig.provider === 'openai_compatible' && (\n                  <>\n                    <div className=\"space-y-2\">\n                        <label className=\"text-xs font-bold text-slate-500 uppercase tracking-widest\">Base URL</label>\n                        <input type=\"text\" value={apiConfig.baseUrl} onChange={(e) => setApiConfig({...apiConfig, baseUrl: e.target.value})} placeholder=\"https://api.deepseek.com\" className=\"w-full px-4 py-3 bg-slate-50 dark:bg-slate-800 border border-slate-200 dark:border-slate-700 rounded-xl text-sm outline-none focus:border-primary-500 font-mono\"/>\n                    </div>\n                    <div className=\"space-y-2\">\n                        <label className=\"text-xs font-bold text-slate-500 uppercase tracking-widest\">API Key</label>\n                        <input type=\"password\" value={apiConfig.apiKey} onChange={(e) => setApiConfig({...apiConfig, apiKey: e.target.value})} placeholder=\"sk-...\" className=\"w-full px-4 py-3 bg-slate-50 dark:bg-slate-800 border border-slate-200 dark:border-slate-700 rounded-xl text-sm outline-none focus:border-primary-500 font-mono\"/>\n                    </div>\n                    <div className=\"space-y-2\">\n                        <label className=\"text-xs font-bold text-slate-500 uppercase tracking-widest\">Model Name</label>\n                        <input type=\"text\" value={apiConfig.model} onChange={(e) => setApiConfig({...apiConfig, model: e.target.value})} placeholder=\"e.g. deepseek-chat\" className=\"w-full px-4 py-3 bg-slate-50 dark:bg-slate-800 border border-slate-200 dark:border-slate-700 rounded-xl text-sm outline-none focus:border-primary-500 font-mono\"/>\n                    </div>\n                  </>\n              )}\n          </div>\n          <button onClick={() => saveConfig(apiConfig)} className=\"w-full py-3 bg-slate-900 dark:bg-white text-white dark:text-slate-900 rounded-xl font-bold flex items-center justify-center gap-2 mt-4 hover:opacity-90 transition-opacity\"><Save size={16} /> 保存配置</button>\n      </div>\n  );\n\n  if (inlineView) {\n      return (\n          <div className=\"flex flex-col h-full w-full bg-slate-50/30 dark:bg-transparent relative\">\n              {showSettings && <SettingsPanel />}\n              <div className=\"absolute top-4 right-4 z-20 flex gap-2\">\n                  <button onClick={() => setIsSearchOpen(!isSearchOpen)} className={`p-2 backdrop-blur-sm rounded-xl border border-slate-200 dark:border-slate-700 transition-colors shadow-sm ${isSearchOpen ? 'bg-primary-50 border-primary-200 text-primary-600' : 'bg-white/80 dark:bg-slate-800/80 text-slate-500 hover:text-primary-600'}`}>\n                      <Search size={18} />\n                  </button>\n                  <button onClick={() => setShowSettings(true)} className=\"p-2 bg-white/80 dark:bg-slate-800/80 backdrop-blur-sm rounded-xl border border-slate-200 dark:border-slate-700 text-slate-500 hover:text-primary-600 transition-colors shadow-sm\">\n                      <Settings2 size={18} />\n                  </button>\n              </div>\n\n              {isSearchOpen && <SearchBar />}\n\n              <div className=\"flex-1 overflow-y-auto p-6 space-y-10 custom-scrollbar\" ref={chatContainerRef}>\n                <div className=\"max-w-4xl mx-auto space-y-8\">\n                  {filteredMessages.map(m => (\n                      <div key={m.id} className={`flex ${m.role === 'user' ? 'justify-end' : 'justify-start'} animate-in fade-in slide-in-from-bottom-2`}>\n                         <div className={`flex gap-4 max-w-[90%] ${m.role === 'user' ? 'flex-row-reverse' : 'flex-row'}`}>\n                            {/* Avatar */}\n                            <div className={`w-10 h-10 rounded-2xl flex items-center justify-center shrink-0 shadow-sm ${\n                                m.role === 'user' ? 'bg-white dark:bg-slate-800 border' : \n                                m.role === 'system' ? 'bg-rose-100 dark:bg-rose-900/30 text-rose-600 border border-rose-200 dark:border-rose-800' :\n                                'bg-primary-600 text-white shadow-primary-500/20 shadow-lg'\n                            }`}>\n                                {m.role === 'user' ? <User size={18} className=\"text-slate-400\" /> : \n                                 m.role === 'system' ? <AlertTriangle size={18} /> : \n                                 <Bot size={18} />}\n                            </div>\n                            \n                            {/* Message Bubble */}\n                            <div className={`rounded-[2rem] px-6 py-4 shadow-glass ${\n                                m.role === 'user' ? 'bg-slate-900 text-white rounded-tr-sm' : \n                                m.role === 'system' ? 'bg-rose-50 dark:bg-rose-950/20 border border-rose-100 dark:border-rose-900/30 text-rose-700 dark:text-rose-300 rounded-tl-sm' :\n                                'bg-white dark:bg-slate-850 border border-slate-100 dark:border-slate-800 rounded-tl-sm text-slate-700 dark:text-slate-200'\n                            }`}>\n                                {m.image && <img src={m.image} className=\"max-w-full h-auto max-h-96 rounded-2xl mb-4 shadow-2xl border border-white/50\" />}\n                                \n                                {m.role === 'system' && (\n                                    <div className=\"flex items-center gap-2 mb-2 pb-2 border-b border-rose-200 dark:border-rose-800/30\">\n                                        {m.errorType === 'network' ? <WifiOff size={14} /> : m.errorType === 'auth' ? <Key size={14} /> : <AlertTriangle size={14} />}\n                                        <span className=\"text-xs font-bold uppercase tracking-wider\">System Alert</span>\n                                    </div>\n                                )}\n                                \n                                <FormattedText text={m.text} onNavigateToChart={onNavigateToChart} onGradeClick={onGradeClick} />\n                                \n                                {m.errorType === 'auth' && (\n                                    <button onClick={() => setShowSettings(true)} className=\"mt-3 text-xs font-bold text-rose-600 underline hover:text-rose-700\">Open Settings</button>\n                                )}\n                            </div>\n                         </div>\n                      </div>\n                  ))}\n                  {isLoading && (\n                      <div className=\"flex justify-start\">\n                          <div className=\"flex gap-4\">\n                            <div className=\"w-10 h-10 bg-primary-100 dark:bg-primary-900/30 rounded-2xl flex items-center justify-center animate-pulse\"><Sparkles size={18} className=\"text-primary-600\" /></div>\n                            <div className=\"flex items-center gap-3 bg-white dark:bg-slate-850 border px-6 py-4 rounded-[2rem] shadow-sm\">\n                                <div className=\"flex gap-1\">\n                                    <span className=\"w-1.5 h-1.5 bg-primary-500 rounded-full animate-bounce [animation-delay:-0.3s]\"></span>\n                                    <span className=\"w-1.5 h-1.5 bg-primary-500 rounded-full animate-bounce [animation-delay:-0.15s]\"></span>\n                                    <span className=\"w-1.5 h-1.5 bg-primary-500 rounded-full animate-bounce\"></span>\n                                </div>\n                                <span className=\"text-xs font-black text-primary-600 uppercase tracking-widest\">\n                                    {apiConfig.provider === 'gemini' ? 'Gemini Thinking...' : `${apiConfig.model} Generating...`}\n                                </span>\n                            </div>\n                          </div>\n                      </div>\n                  )}\n                </div>\n                <div ref={messagesEndRef} className=\"h-4\" />\n              </div>\n              <div className=\"p-8 bg-white/50 dark:bg-slate-900/50 backdrop-blur-xl border-t border-slate-100 dark:border-slate-800 shadow-float\">\n                  <div className=\"max-w-4xl mx-auto\">\n                    <SuggestedPrompts />\n                    {renderInput()}\n                  </div>\n              </div>\n          </div>\n      );\n  }\n\n  // ... (Small Popup View - mostly reused logic but updated Message handling)\n  return (\n    <>\n      <button\n        onClick={() => setIsOpen(true)}\n        className={`fixed bottom-8 right-8 z-40 w-16 h-16 bg-primary-600 rounded-full shadow-2xl flex items-center justify-center text-white hover:scale-110 active:scale-95 transition-all ${isOpen ? 'scale-0' : 'scale-100'}`}\n      >\n        <Sparkles size={28} />\n      </button>\n\n      <div \n        className={`fixed bottom-8 right-8 z-50 bg-white dark:bg-slate-900 rounded-[2.5rem] shadow-2xl ring-1 ring-slate-200 dark:ring-slate-800 flex flex-col overflow-hidden transition-all duration-500 origin-bottom-right ${isOpen ? propVal : parseFloat(String(propVal));\n          if (isNaN(val) || typeof f.value === 'string') return String(propVal).toLowerCase().includes(String(f.value).toLowerCase());\n          switch(f.operator) {\n              case '>': return val > (f.value as number);\n              case '<': return val < (f.value as number);\n              case '>=': return val >= (f.value as number);\n              case '<=': return val <= (f.value as number);\n              case 'range': return val >= (f.value as number) && val <= (f.max || Infinity);\n              case '=': return val === (f.value as number);\n              default: return true;\n          }\n      });\n      if (!matchesSyntax) return false;\n      return Object.entries(numericFilters).every(([key, range]) => {\n          const propVal = product.properties[key]?.value;\n          const num = typeof propVal === 'number' ?    setAttachedImage(null);\n        setShowSettings(true);\n        return;\n    }\n\n    const userMsg: Message = {\n      id: Date.now().toString(),\n      role: 'user',\n      text: textToSend,\n    }\n          parts.push({ text: userMsg.text });\n          if (contextStr) parts.push({ text: `\\nData: ${contextStr}` });\n\n          const response = await ai.models.generateContent({\n Compatible Logic ---\n          // Use user configured baseUrl or default\n          const baseUrl = apiConfig.baseUrl || 'https://api.openai.com/v1';\n          \n          const openaiMessages: any[] = [\n              { role: \"system\", content: systemPromptText }\n          ];\n\n          let contentPayload: any = userMsg.text;\n          \n          if (userMsg.image) {\n headers: {\n                  'Content-Type': 'application/json',\n                  'Authorization': `Bearer ${activeApiKey}`\n              },\n              body: JSON.stringify({\n                  model: apiConfig.model || 'gpt-4o', \n                  messages: openaiMessages,\n                  temperature: 0.7,\n                  max_tokens: 2048\n              })\n          });\n\n          if (!response.ok) {\n              const err = await response.text();\n              throw new Error(`API ${response.status}: ${err}`);\n          }\n\n          const data = await response.json();\n          responseText = data.choices?.[0]?.message?.content || \"No response content.\";\n      }\n\n      setMessages(prev => [...prev, {\n        id: Date.now().toString(),\n        role: 'model',\n        text: responseText\n      }]);\n\n    } catch (error: any) {\n      console.error(\"AI Error:\", error);\n      \n      let friendlyMsg = \"无法连接到 AI 服务。\";\n      let errorType: Message['errorType'] = 'generic';\n\n      if (error.message.includes('API Key') || error.message.includes('401') || error.message.includes('403')) {\n          friendlyMsg = \"API 密钥验证失败。请检查配置。\";\n          errorType = 'auth';\n      } else if (error.message.includes('fetch') || error.message.includes('Network') || error.message.includes('503')) {\n          friendlyMsg = \"网络连接失败。请检查您的网络连接或 VPN 设置。\";\n          errorType = 'network';\n      }\n\n      setMessages(prev => [...prev, {\n        id: Date.now().toString(),\n        role: 'system',\n        text: friendlyMsg,\n        errorType: errorType\n      }]);\n    } finally {\n      setIsLoading(false);\n    }\n  };\n\n  useEffect(() => {\n      // Trigger if new prompt is provided and different from last processed one\n      if }, [initialPrompt]);\n\n  const renderInput = () => (\n    <div className=\"flex items-end gap-2 bg-slate-100 dark:bg-slate-800/50 p-2 rounded-[2rem] border border-slate-200 dark:border-slate-700 className=\"hidden\" onChange={(e) => {\n            const f = e.target.files?.[0];\n            if(f){ const r = new FileReader(); r.onloadend = () => setAttachedImage(r.result as string); ./migrated_prompt_history/prompt_2026-02-02T08-42-49.592Z.json:              "replacement": "\nimport React, { useState, useMemo, useRef, useEffect } from 'react';\nimport { \n  Settings, Activity, X, FileJson, Image as ImageIcon, \n  Hexagon, ScatterChart, Waves, Triangle, Info, Loader2,\n  Filter, Plus, Trash2, ChevronDown, Check, AlertTriangle,\n  Thermometer, Target\n} from 'lucide-react';\nimport * as echarts from 'echarts';\nimport { Product } from '../types';\nimport { useLanguage } from '../contexts/LanguageContext';\nimport { ScientificChart, ChartType } from './ScientificChart';\n\ninterface DataVisualizerProps {\n  data: Product[];\n  selectedProducts?: Product[];\n  initialChartType?: string;\n}\n\nexport const DataVisualizer: React.FC<DataVisualizerProps> = ({ data, selectedProducts, initialChartType }) => {\n  const { t, tProp } = useLanguage();\n  const [chartInstance, setChartInstance] = useState<echarts.ECharts | null>(null);\n  const [activeChart, setActiveChart] = useState<ChartType>('radar');\n  const [showConfig, setShowConfig] = useState(true);\n  const [isExporting, setIsExporting] = useState(false);\n\n  // Rheology specific configuration\n  const [selectedRheologyTemps, setSelectedRheologyTemps] = useState<number[]>([190, 210, 230]);\n\n  // Sync with initialChartType from props (navigation from AI)\n  useEffect(() => {\n    if (initialChartType && ['radar', 'ashby', 'mfr_density', 'gpc', 'rheology', 'ternary'].includes(initialChartType)) {\n      setActiveChart(initialChartType as ChartType);\n    }\n  }, [initialChartType]);\n\n  // Filter State\n  const [filters, setFilters] = useState<Record<string, { min: string; max: string }>>({});\n  const [isFilterDropdownOpen, setIsFilterDropdownOpen] = useState(false);\n  const filterDropdownRef = useRef<HTMLDivElement>(null);\n\n  useEffect(() => {\n      const handleClickOutside = (event: MouseEvent) => {\n          if (filterDropdownRef.current && !filterDropdownRef.current.contains(event.target as Node)) {\n              setIsFilterDropdownOpen(false);\n          }\n      };\n      document.addEventListener('mousedown', handleClickOutside);\n      return () => document.removeEventListener('mousedown', handleClickOutside);\n  }, []);\n\n  // Determine base data set\n  const baseData = useMemo(() => {\n    return (selectedProducts && selectedProducts.length > 0) ? selectedProducts : data;\n  }, [data, selectedProducts]);\n\n  // Extract available numeric properties for filtering - Memoized to prevent heavy loop on every render\n  const numericProperties = useMemo(() => {\n      if (!baseData) return [];\n      const props = new Set<string>();\n      baseData.forEach(p => {\n          Object.entries(p.properties).forEach(([key, val]) => {\n              const num = parseFloat(String(val.value));\n              if (!isNaN(num)) props.add(key);\n          });\n      });\n      return Array.from(props).sort();\n  }, [baseData]);\n\n  // Apply filters to baseData\n  const filteredData = useMemo(() => {\n      if (!baseData) return [];\n      if (Object.keys(filters).length === 0) return baseData;\n\n      return baseData.filter(p => {\n          return Object.entries(filters).every(([key, { min, max }]) => {\n              const val = p.properties[key]?.value;\n              const numVal = parseFloat(String(val));\n              \n              if (isNaN(numVal)) return false; \n\n              const minVal = min === '' ? -Infinity : parseFloat(min);\n              const maxVal = max === '' ? Infinity : parseFloat(max);\n\n              return numVal >= minVal && numVal <= maxVal;\n          });\n      });\n  }, [baseData, filters]);\n\n  // Helper: Safe Float Parser (Layer 1: Anti-Crash)\n  const safeParse = (val: any, fallback = 0): number => {\n      if (val === undefined || val === null || val === '') return fallback;\n      const num = parseFloat(String(val));\n      return isNaN(num) ? fallback : num;\n  };\n\n  const handleAddFilter = (key: string) => {\n      if (!filters[key]) {\n          setFilters(prev => ({ ...prev, [key]: { min: '', max: '' } }));\n      }\n      setIsFilterDropdownOpen(false);\n  };\n\n  const updateFilter = (key: string, field: 'min' | 'max', val: string) => {\n      // Allow only numbers and decimals\n      if (val && !/^-?\\d*\\.?\\d*$/.test(val)) return;\n      setFilters(prev => ({\n          ...prev,\n          [key]: { ...prev[key], [field]: val }\n      }));\n  };\n\n  const removeFilter = (key: string) => {\n      setFilters(prev => {\n          const next = { ...prev };\n          delete next[key];\n          return next;\n      });\n  };\n\n  // --- Data Preparation Logic (Defensive) using filteredData ---\n\n  // 1. Radar Data: Compare top 5 (or selected) products\n  const radarData = useMemo(() => {\n    if (!filteredData) return [];\n    try {\n        const source = filteredData.slice(0, 5); \n        return source.map(p => ({\n          name: p.gradeName,\n          value: [\n            safeParse(p.properties['熔体质量流动速率']?.value),\n            safeParse(p.properties['密度']?.value),\n            safeParse(p.properties['弯曲模量']?.value),\n            safeParse(p.properties['拉伸屈服应力']?.value),\n            safeParse(p.properties['悬臂梁缺口冲击强度']?.value)\n          ]\n        }));\n    } catch (e) {\n        console.error(\"Radar Prep Error:\", e);\n        return [];\n    }\n  }, [filteredData]);\n\n  // 2. Ashby Data: MFR vs Impact\n  const ashbyData = useMemo(() => {\n    if (!filteredData) return [];\n    try {\n        const groups: Record<string, any[]> = {};\n        filteredData.forEach(p => {\n          const man = p.manufacturer || 'Unknown';\n          if (!groups[man]) groups[man] = [];\n          \n          const mfr = safeParse(p.properties['熔体质量流动速率']?.value, -1);\n          const impact = safeParse(p.properties['悬臂梁缺口冲击强度']?.value, -1);\n          \n          if (mfr > 0 && impact > 0) {\n            groups[man].push([mfr, impact, p.gradeName]);\n          }\n        });\n\n        return Object.entries(groups).map(([name, points]) => ({\n          name,\n          data: points\n        }));\n    } catch(e) {\n        console.error(\"Ashby Prep Error:\", e);\n        return [];\n    }\n  }, [filteredData]);\n\n  // 3. MFR vs Density Data\n  const mfrDensityData = useMemo(() => {\n    if (!filteredData) return [];\n    try {\n        const groups: Record<string, any[]> = {};\n        filteredData.forEach(p => {\n          const man = p.manufacturer || 'Unknown';\n          if (!groups[man]) groups[man] = [];\n          \n          const mfr = safeParse(p.properties['熔体质量流动速率']?.value, -1);\n          const density = safeParse(p.properties['密度']?.value, -1);\n          \n          if (mfr > 0 && density > 0) {\n            groups[man].push([mfr, density, p.gradeName]);\n          }\n        });\n\n        return Object.entries(groups).map(([name, points]) => ({\n          name,\n          data: points\n        }));\n    } catch(e) {\n        console.error(\"MFR-Density Prep Error:\", e);\n        return [];\n    }\n  }, [filteredData]);\n\n  // 5. Ternary Data: Mock Formulation (Simulated based on properties)\n  const ternaryData = useMemo(() => {\n    if (!filteredData) return [];\n    try {\n        const source = filteredData.length > 0 ? filteredData : [];\n        return source.slice(0, 100).map((p, i) => {\n            // Simulation logic to create 3 clusters based on density/MFR\n            const mfr = safeParse(p.properties['熔体质量流动速率']?.value, 1);\n            let a, b, c;\n\n            if (mfr < 1) {\n                a = 0.6 + Math.random() * 0.3;\n                b = Math.random() * (0.9 - a);\n                c = 1 - a - b;\n            } else if (mfr > 10) {\n                b = 0.6 + Math.random() * 0.3;\n                a = Math.random() * (0.9 - b);\n                c = 1 - a - b;\n            } else {\n                c = 0.5 + Math.random() * 0.4;\n                a = Math.random() * (0.9 - c);\n                b = 1 - a - c;\n            }\n            \n            const sum = a + b + c;\n            a = a / sum;\n            b = b / sum;\n            c = c / sum;\n            \n            return {\n                a, b, c,\n                name: p.gradeName,\n                value: safeParse(p.properties['拉伸强度']?.value, 50) + (Math.random() * 10 - 5)\n            };\n        });\n    } catch(e) {\n        return [];\n    }\n  }, [filteredData]);\n\n  // Select the correct data based on chart type to pass to ScientificChart\n  const currentChartData = useMemo(() => {\n      switch(activeChart) {\n          case 'radar': return radarData;\n          case 'ashby': return ashbyData;\n          case 'mfr_density': return mfrDensityData;\n          case 'gpc': return filteredData; \n          case 'rheology': return { products: filteredData, temps: selectedRheologyTemps }; \n          case 'ternary': return ternaryData;\n          default: return [];\n      }\n  }, [activeChart, radarData, ashbyData, mfrDensityData, filteredData, ternaryData, selectedRheologyTemps]);\n\n  const handleExport = async (format: 'png' | 'json') => {\n      setIsExporting(true);\n      if (format === 'png' && chartInstance) {\n          try {\n            const dataUrl = chartInstance.getDataURL({\n                type: 'png',\n                pixelRatio: 2,\n                backgroundColor: '#fff'\n            });\n            const a = document.createElement('a');\n            a.href = dataUrl;\n            a.download = `resindb_${activeChart}_analysis.png`;\n            a.click();\n          } catch(e) { console.error(e); }\n      } else if (format === 'json') {\n          const jsonStr = JSON.stringify(currentChartData, null, 2);\n          const blob = new Blob([jsonStr], {type: 'application/json'});\n          const url = URL.createObjectURL(blob);\n          const a = document.createElement('a');\n          a.href = url;\n          a.download = `resindb_${activeChart}_data.json`;\n          a.click();\n      }\n      setIsExporting(false);\n  };\n\n  const chartDescriptions = {\n      radar: t('desc_radar'),\n      ashby: t('desc_ashby'),\n      mfr_density: t('desc_mfr_density'),\n      gpc: t('desc_gpc'),\n      rheology: t('desc_rheology'),\n      ternary: t('desc_ternary')\n  };\n\n  const toggleRheologyTemp = (temp: number) => {\n    setSelectedRheologyTemps(prev => \n      prev.includes(temp) \n        ? prev.filter(t => t !== temp) \n        : [...prev, temp].sort()\n    );\n  };\n\n  // Check if we have valid data for the current view to show improved empty state\n  const hasValidData = filteredData.length > 0 && currentChartData && (Array.isArray(currentChartData) ? currentChartData.length > 0 : true);\n\n  return (\n    <div className=\"flex flex-col md:flex-row h-full gap-4 overflow-hidden\">\n      {/* Scientific Controls Sidebar */}\n      <div className={`flex flex-col bg-white dark:bg-slate-900 border border-slate-200 dark:border-slate-800 rounded-3xl transition-all duration-500 ease-out shrink-0 overflow-hidden shadow-xl ${showConfig ? 'w-full md:w-72 opacity-100 translate-x-0' : 'w-0 opacity-0 -translate-x-10 border-0 pointer-events-none'}`}>\n        <div className=\"p-5 border-b border-slate-100 dark:border-slate-800 flex items-center justify-between bg-slate-50/80 dark:bg-slate-950/50 backdrop-blur-sm\">\n          <div className=\"flex items-center gap-2 font-black text-sm text-slate-800 dark:text-white uppercase tracking-widest\">\n            <Activity size={16} className=\"text-emerald-500\" />\n            {t('analysisMode')}\n          </div>\n          <button onClick={() => setShowConfig(false)} className=\"md:hidden text-slate-400 hover:text-slate-600\">\n            <X size={20} />\n          </button>\n        </div>\n\n        <div className=\"flex-1 overflow-y-auto custom-scrollbar\">\n            <div className=\"p-4 space-y-2\">\n                {[\n                    { id: 'radar', label: t('chart_radar'), icon: Hexagon, color: 'text-indigo-500' },\n                    { id: 'ashby', label: t('chart_ashby'), icon: ScatterChart, color: 'text-rose-500' },\n                    { id: 'mfr_density', label: t('chart_mfr_density'), icon: Target, color: 'text-sky-500' },\n                    { id: 'gpc', label: t('chart_gpc'), icon: Waves, color: 'text-blue-500' },\n                    { id: 'rheology', label: t('chart_rheology'), icon: Activity, color: 'text-amber-500' },\n                    { id: 'ternary', label: t('chart_ternary'), icon: Triangle, color: 'text-emerald-500' },\n                ].map(item => (\n                    <button \n                        key={item.id}\n                        onClick={() => setActiveChart(item.id as ChartType)}\n                        className={`w-full flex items-center gap-3 p-3 rounded-2xl border transition-all duration-200 group relative overflow-hidden ${\n                            activeChart === item.id \n                            ? product.categoryIds : [];\n        cats.forEach(catId => {\n            counts[catId] = (counts[catId] || 0) + 1;\n        });\n    });\n    return counts;\n  }, [allProducts]);\n\n  // Helper to find category name map\n  const categoryNameMap = useMemo(() => {\n      const map = new Map<string, string>();\n      const traverse = (cats: Category[]) => {\n          cats.forEach(c => {\n              map.set(c.id, language === 'en' && c.nameEn ? c.nameEn : c.name);\n              if (c.children) traverse(c.children);\n          });\n      };\n      traverse(CATEGORY_TREE);\n      return map;\n  }, [language]);\n\n  const resolvePropKey = useCallback((label: string): string | null => {\n      const cleanLabel = label.toLowerCase();\n      const directMatch = columns.find(c => c.key.toLowerCase() === cleanLabel || tProp(c.label).toLowerCase() === cleanLabel);\n      if (directMatch) return directMatch.key;\n      const reverseKey = Object.keys(propertyMap).find(k => k.toLowerCase() === cleanLabel || propertyMap[k].toLowerCase() === cleanLabel);\n      if (reverseKey) return reverseKey;\n      return null;\n  }, [columns, tProp]);\n\n  const filteredData = useMemo(() => {\n    const syntaxRegex = /([\\u4e00-\\u9fa5\\w]+):([<>]=?|[-.0-9a-zA-Z]+)/g;\n    const syntaxFilters: { key: string, operator: string, value: string | number, max?: number }[] = [];\n    let processedQuery = searchQuery;\n    let match;\n    while ((match = syntaxRegex.exec(searchQuery)) !== null) {\n        const [full, label, condition] = match;\n        const key = resolvePropKey(label);\n        if (key) {\n            processedQuery = processedQuery.replace(full, '');\n            if (condition.includes('-') && !condition.startsWith('-')) {\n                const parts = condition.split('-');\n                syntaxFilters.push({ key, operator: 'range', value: parseFloat(parts[0]), max: parseFloat(parts[1]) });\n            } else if (condition.match(/^[<>]=?/)) {\n                const op = condition.match(/^[<>]=?/)?.[0] || '';\n                const val = parseFloat(condition.replace(op, ''));\n                syntaxFilters.push({ key, operator: op, value: val });\n            } else {\n                const numVal = parseFloat(condition);\n                syntaxFilters.push({ key, operator: '=', value: isNaN(numVal) ? condition : numVal });\n            }\n        }\n    }\n    const textKeywords = processedQuery.toLowerCase().split(' ').filter(k => k.trim());\n    return allProducts.filter(product => {\n      // Logic Update: Multi-select filtering with robust handling for empty/null categoryIds\n      if (selectedCategoryIds.size > 0) {\n          const pCats = Array.isArray(product.categoryIds) ? product.categoryIds : [];\n          const hasMatch = pCats.some(id => selectedCategoryIds.has(id));\n          if (!hasMatch) return false;\n      }\n\n      const matchesText = textKeywords.every(query => product.gradeName.toLowerCase().includes(query) || product.manufacturer.toLowerCase().includes(query) || Object.keys(product.properties).some(k => k.toLowerCase().includes(query)));\n      if (!matchesText) return false;\n      const matchesSyntax = syntaxFilters.every(f => {\n          const propVal = product.properties[f.key]?.value;\n          const val = typeof propVal === 'number' ? propVal : parseFloat(String(propVal));\n          if (isNaN(val) || typeof f.value === 'string') return String(propVal).toLowerCase().includes(String(f.value).toLowerCase());\n          switch(f.operator) {\n              case '>': return val > (f.value as number);\n              case '<': return val < (f.value as number);\n              case '>=': return val >= (f.value as number);\n              case '<=': return val <= (f.value as number);\n              case 'range': return val >= (f.value as number) && val <= (f.max || Infinity);\n              case '=': return val === (f.value as number);\n              default: return true;\n          }\n      });\n      if (!matchesSyntax) return false;\n      return (Object.entries(numericFilters) as [string, { min: string, max: string }][]).every(([key, range]) => {\n          const propVal = product.properties[key]?.value;\n          const num = typeof propVal === 'number' ? propVal : parseFloat(String(propVal));\n          if (isNaN(num)) return true;\n          const min = range.min === '' ? -Infinity : parseFloat(range.min);\n          const max = range.max === '' ? max: string }>>({});\n  const [isFilterDropdownOpen, setIsFilterDropdownOpen] = useState(false);\n  const filterDropdownRef = useRef<HTMLDivElement>(null);\n\n  useEffect(() => {\n      const handleClickOutside = (event: MouseEvent) => {\n          if (filterDropdownRef.current && !filterDropdownRef.current.contains(event.target as Node)) {\n              setIsFilterDropdownOpen(false);\n          }\n      };\n      document.addEventListener('mousedown', handleClickOutside);\n      return () => document.removeEventListener('mousedown', handleClickOutside);\n  }, []);\n\n  // Determine base data set\n  const baseData = useMemo(() => {\n    return (selectedProducts && selectedProducts.length > 0) ? selectedProducts : data;\n  }, [data, selectedProducts]);\n\n  // Extract available numeric properties for filtering - Memoized to prevent heavy loop on every render\n  const numericProperties = useMemo(() => {\n      if (!baseData) return [];\n      const props = new Set<string>();\n      baseData.forEach(p => {\n          Object.entries(p.properties).forEach(([key, v]) => {\n              const val = v as PropertyValue;\n              const num = parseFloat(String(val.value));\n              if (!isNaN(num)) props.add(key);\n          });\n      });\n      return Array.from(props).sort();\n  }, [baseData]);\n\n  // Apply filters to baseData\n  const filteredData = useMemo(() => {\n      if (!baseData) return [];\n      if (Object.keys(filters).length === 0) return baseData;\n\n      return baseData.filter(p => {\n          return (Object.entries(filters) as [string, { min: string, max: string }][]).every(([key, { min, max }]) => {\n              const val = p.properties[key]?.value;\n              const numVal = parseFloat(String(val));\n              \n              if (isNaN(numVal)) return false; \n\n              const minVal = min === '' ? -Infinity : parseFloat(min);\n              const maxVal = max === '' ? Infinity : parseFloat(max);\n\n              return numVal >= minVal && numVal <= maxVal;\n          });\n      });\n  }, [baseData, filters]);\n\n  // Helper: Safe Float Parser (Layer 1: Anti-Crash)\n  const safeParse = (val: any, fallback = 0): number => {\n      if (val === undefined || val === null || val === '') return fallback;\n      const num = parseFloat(String(val));\n      return isNaN(num) ? fallback : num;\n  };\n\n  const handleAddFilter = (key: string) => {\n      if (!filters[key]) {\n          setFilters(prev => ({ ...prev, [key]: { min: '', max: '' } }));\n      }\n      setIsFilterDropdownOpen(false);\n  };\n\n  const updateFilter = (key: string, field: 'min' | 'max', val: string) => {\n      // Allow only numbers and decimals\n      if (val && !/^-?\\d*\\.?\\d*$/.test(val)) return;\n      setFilters(prev => ({\n          ...prev,\n          [key]: { ...prev[key], [field]: val }\n      }));\n  };\n\n  const removeFilter = (key: string) => {\n      setFilters(prev => {\n          const next = { ...prev };\n          delete next[key];\n          return next;\n      });\n  };\n\n  // --- Data Preparation Logic (Defensive) using filteredData ---\n\n  // 1. Radar Data: Compare top 5 (or selected) products\n  const radarData = useMemo(() => {\n    if (!filteredData) return [];\n    try {\n        const source = filteredData.slice(0, 5); \n        return source.map(p => ({\n          name: p.gradeName,\n          value: [\n            safeParse(p.properties['熔体质量流动速率']?.value),\n            safeParse(p.properties['密度']?.value),\n            safeParse(p.properties['弯曲模量']?.value),\n            safeParse(p.properties['拉伸屈服应力']?.value),\n            safeParse(p.properties['悬臂梁缺口冲击强度']?.value)\n          ]\n        }));\n    } catch (e) {\n        console.error(\"Radar Prep Error:\", e);\n        return [];\n    }\n  }, [filteredData]);\n\n  // 2. Ashby Data: MFR vs Impact\n  const ashbyData = useMemo(() => {\n    if (!filteredData) return [];\n    try {\n        const groups: Record<string, any[]> = {};\n        filteredData.forEach(p => {\n          const man = p.manufacturer || 'Unknown';\n          if (!groups[man]) groups[man] = [];\n          \n          const mfr = safeParse(p.properties['熔体质量流动速率']?.value, -1);\n          const impact = safeParse(p.properties['悬臂梁缺口冲击强度']?.value, -1);\n          \n          if (mfr > 0 && impact > 0) {\n            groups[man].push([mfr, impact, p.gradeName]);\n          }\n        });\n\n        return Object.entries(groups).map(([name, points]) => ({\n          name,\n          data: points\n        }));\n    } catch(e) {\n        console.error(\"Ashby Prep Error:\", e);\n        return [];\n    }\n  }, [filteredData]);\n\n  // 3. MFR vs Density Data\n  const mfrDensityData = useMemo(() => {\n    if (!filteredData) return [];\n    try {\n        const groups: Record<string, any[]> = {};\n        filteredData.forEach(p => {\n          const man = p.manufacturer || 'Unknown';\n          if (!groups[man]) groups[man] = [];\n          \n          const mfr = safeParse(p.properties['熔体质量流动速率']?.value, -1);\n          const density = safeParse(p.properties['密度']?.value, -1);\n          \n          if (mfr > 0 && density > 0) {\n            groups[man].push([mfr, density, p.gradeName]);\n          }\n        });\n\n        return Object.entries(groups).map(([name, points]) => ({\n          name,\n          data: points\n        }));\n    } catch(e) {\n        console.error(\"MFR-Density Prep Error:\", e);\n        return [];\n    }\n  }, [filteredData]);\n\n  // 5. Ternary Data: Mock Formulation (Simulated based on properties)\n  const ternaryData = useMemo(() => {\n    if (!filteredData) return [];\n    try {\n        const source = filteredData.length > 0 ? filteredData : [];\n        return source.slice(0, 100).map((p, i) => {\n            // Simulation logic to create 3 clusters based on density/MFR\n            const mfr = safeParse(p.properties['熔体质量流动速率']?.value, 1);\n            let a, b, c;\n\n            if (mfr < 1) {\n                a = 0.6 + Math.random() * 0.3;\n                b = Math.random() * (0.9 - a);\n                c = 1 - a - b;\n            } else if (mfr > 10) {\n                b = 0.6 + Math.random() * 0.3;\n                a = Math.random() * (0.9 - b);\n                c = 1 - a - b;\n            } else {\n                c = 0.5 + Math.random() * 0.4;\n                a = Math.random() * (0.9 - c);\n                b = 1 - a - c;\n            }\n            \n            const sum = a + b + c;\n            a = a / sum;\n            b = b / sum;\n            c = c / sum;\n            \n            return {\n                a, b, c,\n                name: p.gradeName,\n                value: safeParse(p.properties['拉伸强度']?.value, 50) + (Math.random() * 10 - 5)\n            };\n        });\n    } catch(e) {\n        return [];\n    }\n  }, [filteredData]);\n\n  // Select the correct data based on chart type to pass to ScientificChart\n  const currentChartData = useMemo(() => {\n      switch(activeChart) {\n          case 'radar': return radarData;\n          case 'ashby': return ashbyData;\n          case 'mfr_density': return mfrDensityData;\n          case 'gpc': return filteredData; \n          case 'rheology': return { products: filteredData, temps: selectedRheologyTemps }; \n          case 'ternary': return ternaryData;\n          default: return [];\n      }\n  }, [activeChart, radarData, ashbyData, mfrDensityData, filteredData, ternaryData, selectedRheologyTemps]);\n\n  const handleExport = async (format: 'png' | 'json') => {\n      setIsExporting(true);\n      if (format === 'png' && chartInstance) {\n          try {\n            const dataUrl = chartInstance.getDataURL({\n                type: 'png',\n                pixelRatio: 2,\n                backgroundColor: '#fff'\n            });\n            const a = document.createElement('a');\n            a.href = dataUrl;\n            a.download = `resindb_${activeChart}_analysis.png`;\n            a.click();\n          } catch(e) { console.error(e); }\n      } else if (format === 'json') {\n          const jsonStr = JSON.stringify(currentChartData, null, 2);\n          const blob = new Blob([jsonStr], {type: 'application/json'});\n          const url = URL.createObjectURL(blob);\n          const a = document.createElement('a');\n          a.href = url;\n          a.download = `resindb_${activeChart}_data.json`;\n          a.click();\n      }\n      setIsExporting(false);\n  };\n\n  const chartDescriptions = {\n      radar: t('desc_radar'),\n      ashby: t('desc_ashby'),\n      mfr_density: t('desc_mfr_density'),\n      gpc: t('desc_gpc'),\n      rheology: t('desc_rheology'),\n      ternary: t('desc_ternary')\n  };\n\n  const toggleRheologyTemp = (temp: number) => {\n    setSelectedRheologyTemps(prev => \n      prev.includes(temp) \n        ? prev.filter(t => t !== temp) \n        : [...prev, temp].sort()\n    );\n  };\n\n  // Check if we have valid data for the current view to show improved empty state\n  const hasValidData = filteredData.length > 0 && currentChartData && (Array.isArray(currentChartData) ? currentChartData.length > 0 : true);\n\n  return (\n    <div className=\"flex flex-col md:flex-row h-full gap-4 overflow-hidden\">\n      {/* Scientific Controls Sidebar */}\n      <div className={`flex flex-col bg-white dark:bg-slate-900 border border-slate-200 dark:border-slate-800 rounded-3xl transition-all duration-500 ease-out shrink-0 overflow-hidden shadow-xl ${showConfig ? referenceId: string;\n  sourceUrl: string;\n  isExpanded: boolean;\n}\n\nexport const EditProductModal: React.FC<EditProductModalProps> = ({ isOpen, onClose, onSave, product }) => {\n  const { t,     };\n      });\n      setPropertyRows(rows);\n    }\n  }, [product, isOpen]);\n\n  const handleSave = async () => {\n    if (!product || isSaving) return;\n    setIsSaving(true);\n    \n    const newProperties: Record<string, PropertyValue> = {};\n    propertyRows.forEach(row => {\n      if (row.key.trim()) {\n        const numVal = Number(row.value);\n        newProperties[row.key] = {\n          value: !isNaN(numVal) && row.value.trim() !== '' ? numVal : row.value,\n          unit: row.unit.trim() || undefined,\n          standard: row.standard.trim() || undefined,\n          instrument: '', instrument: '', temperature: '', referenceId: '', sourceUrl: '',\n        isExpanded: true \n    }]);\n  };\n\n  const removeRow = (id: string) => {\n    setPropertyRows(propertyRows.filter(r => r.id !== id));\n  };\n\n  const updateRow = (id: string, field: keyof PropertyRow, val: any) => {\n    setPropertyRows(propertyRows.map(r => r.id === id ? { ...r, [field]: val } : r));\n  };\n\n value={formData.gradeName || ''}\n                    onChange={e => setFormData({...formData, gradeName: e.target.value})}\n                 />\n              </div>\n              <div JSON.parse(saved) : null;\n  });\n\n  const [toasts, setToasts] = useState<Toast[]>([]);\n  const addToast = useCallback((type: Toast['type'], message: string) => {\n      const id = Date.now().toString();\n      setToasts(prev => [...prev, { id, type, message }]);\n      setTimeout(() => setToasts(prev => prev.filter(t => t.id !== id)), 3000);\n  }, []);\n\n  const [allProducts, setAllProducts] = useState<Product[]>(MOCK_PRODUCTS);\n  const [selectedCategoryIds, setSelectedCategoryIds] = useState<Set<string>>(new Set());\n  \n  const [searchQuery, setSearchQuery] = useState('');\n  const [columns, setColumns] = useState<ColumnConfig[]>([]);\n  const [isImportOpen, setIsImportOpen] = useState(false);\n  const [isProfileOpen, setIsProfileOpen] = useState(false);\n  const [isAdminOpen, setIsAdminOpen] = useState(false);\n  const [viewingProduct, setViewingProduct] = useState<Product | null>(null);\n  const [activeView, setActiveView] = useState<AppView>('dashboard');\n  const [isExporting, setIsExporting] = useState(false);\n  const [isComparisonOpen, setIsComparisonOpen] = useState(false);\n\n  const [selectedIds, setSelectedIds] = useState<Set<string>>(new Set());\n  const [showFilters, setShowFilters] = useState(false);\n  const [numericFilters, setNumericFilters] = useState<Record<string, { min: string; max: string }>>({});\n  \n  const [aiPrompt, setAiPrompt] = useState<string | undefined>(undefined);\n\n  useEffect(() => { setColumns(getDynamicColumns(allProducts)); }, [allProducts]);\n\n  const categoryCounts = useMemo(() => {\n    const counts: Record<string, number> = {};\n    allProducts.forEach(product => {\n        const cats = Array.isArray(product.categoryIds) ? product.categoryIds : [];\n        cats.forEach(catId => {\n            counts[catId] = (counts[catId] || 0) + 1;\n        });\n    });\n    return counts;\n  }, [allProducts]);\n\n  // Helper to find category name map\n  const categoryNameMap = useMemo(() => {\n      const map = new Map<string, string>();\n      const traverse = (cats: Category[]) => {\n          cats.forEach(c => {\n              map.set(c.id, language === 'en' && c.nameEn ? c.nameEn : c.name);\n              if (c.children) traverse(c.children);\n          });\n      };\n      traverse(CATEGORY_TREE);\n      return map;\n  }, [language]);\n\n  const resolvePropKey = useCallback((label: string): string | null => {\n      const cleanLabel = label.toLowerCase();\n      const directMatch = columns.find(c => c.key.toLowerCase() === cleanLabel || tProp(c.label).toLowerCase() === cleanLabel);\n      if (directMatch) return directMatch.key;\n      const reverseKey = Object.keys(propertyMap).find(k => k.toLowerCase() === cleanLabel || propertyMap[k].toLowerCase() === cleanLabel);\n      if (reverseKey) return reverseKey;\n      return null;\n  }, [columns, tProp]);\n\n  const filteredData = useMemo(() => {\n    const syntaxRegex = /([\\u4e00-\\u9fa5\\w]+):([<>]=?|[-.0-9a-zA-Z]+)/g;\n    const syntaxFilters: { key: string, operator: string, value: string | number, max?: number }[] = [];\n    let processedQuery = searchQuery;\n    let match;\n    while ((match = syntaxRegex.exec(searchQuery)) !== null) {\n        const [full, label, condition] = match;\n        const key = resolvePropKey(label);\n        if (key) {\n            processedQuery = processedQuery.replace(full, '');\n            if (condition.includes('-') && !condition.startsWith('-')) {\n                const parts = condition.split('-');\n                syntaxFilters.push({ key, operator: 'range', value: parseFloat(parts[0]), max: parseFloat(parts[1]) });\n            } else if (condition.match(/^[<>]=?/)) {\n                const op = condition.match(/^[<>]=?/)?.[0] || '';\n                const val = parseFloat(condition.replace(op, ''));\n                syntaxFilters.push({ key, operator: op, value: val });\n            } else {\n                const numVal = parseFloat(condition);\n                syntaxFilters.push({ key, operator: '=', value: isNaN(numVal) ? condition : numVal });\n            }\n        }\n    }\n    const textKeywords = processedQuery.toLowerCase().split(' ').filter(k => k.trim());\n    return allProducts.filter(product => {\n      // Logic Update: Multi-select filtering with robust handling for empty/null categoryIds\n      if (selectedCategoryIds.size > 0) {\n          const pCats = Array.isArray(product.categoryIds) ? product.categoryIds : [];\n          const hasMatch = pCats.some(id => selectedCategoryIds.has(id));\n          if (!hasMatch) return false;\n      }\n\n      const matchesText = textKeywords.every(query => product.gradeName.toLowerCase().includes(query) || product.manufacturer.toLowerCase().includes(query) || Object.keys(product.properties).some(k => k.toLowerCase().includes(query)));\n      if (!matchesText) return false;\n      const matchesSyntax = syntaxFilters.every(f => {\n          const propVal = product.properties[f.key]?.value;\n          const val = typeof propVal === 'number' ? propVal : parseFloat(String(propVal));\n          if (isNaN(val) || typeof f.value === 'string') return String(propVal).toLowerCase().includes(String(f.value).toLowerCase());\n          switch(f.operator) {\n              case '>': return val > (f.value as number);\n              case '<': return val < (f.value as number);\n              case '>=': return val >= (f.value as number);\n              case '<=': return val <= (f.value as number);\n              case 'range': return val >= (f.value as number) && val <= (f.max || Infinity);\n              case '=': return val === (f.value as number);\n              default: return true;\n          }\n      });\n      if (!matchesSyntax) return false;\n      // Fixed: Explicit type assertion for Object.entries to allow property access\n      return (Object.entries(numericFilters) as [string, { min: string, max: string }][]).every(([key, range]) => {\n          const propVal = product.properties[key]?.value;\n          const num = typeof propVal === 'number' ? propVal : parseFloat(String(propVal));\n          if (isNaN(num)) return true;\n          const min = range.min === '' ? -Infinity : parseFloat(range.min);\n          const max = range.max === '' ? Infinity : parseFloat(range.max);\n          return num >= min && num <= max;\n      });\n    });\n  }, [allProducts, selectedCategoryIds, searchQuery, numericFilters, resolvePropKey]);\n\n  const handleToggleAllColumns = (visible: boolean) => { setColumns(cols => cols.map(c => c.isSystem ? c : { ...c, visible })); };\n\n  const handleExport = async () => { setIsExporting(true); await new Promise(r => setTimeout(r, 800)); addToast('success', '分析报告已生成'); setIsExporting(false); };\n  const handleDelete = (ids: string[]) => { setAllProducts(prev => prev.filter(p => !ids.includes(p.id))); setSelectedIds(new Set()); addToast('success', `已同步删除 ${ids.length} 条记录`); };\n  \n  const handleImportData = (newProducts: Product[]) => { \n      setAllProducts(prev => [...newProducts, ...prev]); \n      setIsImportOpen(false); \n      addToast('success', `${newProducts.length} 条数据入库成功`); \n  };\n\n  const handleUpdateUserProfile = (updatedData: any) => {\n    if (!currentUser) return;\n     else addToast('info', `库中未找到牌号: ${gradeName}`);\n  };\n\n  const toggleCategory = (id: string) => {\n      setSelectedCategoryIds(prev => {\n          const next = new Set(prev);\n          if
