max: string }>>({});\n  const [isFilterDropdownOpen, setIsFilterDropdownOpen] = useState(false);\n  const filterDropdownRef = useRef<HTMLDivElement>(null);\n\n  useEffect(() => {\n      const handleClickOutside = (event: MouseEvent) => {\n          if (filterDropdownRef.current && !filterDropdownRef.current.contains(event.target as Node)) {\n              setIsFilterDropdownOpen(false);\n          }\n      };\n      document.addEventListener('mousedown', handleClickOutside);\n      return () => document.removeEventListener('mousedown', handleClickOutside);\n  }, []);\n\n  // Determine base data set\n  const baseData = useMemo(() => {\n    return (selectedProducts && selectedProducts.length > 0) ? selectedProducts : data;\n  }, [data, selectedProducts]);\n\n  // Extract available numeric properties for filtering - Memoized to prevent heavy loop on every render\n  const numericProperties = useMemo(() => {\n      if (!baseData) return [];\n      const props = new Set<string>();\n      baseData.forEach(p => {\n          Object.entries(p.properties).forEach(([key, v]) => {\n              const val = v as PropertyValue; // Cast value\n              const num = parseFloat(String(val.value));\n              if (!isNaN(num)) props.add(key);\n          });\n      });\n      return Array.from(props).sort();\n  }, [baseData]);\n\n  // Apply filters to baseData\n  const filteredData = useMemo(() => {\n      if (!baseData) return [];\n      if (Object.keys(filters).length === 0) return baseData;\n\n      return baseData.filter(p => {\n          return (Object.entries(filters) as [string, { min: string, max: string }][]).every(([key, { min, max }]) => {\n              const val = p.properties[key]?.value;\n              const numVal = parseFloat(String(val));\n              \n              if (isNaN(numVal)) return false; \n\n              const minVal = min === '' ? -Infinity : parseFloat(min);\n              const maxVal = max === '' ? Infinity : parseFloat(max);\n\n              return numVal >= minVal && numVal <= maxVal;\n          });\n      });\n  }, [baseData, filters]);\n\n  // Helper: Safe Float Parser (Layer 1: Anti-Crash)\n  const safeParse = (val: any, fallback = 0): number => {\n      if (val === undefined || val === null || val === '') return fallback;\n      const num = parseFloat(String(val));\n      return isNaN(num) ? fallback : num;\n  };\n\n  const handleAddFilter = (key: string) => {\n      if (!filters[key]) {\n          setFilters(prev => ({ ...prev, [key]: { min: '', max: '' } }));\n      }\n      setIsFilterDropdownOpen(false);\n  };\n\n  const updateFilter = (key: string, field: 'min' | 'max', val: string) => {\n      // Allow only numbers and decimals\n      if (val && !/^-?\\d*\\.?\\d*$/.test(val)) return;\n      setFilters(prev => ({\n          ...prev,\n          [key]: { ...prev[key], [field]: val }\n      }));\n  };\n\n  const removeFilter = (key: string) => {\n      setFilters(prev => {\n          const next = { ...prev };\n          delete next[key];\n          return next;\n      });\n  };\n\n  // --- Data Preparation Logic (Defensive) using filteredData ---\n\n  // 1. Radar Data: Compare top 5 (or selected) products\n  const radarData = useMemo(() => {\n    if (!filteredData) return [];\n    try {\n        const source = filteredData.slice(0, 5); \n        return source.map(p => ({\n          name: p.gradeName,\n          value: [\n            safeParse(p.properties['熔体质量流动速率']?.value),\n            safeParse(p.properties['密度']?.value),\n            safeParse(p.properties['弯曲模量']?.value),\n            safeParse(p.properties['拉伸屈服应力']?.value),\n            safeParse(p.properties['悬臂梁缺口冲击强度']?.value)\n          ]\n        }));\n    } catch (e) {\n        console.error(\"Radar Prep Error:\", e);\n        return [];\n    }\n  }, [filteredData]);\n\n  // 2. Ashby Data: MFR vs Impact\n  const ashbyData = useMemo(() => {\n    if (!filteredData) return [];\n    try {\n        const groups: Record<string, any[]> = {};\n        filteredData.forEach(p => {\n          const man = p.manufacturer || 'Unknown';\n          if (!groups[man]) groups[man] = [];\n          \n          const mfr = safeParse(p.properties['熔体质量流动速率']?.value, -1);\n          const impact = safeParse(p.properties['悬臂梁缺口冲击强度']?.value, -1);\n          \n          if (mfr > 0 && impact > 0) {\n            groups[man].push([mfr, impact, p.gradeName]);\n          }\n        });\n\n        return Object.entries(groups).map(([name, points]) => ({\n          name,\n          data: points\n        }));\n    } catch(e) {\n        console.error(\"Ashby Prep Error:\", e);\n        return [];\n    }\n  }, [filteredData]);\n\n  // 3. MFR vs Density Data\n  const mfrDensityData = useMemo(() => {\n    if (!filteredData) return [];\n    try {\n        const groups: Record<string, any[]> = {};\n        filteredData.forEach(p => {\n          const man = p.manufacturer || 'Unknown';\n          if (!groups[man]) groups[man] = [];\n          \n          const mfr = safeParse(p.properties['熔体质量流动速率']?.value, -1);\n          const density = safeParse(p.properties['密度']?.value, -1);\n          \n          if (mfr > 0 && density > 0) {\n            groups[man].push([mfr, density, p.gradeName]);\n          }\n        });\n\n        return Object.entries(groups).map(([name, points]) => ({\n          name,\n          data: points\n        }));\n    } catch(e) {\n        console.error(\"MFR-Density Prep Error:\", e);\n        return [];\n    }\n  }, [filteredData]);\n\n  // 5. Ternary Data: Mock Formulation (Simulated based on properties)\n  const ternaryData = useMemo(() => {\n    if (!filteredData) return [];\n    try {\n        const source = filteredData.length > 0 ? filteredData : [];\n        return source.slice(0, 100).map((p, i) => {\n            // Simulation logic to create 3 clusters based on density/MFR\n            const mfr = safeParse(p.properties['熔体质量流动速率']?.value, 1);\n            let a, b, c;\n\n            if (mfr < 1) {\n                a = 0.6 + Math.random() * 0.3;\n                b = Math.random() * (0.9 - a);\n                c = 1 - a - b;\n            } else if (mfr > 10) {\n                b = 0.6 + Math.random() * 0.3;\n                a = Math.random() * (0.9 - b);\n                c = 1 - a - b;\n            } else {\n                c = 0.5 + Math.random() * 0.4;\n                a = Math.random() * (0.9 - c);\n                b = 1 - a - c;\n            }\n            \n            const sum = a + b + c;\n            a = a / sum;\n            b = b / sum;\n            c = c / sum;\n            \n            return {\n                a, b, c,\n                name: p.gradeName,\n                value: safeParse(p.properties['拉伸强度']?.value, 50) + (Math.random() * 10 - 5)\n            };\n        });\n    } catch(e) {\n        return [];\n    }\n  }, [filteredData]);\n\n  // Select the correct data based on chart type to pass to ScientificChart\n  const currentChartData = useMemo(() => {\n      switch(activeChart) {\n          case 'radar': return radarData;\n          case 'ashby': return ashbyData;\n          case 'mfr_density': return mfrDensityData;\n          case 'gpc': return filteredData; \n          case 'rheology': return { products: filteredData, temps: selectedRheologyTemps }; \n          case 'ternary': return ternaryData;\n          default: return [];\n      }\n  }, [activeChart, radarData, ashbyData, mfrDensityData, filteredData, ternaryData, selectedRheologyTemps]);\n\n  const handleExport = async (format: 'png' | 'json') => {\n      setIsExporting(true);\n      if (format === 'png' && chartInstance) {\n          try {\n            const dataUrl = chartInstance.getDataURL({\n                type: 'png',\n                pixelRatio: 2,\n                backgroundColor: '#fff'\n            });\n            const a = document.createElement('a');\n            a.href = dataUrl;\n            a.download = `resindb_${activeChart}_analysis.png`;\n            a.click();\n          } catch(e) { console.error(e); }\n      } else if (format === 'json') {\n          const jsonStr = JSON.stringify(currentChartData, null, 2);\n          const blob = new Blob([jsonStr], {type: 'application/json'});\n          const url = URL.createObjectURL(blob);\n          const a = document.createElement('a');\n          a.href = url;\n          a.download = `resindb_${activeChart}_data.json`;\n          a.click();\n      }\n      setIsExporting(false);\n  };\n\n  const chartDescriptions = {\n      radar: t('desc_radar'),\n      ashby: t('desc_ashby'),\n      mfr_density: t('desc_mfr_density'),\n      gpc: t('desc_gpc'),\n      rheology: t('desc_rheology'),\n      ternary: t('desc_ternary')\n  };\n\n  const toggleRheologyTemp = (temp: number) => {\n    setSelectedRheologyTemps(prev => \n      prev.includes(temp) \n        ? prev.filter(t => t !== temp) \n        : [...prev, temp].sort()\n    );\n  };\n\n  // Check if we have valid data for the current view to show improved empty state\n  const hasValidData = filteredData.length > 0 && currentChartData && (Array.isArray(currentChartData) ? currentChartData.length > 0 : true);\n\n  return (\n    <div className=\"flex flex-col md:flex-row h-full gap-4 overflow-hidden\">\n      {/* Scientific Controls Sidebar */}\n      <div className={`flex flex-col bg-white dark:bg-slate-900 border border-slate-200 dark:border-slate-800 rounded-3xl transition-all duration-500 ease-out shrink-0 overflow-hidden shadow-xl ${showConfig ? 'w-full md:w-72 opacity-100 translate-x-0' : 'w-0 opacity-0 -translate-x-10 border-0 pointer-events-none'}`}>\n        <div className=\"p-5 border-b border-slate-100 dark:border-slate-800 flex items-center justify-between bg-slate-50/80 dark:bg-slate-950/50 backdrop-blur-sm\">\n          <div className=\"flex items-center gap-2 font-black text-sm text-slate-800 dark:text-white uppercase tracking-widest\">\n            <Activity size={16} className=\"text-emerald-500\" />\n            {t('analysisMode')}\n          </div>\n          <button onClick={() => setShowConfig(false)} className=\"md:hidden text-slate-400 hover:text-slate-600\">\n            <X size={20} />\n          </button>\n        </div>\n\n        <div className=\"flex-1 overflow-y-auto custom-scrollbar\">\n            <div className=\"p-4 space-y-2\">\n                {[\n                    { id: 'radar', label: t('chart_radar'), icon: Hexagon, color: 'text-indigo-500' },\n                    { id: 'ashby', label: t('chart_ashby'), icon: ScatterChart, color: 'text-rose-500' },\n                    { id: 'mfr_density', label: t('chart_mfr_density'), icon: Target, color: 'text-sky-500' },\n                    { id: 'gpc', label: t('chart_gpc'), icon: Waves, color: 'text-blue-500' },\n                    { id: 'rheology', label: t('chart_rheology'), icon: Activity, color: 'text-amber-500' },\n                    { id: 'ternary', label: t('chart_ternary'), icon: Triangle, color: 'text-emerald-500' },\n                ].map(item => (\n                    <button \n                        key={item.id}\n                        onClick={() => setActiveChart(item.id as ChartType)}\n                        className={`w-full flex items-center gap-3 p-3 rounded-2xl border transition-all duration-200 group relative overflow-hidden ${\n                            activeChart === item.id \n                            ? referenceId: string;\n  sourceUrl: string;\n  isExpanded: boolean;\n}\n\nexport const EditProductModal: React.FC<EditProductModalProps> = ({ isOpen, onClose, onSave, product }) => {\n  const { t, useState(false);\n\n  useEffect(() => {\n    if (product) {\n      setFormData({\n        gradeName: product.gradeName,\n        manufacturer: product.manufacturer,\n        categoryIds: product.categoryIds\n      });\n      \n      const rows = Object.entries(product.properties).map(([key, v], index) => {\n        const val = v as PropertyValue; // Explicit Cast\n        return {\n            id: `prop-${index}-${Date.now()}`,\n            key,\n            value: String(val.value),\n            unit: val.unit || '',\n            standard: val.standard || '',\n            instrument: val.instrument || '',\n            temperature: val.temperature || '',\n            referenceId: val.referenceId || '',\n            sourceUrl: val.sourceUrl || '',\n            isExpanded: false\n        };\n      });\n      setPropertyRows(rows);\n    }\n  }, [product, isOpen]);\n\n  const handleSave = async () => {\n    if (!product || isSaving) return;\n    setIsSaving(true);\n    \n    const newProperties: Record<string, PropertyValue> = {};\n    propertyRows.forEach(row => {\n      if (row.key.trim()) {\n        const numVal = Number(row.value);\n        newProperties[row.key] = {\n          value: !isNaN(numVal) && row.value.trim() !== '' ? numVal : row.value,\n          unit: row.unit.trim() || undefined,\n          standard: row.standard.trim() || undefined,\n          instrument: row.instrument.trim() || undefined,\n          temperature: row.temperature.trim() || undefined,\n          referenceId: row.referenceId.trim() || undefined,\n          sourceUrl: row.sourceUrl.trim() || undefined\n        };\n      }\n    });\n\n    const updatedProduct = {\n      ...product,\n      ...formData as Product,\n      properties: newProperties,\n      updatedAt: new Date().toISOString().split('T')[0]\n    };\n\n    try {\n        await onSave(updatedProduct);\n        onClose();\n    } catch (e) {\n        // Error handling done in parent\n    } finally {\n        setIsSaving(false);\n    }\n  };\n\n  const addRow = () => {\n    setPropertyRows([...propertyRows, { \n        id: `new-${Date.now()}`, \n        key: '', value: '', unit: '', \n        standard: '', instrument: '', temperature: '', referenceId: '', sourceUrl: '',\n        isExpanded: true \n    }]);\n  };\n\n  const removeRow = (id: string) => {\n    setPropertyRows(propertyRows.filter(r => r.id !== id));\n  };\n\n  const updateRow = (id: string, field: keyof PropertyRow, val: any) => {\n    setPropertyRows(propertyRows.map(r => r.id === id ? { ...r, [field]: val } : r));\n  };\n\n  const toggleExpand = (id: string) => {\n    setPropertyRows(propertyRows.map(r => r.id === id ? { ...r, isExpanded: !r.isExpanded } : r));\n  };\n\n  if (!isOpen || !product) return null;\n\n  return (\n    <div className=\"fixed inset-0 z-[100] flex items-center justify-center bg-black/60 backdrop-blur-sm p-4 animate-in fade-in duration-300\">\n      <div className=\"w-full max-w-2xl bg-white dark:bg-slate-900 border border-slate-200 dark:border-slate-800 rounded-3xl shadow-2xl overflow-hidden animate-in zoom-in-95 duration-300 flex flex-col max-h-[90vh]\">\n        \n        {/* Header */}\n        <div className=\"px-6 py-5 border-b border-slate-100 dark:border-slate-800 flex items-center justify-between bg-slate-50 dark:bg-slate-950/50\">\n          <div className=\"flex items-center gap-3\">\n            <div className=\"p-2 bg-emerald-100 dark:bg-emerald-900/30 text-emerald-600 dark:text-emerald-400 rounded-xl\">\n               <Beaker size={20} />\n            </div>\n            <h3 className=\"text-lg font-bold text-slate-900 dark:text-white\">{t('editProduct')}</h3>\n          </div>\n          <button onClick={onClose} className=\"text-slate-400 hover:text-slate-600 dark:hover:text-slate-200\">\n            <X size={20} />\n          </button>\n        </div>\n\n        {/* Content */}\n <label className=\"text-[10px] font-bold text-slate-400 uppercase tracking-widest ml-1\">{tProp('牌号')}</label>\n                 <input \n                    className=\"w-full px-4 py-2.5 bg-slate-50 propVal : parseFloat(String(propVal));\n          if (isNaN(val) || typeof f.value === 'string') return String(propVal).toLowerCase().includes(String(f.value).toLowerCase());\n          switch(f.operator) {\n              case '>': return val > (f.value as number);\n              case '<': return val < (f.value as number);\n              case '>=': return val >= (f.value as number);\n              case '<=': return val <= (f.value as number);\n              case 'range': return val >= (f.value as number) && val <= (f.max || Infinity);\n              case '=': return val === (f.value as number);\n              default: return true;\n          }\n      });\n      if (!matchesSyntax) return false;\n      // Fixed: Explicit type assertion for Object.entries to allow property access\n      return (Object.entries(numericFilters) as [string, { min: string, max: string }][]).every(([key, range]) => {\n          const propVal = product.properties[key]?.value;\n          const num = typeof propVal === 'number' ? cols: number }> = ({ rows, cols }) => (\n  <div className=\"w-full animate-pulse space-y-4 p-4\">\n    <div className=\"flex gap-4 mb-8\">\n      {Array.from({ length: cols }).map((_, i) => (\n        <div key={i} className=\"h-4 bg-slate-100 dark:bg-slate-800 rounded-full flex-1\" />\n      ))}\n    </div>\n    {Array.from({ length: rows }).map((_, i) => (\n      <div key={i} className=\"flex gap-4 items-center\">\n        <div className=\"w-6 h-6 bg-slate-100 dark:bg-slate-800 rounded-md\" />\n        {Array.from({ length: cols }).map((_, j) => (\n          <div key={j} className={`h-8 bg-slate-50 dark:bg-slate-800/50 rounded-xl flex-1 ${j === 0 ? 'flex-[2]' : ''}`} />\n        ))}\n      </div>\n    ))}\n  </div>\n);\n\nconst QuickRadarPopup: React.FC<{ product: Product; anchorRef: React.RefObject<HTMLDivElement> }> = ({ product, anchorRef }) => {\n    const chartRef = useRef<HTMLDivElement>(null);\n    const { tProp } = useLanguage();\n\n    useEffect(() => {\n        if (!chartRef.current) return;\n        const myChart = echarts.init(chartRef.current);\n        const props = ['密度', '熔体质量流动速率', '拉伸屈服应力', '弯曲模量', '悬臂梁缺口冲击强度'];\n        const values = props.map(p => {\n            const v = product.properties?.[p]?.value;\n            return typeof v === 'number' ? v : parseFloat(String(v)) || 0;\n        });\n\n        myChart.setOption({\n            radar: {\n                indicator: props.map(p => ({ name: tProp(p).slice(0,6), max: 100 })), \n                shape: 'circle', splitNumber: 3, axisName: { fontSize: 8, color: '#94a3b8' }\n            },\n            series: [{ type: 'radar', data: [{ value: values, areaStyle: { color: 'rgba(99, 102, 241, 0.3)' }, lineStyle: { color: '#6366f1' } }], symbol: 'none' }]\n        });\n        return () => myChart.dispose();\n    }, [product, tProp]);\n\n    const rect = anchorRef.current?.getBoundingClientRect();\n    if (!rect) return null;\n\n    return (\n        <div className=\"fixed z-[100] w-48 h-48 bg-white dark:bg-slate-900 rounded-2xl shadow-2xl border border-slate-200 dark:border-slate-800 p-2 animate-in fade-in zoom-in-95 pointer-events-none\" \n             style={{ left: rect.left + 40, top: rect.top - 60 }}>\n            <div ref={chartRef} className=\"w-full h-full\" />\n        </div>\n    );\n};\n\nconst renderCellContent = (val: any, unit?: string, isLongText = false, isBest = false): React.ReactNode => {\n    if (val === null || val === undefined || val === '') {\n        return <span className=\"text-slate-300 dark:text-slate-700 font-mono\">-</span>;\n    }\n    \n    if (typeof val === 'number') {\n        if (isNaN(val)) return <span className=\"text-slate-300 dark:text-slate-700 font-mono\">-</span>;\n        return (\n            <div className={`flex items-baseline gap-1 ${isBest ? 'bg-emerald-100/50 dark:bg-emerald-900/30 px-2 py-0.5 rounded-md -ml-2 border border-emerald-200/50 dark:border-emerald-800/50 w-fit' : ''}`}>\n                <span className={`font-mono font-bold tracking-tight ${isBest ? 'text-emerald-700 dark:text-emerald-400' : 'text-primary-600 dark:text-primary-400'}`}>{val}</span>\n                {unit && <span className={`text-[9px] font-black uppercase tracking-tighter ${isBest ? 'text-emerald-500/70' : 'text-slate-400'}`}>{unit}</span>}\n                {isBest && <Trophy size={10} className=\"text-emerald-500 ml-1\" />}\n            </div>\n        );\n    }\n    \n    const displayStr = typeof val === 'object' ? JSON.stringify(val) : String(val);\n    // Changed span to div to allow truncation to work properly\n    return (\n      <div \n        className={`text-slate-700 dark:text-slate-300 font-medium ${isLongText ? 'line-clamp-1 max-w-[240px]' : 'truncate max-w-[180px]'}`} \n        title={displayStr}\n      >\n        {displayStr}\n      </div>\n    );\n};\n\n// Helper to determine if lower value is better\nconst isLowBest = (key: string) => {\n    const k = key.toLowerCase();\n    return k.includes('density') || k.includes('密度') || \n           k.includes('mfr') || k.includes('flow') || k.includes('流动') ||\n           k.includes('shrinkage') || k.includes('收缩') ||\n           k.includes('haze') || k.includes('雾度') ||\n           k.includes('absorption') || k.includes('吸水');\n};\n\nexport const DataGrid: React.FC<DataGridProps> = ({ data = [], columns = [], isLoading, onDelete, onUpdate, onBatchUpdate, onCategorySelect, onViewDetails, selectedIds = new Set(), onSelectionChange, onClearFilters, activeFilters = [] }) => {\n  const { t, tProp } = useLanguage();\n  const visibleColumns = useMemo(() => (columns || []).filter((c) => c.visible), [columns]);\n  const [sortConfig, setSortConfig] = useState<SortConfig | null>(null);\n  const [editingProduct, setEditingProduct] = useState<Product | null>(null);\n  const [deletingIds, setDeletingIds] = useState<string[]>([]);\n  const [hoveredProduct, setHoveredProduct] = useState<Product | null>(null);\n  const radarAnchorRef = useRef<HTMLDivElement>(null);\n\n  const [currentPage, setCurrentPage] = useState(1);\n  const pageSize = 15;\n\n  const sortedData = useMemo(() => {\n    if (!data) return [];\n    if (!sortConfig) return data;\n    return [...data].sort((a, b) => {\n      const aProp = a.properties?.[sortConfig.key];\n      const bProp = b.properties?.[sortConfig.key];\n      let aV = aProp?.value ?? (a as any)[sortConfig.key] ?? '';\n      let bV = bProp?.value ?? (b as any)[sortConfig.key] ?? '';\n      \n      // Handle nulls always at bottom\n      if (aV === '' || aV === null || aV === undefined) return 1;\n      if (bV === '' || bV === null || bV === undefined) return -1;\n\n      const aN = parseFloat(String(aV)), bN = parseFloat(String(bV));\n      if (!isNaN(aN) && !isNaN(bN)) return sortConfig.direction === 'asc' ? aN - bN : bN - aN;\n      return sortConfig.direction === 'asc' ? String(aV).localeCompare(String(bV)) : String(bV).localeCompare(String(aV));\n    });\n  }, [data, sortConfig]);\n\n  const paginatedData = useMemo(() => {\n    const start = (currentPage - 1) * pageSize;\n    return sortedData.slice(start, start + pageSize);\n  }, [sortedData, currentPage]);\n\n  const totalPages = Math.ceil(sortedData.length / pageSize);\n\n  useEffect(() => {\n    if (currentPage > totalPages && totalPages > 0) { setCurrentPage(totalPages); }\n  }, [totalPages, currentPage]);\n\n  // Determine extremes for highlighting within the current view\n  const columnExtremes = useMemo(() => {\n    const extremes: Record<string, number> = {};\n    const visibleCols = columns.filter(c => !c.isSystem && c.visible);\n    \n    visibleCols.forEach(col => {\n        const key = col.key;\n        const lowBest = isLowBest(key);\n        let bestVal = lowBest ? Infinity : -Infinity;\n        let found = false;\n\n        paginatedData.forEach(p => {\n            const val = p.properties?.[key]?.value;\n            const num = parseFloat(String(val));\n            if (!isNaN(num)) {\n                found = true;\n                if (lowBest) {\n                    if (num < bestVal) bestVal = num;\n                } else {\n                    if (num > bestVal) bestVal = num;\n                }\n            }\n        });\n        if (found && bestVal !== Infinity && bestVal !== -Infinity) {\n            extremes[key] = bestVal;\n        }\n    });\n    return extremes;\n  }, [paginatedData, columns]);\n\n  const toggleSelection = (id: string) => {\n    const next = new Set(selectedIds);\n    if (next.has(id)) next.delete(id); else next.add(id);\n    onSelectionChange(next);\n  };\n\n  const toggleAllSelection = () => {\n    if (selectedIds.size === paginatedData.length && paginatedData.length > 0) { onSelectionChange(new Set()); }\n    else { onSelectionChange(new Set(paginatedData.map(p => p.id))); }\n  };\n\n  if (isLoading) return <GridSkeleton rows={10} cols={visibleColumns.length || 5} />;\n\n  if (!isLoading && data.length === 0) {\n      return (\n          <div className=\"h-full flex flex-col items-center justify-center p-12 text-center bg-slate-50/50 dark:bg-slate-900/30 rounded-[3rem] border border-dashed border-slate-200 dark:border-slate-800\">\n              <div className=\"w-20 h-20 bg-white dark:bg-slate-800 rounded-full flex items-center justify-center shadow-glass mb-6\">\n                  <SearchX size={32} className=\"text-slate-300 dark:text-slate-600\" />\n              </div>\n              <h3 className=\"text-lg font-bold text-slate-800 dark:text-slate-100 mb-2\">未找到匹配结果</h3>\n              <p className=\"text-sm text-slate-500 max-w-xs mx-auto tracking-tight mb-6\">尝试调整您的过滤条件或搜索关键词以获取更多结果。</p>\n              {onClearFilters && (\n                  <button onClick={onClearFilters} className=\"flex items-center gap-2 px-5 py-2.5 bg-primary-600 hover:bg-primary-500 text-white rounded-xl shadow-lg shadow-primary-500/20 font-bold text-xs transition-all active:scale-95\">\n                      <RotateCcw size={14} /> 重置所有筛选\n                  </button>\n              )}\n          </div>\n      );\n  }\n\n  return (\n    <div className=\"h-full flex flex-col relative overflow-hidden group/grid\">\n      {/* Active Filters Bar */}\n      {activeFilters.length > 0 && (\n          <div className=\"px-6 py-3 bg-white/50 dark:bg-slate-950/50 border-b border-slate-100 dark:border-slate-800 flex items-center gap-3 shrink-0 overflow-x-auto custom-scrollbar-horizontal backdrop-blur-sm animate-in slide-in-from-top-1\">\n              <div className=\"flex items-center gap-1.5 text-[10px] font-black text-slate-400 uppercase tracking-widest shrink-0\">\n                  <Filter size={12} /> {activeFilters.length} Active Filters\n              </div>\n              <div className=\"h-4 w-px bg-slate-200 dark:bg-slate-800 shrink-0 mx-1\"></div>\n              \n              {activeFilters.map(f => (\n                  <div key={f.id} className={`flex items-center gap-1.5 px-3 py-1.5 rounded-lg text-xs font-bold border shadow-sm transition-all animate-in zoom-in duration-200 ${\n                      f.type === 'search' \n                      ? 'bg-blue-50 dark:bg-blue-900/20 text-blue-700 dark:text-blue-300 border-blue-100 dark:border-blue-800' \n                      : 'bg-primary-50 dark:bg-primary-900/20 text-primary-700 dark:text-primary-300 border-primary-100 dark:border-primary-800'\n                  }`}>\n                      {f.type === 'search' ? <Search size={10} /> : <Tag size={10} />}\n                      <span>{f.label}</span>\n                      <button onClick={f.onRemove} className=\"p-0.5 rounded-full hover:bg-white/50 dark:hover:bg-black/20 transition-colors ml-1\">\n                          <X size={12} />\n                      </button>\n                  </div>\n              ))}\n\n              {onClearFilters && activeFilters.length > 1 && (\n                  <button \n                    onClick={onClearFilters} \n                    className=\"ml-auto text-[10px] font-bold text-slate-400 hover:text-rose-500 hover:underline transition-colors whitespace-nowrap px-2\"\n                  >\n                      Clear All\n                  </button>\n              )}\n          </div>\n      )}\n\n      <div className=\"flex-1 overflow-auto custom-scrollbar\">\n        <table className=\"w-full text-sm text-left border-separate border-spacing-0 table-fixed\">\n          <thead className=\"sticky top-0 z-30 bg-white/90 dark:bg-slate-950/90 backdrop-blur-xl shadow-sm\">\n            <tr>\n              <th className=\"px-4 py-4 w-12 border-b border-slate-100 dark:border-slate-800 bg-white/90 dark:bg-slate-950/90\">\n                <button onClick={toggleAllSelection} className=\"text-slate-400 hover:text-primary-500 transition-colors\">\n                    {selectedIds.size > 0 && selectedIds.size === paginatedData.length ? updatedProduct : p));\n  };\n\n  const handleBatchUpdate = (ids: string[], updates: Partial<Product>) => {\n    const { _propertyUpdates, ...directUpdates } = updates as any;\n    setAllProducts(prev => prev.map(p => {\n      if (!ids.includes(p.id)) return p;\n      const newProps = { ...p.properties };\n      if (_propertyUpdates) {\n        Object.entries(_propertyUpdates).forEach(([key, val]) => {\n          newProps[key] = val as PropertyValue;\n        });\n      }\n      return { ...p, ...directUpdates, properties: newProps, updatedAt: new Date().toISOString().split('T')[0] };\n    }));\n  };\n\n  const filteredData = useMemo(() => {\n    return allProducts.filter(product => {\n      const matchesCategory = selectedCategoryId ? product.categoryIds.includes(selectedCategoryId) : true;\n      if (!matchesCategory) return false;\n      const query = searchQuery.toLowerCase();\n      return product.gradeName.toLowerCase().includes(query) || product.manufacturer.toLowerCase().includes(query) || Object.keys(product.properties).some(k => k.toLowerCase().includes(query));\n    });\n  }, [allProducts, selectedCategoryId, searchQuery]);\n\n  const handleExport = async () => {\n    if (isExporting) return;\n    setIsExporting(true);\n    // Simulate export delay\n    await new Promise(resolve => setTimeout(resolve, 1000));\n    \n    try {\n        const headers = ['ID', 'Grade', 'Manufacturer', 'Category', 'Updated', 'Properties'];\n        const rows = filteredData.map(p => {\n            const propsStr = Object.entries(p.properties)\n                .map(([k, v]) => `${k}:${v.value}${v.unit ? SortConfig, PropertyValue } from '../types';\nimport { Factory, Edit, Trash2, CheckSquare, Square, MinusSquare, ArrowUp, ArrowDown, ChevronLeft, ChevronRight, Eye, Info, BookOpen, X, GitCompare, FlaskConical, ChevronDown, Check, Layers, AlertCircle } from 'lucide-react';\nimport { useLanguage } from '../contexts/LanguageContext';\nimport { EditProductModal } from './EditProductModal';\nimport { DeleteConfirmationModal } from './DeleteConfirmationModal';\nimport { BatchEditModal } from './BatchEditModal';\nimport { REFERENCES } from '../constants';\nimport { ProductDetailDrawer } from './ProductDetailDrawer';\nimport { ComparisonView } from './ComparisonView';\n\ninterface DataGridProps {\n  data: Product[];\n  columns: ColumnConfig[];\n  isLoading: boolean;\n  onDelete: (ids: string[]) => void;\n  onUpdate: (product: Product) => void;\n  onBatchUpdate: (ids: string[], updates: Partial<Product>) => void;\n  onCategorySelect: (id: string) => void;\n  selectedIds?: Set<string>;\n  onSelectionChange?: (ids: Set<string>) => void;\n}\n\n/**\n * 鲁棒的属性值格式化工具\n * 确保即使后端返回非预期结构，前端界面也不会崩溃\n */\nconst safeRenderValue = (val: any, unit?: string): string => {\n    if (val === null || val === undefined) return '-';\n    \n    // 处理字符串\n    if (typeof val === 'string') {\n        const trimmed = val.trim();\n        if (!trimmed) return '-';\n        return `${trimmed}${unit ? ` ${unit}` : ''}`;\n    }\n    \n    // 处理数值（防御 NaN）\n    if (typeof val === 'number') {\n        if (isNaN(val)) return '-';\n        return `${val}${unit ? ` ${unit}` : ''}`;\n    }\n\n    // 处理日期对象\n    if (val instanceof Date) {\n        return val.toLocaleDateString();\n    }\n\n    // 处理复杂对象或递归 PropertyValue\n    if (typeof val === 'object') {\n        try {\n            if ('value' in val) return safeRenderValue(val.value, val.unit);\n            return JSON.stringify(val);\n        } catch (e) {\n            return '[数据解析错误]';\n        }\n    }\n\n    return String(val);\n};\n\nconst PropertyContextTooltip: React.FC<{ prop: PropertyValue; className?: string }> = ({ prop, className }) => {\n    const { t } = useLanguage();\n    if (!prop) return null;\n    \n    const reference = REFERENCES?.find(r => r.id === prop.referenceId);\n    \n    return (\n        <div className={`absolute bottom-full left-1/2 -translate-x-1/2 mb-2 z-[100] w-64 bg-slate-900/95 dark:bg-white/95 backdrop-blur-xl text-white dark:text-slate-900 rounded-2xl shadow-2xl p-4 pointer-events-none border border-slate-700 dark:border-slate-200 transition-all duration-200 ease-out origin-bottom ${className}`}>\n            <div className=\"flex items-center gap-2 mb-3 border-b border-white/10 dark:border-slate-900/10 pb-2\">\n                <Info size={14} className=\"text-primary-400 dark:text-primary-600\" />\n                <span className=\"text-[10px] font-black uppercase tracking-widest\">{t('details')}</span>\n            </div>\n            <div className=\"space-y-3\">\n                {prop.instrument && (\n                    <div>\n                        <p className=\"text-[9px] opacity-60 font-bold uppercase tracking-tighter mb-0.5\">测试设备 (Source)</p>\n                        <div className=\"flex items-center gap-1.5 mt-0.5\">\n                            <FlaskConical size={10} className=\"text-emerald-400 dark:text-emerald-600\" />\n                            <p className=\"text-xs font-medium\">{prop.instrument}</p>\n                        </div>\n                    </div>\n                )}\n                {prop.standard && (\n                    <div>\n                        <p className=\"text-[9px] opacity-60 font-bold uppercase tracking-tighter mb-0.5\">执行标准 (Standard)</p>\n                        <p className=\"text-xs font-medium\">{prop.standard}</p>\n                    </div>\n                )}\n                {prop.temperature && (\n                    <div>\n                        <p className=\"text-[9px] opacity-60 font-bold uppercase tracking-tighter mb-0.5\">测试条件 (Conditions)</p>\n                        <p className=\"text-xs font-medium\">{prop.temperature}</p>\n                    </div>\n                )}\n                {reference && (\n                    <div>\n                        <p className=\"text-[9px] opacity-60 font-bold uppercase tracking-tighter mb-0.5\">数据引用自</p>\n                        <div className=\"flex items-center gap-1.5 mt-0.5\">\n                            <BookOpen size={10} className=\"text-primary-400 dark:text-primary-600\" />\n                            <p className=\"text-[10px] italic opacity-80 truncate\">{reference.name}</p>\n                        </div>\n                    </div>\n                )}\n            </div>\n            <div className=\"absolute top-full left-1/2 -translate-x-1/2 w-3 h-3 bg-slate-900/95 dark:bg-white/95 rotate-45 -mt-1.5\"></div>\n        </div>\n    );\n};\n\n/**\n * 镜像级骨架屏\n * 使用 table 布局确保与实际表格列宽一致，防止加载瞬间的布局坍塌\n */\nconst GridSkeleton: React.FC<{ columns: ColumnConfig[]; pageSize: number }> = ({ columns, pageSize }) => (\n    <div className=\"animate-pulse bg-white dark:bg-slate-900/50 flex-1 flex flex-col min-h-0 overflow-hidden\">\n        {/* 表头占位 */}\n        <div className=\"h-10 bg-slate-50 dark:bg-slate-800/50 border-b border-slate-100 dark:border-slate-800 flex items-center px-4\">\n             <div className=\"w-6 h-6 rounded bg-slate-200 dark:bg-slate-700 mr-4\"></div>\n             {columns.filter(c => c.visible).slice(0, 5).map((_, i) => (\n                 <div key={i} className=\"h-4 bg-slate-200 dark:bg-slate-700 rounded w-24 mr-8\"></div>\n             ))}\n        </div>\n        {/* 行数据占位 */}\n        <div className=\"flex-1 overflow-hidden divide-y divide-slate-100 dark:divide-slate-800\">\n            {[...Array(pageSize)].map((_, i) => (\n                <div key={i} className=\"flex gap-4 items-center px-4 py-3 h-[53px]\">\n                    <div className=\"w-6 h-6 rounded-md bg-slate-200 dark:bg-slate-800 shrink-0\"></div>\n                    {columns.filter(c => c.visible).slice(0, 5).map((col, j) => (\n                        <div key={j} className={`h-4 rounded bg-slate-100 dark:bg-slate-800 ${j === 0 ? 'w-32' : 'flex-1'}`}></div>\n                    ))}\n                    <div className=\"w-20 h-4 rounded bg-slate-200 dark:bg-slate-800 shrink-0 ml-auto\"></div>\n                </div>\n            ))}\n        </div>\n    </div>\n);\n\nexport const DataGrid: React.FC<DataGridProps> = ({ \n    data = [], \n    columns = [], \n    isLoading, \n    onDelete, \n    onUpdate, \n    onBatchUpdate, \n    onCategorySelect, \n    selectedIds: propSelectedIds, \n    onSelectionChange \n}) => {\n  const { t, tProp } = useLanguage();\n  \n  // 防御性过滤可见列\n  const visibleColumns = useMemo(() => (columns || []).filter((c) => c.visible), [columns]);\n  \n  const [localSelectedIds, setLocalSelectedIds] = useState<Set<string>>(new Set());\n  const selectedIds = propSelectedIds || localSelectedIds;\n  const handleSelectionChange = onSelectionChange || setLocalSelectedIds;\n\n  const [sortConfig, setSortConfig] = useState<SortConfig | null>(null);\n  const [editingProduct, setEditingProduct] = useState<Product | null>(null);\n  const [deletingIds, setDeletingIds] = useState<string[]>([]);\n  const [isBatchEditOpen, setIsBatchEditOpen] = useState(false);\n  const [viewingProduct, setViewingProduct] = useState<Product | null>(null);\n  const [isComparisonOpen, setIsComparisonOpen] = useState(false);\n  \n  const [isSelectMenuOpen, setIsSelectMenuOpen] = useState(false);\n  const selectMenuRef = useRef<HTMLDivElement>(null);\n\n  const [currentPage, setCurrentPage] = useState(1);\n  const pageSize = 15;\n\n  // 全局点击监听，关闭选择菜单\n  useEffect(() => {\n      const handleClickOutside = (e: MouseEvent) => {\n          if (selectMenuRef.current && !selectMenuRef.current.contains(e.target as Node)) {\n              setIsSelectMenuOpen(false);\n          }\n      };\n      document.addEventListener('mousedown', handleClickOutside);\n      return () => document.removeEventListener('mousedown', handleClickOutside);\n  }, []);\n\n  // 当搜索条件或数据集规模大幅变动时，重置页码防止页面越界\n  useEffect(() => {\n      setCurrentPage(1);\n  }, [data?.length]);\n\n  const handleSort = (key: string) => {\n    let direction: 'asc' | 'desc' = 'asc';\n    if (sortConfig && sortConfig.key === key && sortConfig.direction === 'asc') {\n      direction = 'desc';\n    }\n    setSortConfig({ key, direction });\n  };\n\n  const sortedData = useMemo(() => {\n    if (!data || data.length === 0) return [];\n    if (!sortConfig) return data;\n\n    return [...data].sort((a, b) => {\n      // 深度提取排序值\n      let aVal: any = a.properties?.[sortConfig.key]?.value ?? (a as any)[sortConfig.key] ?? '';\n      let bVal: any = b.properties?.[sortConfig.key]?.value ?? (b as any)[sortConfig.key] ?? '';\n      \n      // 智能识别数值类型进行精准排序\n      const aNum = parseFloat(String(aVal));\n      const bNum = parseFloat(String(bVal));\n      const isANum = !isNaN(aNum) && String(aVal).trim() !== '';\n      const isBNum = !isNaN(bNum) && String(bVal).trim() !== '';\n\n      if (isANum && isBNum) {\n          aVal = aNum;\n          bVal = bNum;\n      } else {\n          aVal = String(aVal).toLowerCase();\n          bVal = String(bVal).toLowerCase();\n      }\n\n      if (aVal < bVal) return sortConfig.direction === 'asc' ? -1 : 1;\n      if (aVal > bVal) return sortConfig.direction === 'asc' ? 1 : -1;\n      return 0;\n    });\n  }, [data, sortConfig]);\n\n  const paginatedData = useMemo(() => {\n      const start = (currentPage - 1) * pageSize;\n      return (sortedData || []).slice(start, start + pageSize);\n  }, [sortedData, currentPage]);\n\n  const totalPages = Math.ceil((sortedData?.length || 0) / pageSize);\n\n  const toggleSelection = (id: string) => {\n    const newSelected = new Set(selectedIds);\n    if (newSelected.has(id)) newSelected.delete(id);\n    else newSelected.add(id);\n    handleSelectionChange(newSelected);\n  };\n\n  const togglePageSelection = () => {\n    if (!paginatedData.length) return;\n    const pageIds = paginatedData.map(p => p.id);\n    const allSelected = pageIds.every(id => selectedIds.has(id));\n    \n    const newSelected = new Set(selectedIds);\n    if (allSelected) {\n        pageIds.forEach(id => newSelected.delete(id));\n    } else {\n        pageIds.forEach(id => newSelected.add(id));\n    }\n    handleSelectionChange(newSelected);\n  };\n\n  const selectAllMatching = () => {\n      if (!sortedData.length) return;\n      const allIds = sortedData.map(p => p.id);\n      handleSelectionChange(new Set(allIds));\n      setIsSelectMenuOpen(false);\n  };\n\n  const deselectAll = () => {\n      handleSelectionChange(new Set());\n      setIsSelectMenuOpen(false);\n  };\n\n  const isPageSelected = paginatedData.length > 0 && paginatedData.every(p => selectedIds.has(p.id));\n  const isIndeterminate = paginatedData.some(p => selectedIds.has(p.id)) && !isPageSelected;\n\n  // 处理加载态\n  if (isLoading) return <GridSkeleton columns={visibleColumns} pageSize={pageSize} />;\n\n  return (\n    <div className=\"h-full flex flex-col bg-transparent relative min-h-0\">\n        {/* 浮动批量操作工具栏 */}\n        {selectedIds.size > 0 && (\n            <div className=\"absolute bottom-8 left-1/2 -translate-x-1/2 z-50 animate-in slide-in-from-bottom-6 duration-300\">\n                <div className=\"flex items-center gap-1 p-1.5 bg-slate-900/90 dark:bg-slate-100/90 backdrop-blur-xl rounded-2xl shadow-float border border-white/10 dark:border-slate-300 text-white dark:text-slate-900 ring-1 ring-black/5\">\n                    <div className=\"flex items-center gap-2 pl-3 pr-4 border-r border-white/10 dark:border-slate-800/10 mr-1\">\n                        <div className=\"flex items-center justify-center w-5 h-5 rounded-full bg-primary-500 text-white text-[10px] font-bold\">\n                            {selectedIds.size}\n                        </div>\n                        <span className=\"text-xs font-bold whitespace-nowrap\">{t('selected')}</span>\n                    </div>\n                    \n                    <button \n                        onClick={() => setIsComparisonOpen(true)}\n                        className=\"flex flex-col items-center justify-center w-16 h-12 rounded-xl hover:bg-white/10 dark:hover:bg-slate-900/10 transition-colors group\"\n                    >\n                        <GitCompare size={18} className=\"mb-0.5 group-hover:scale-110 transition-transform\" />\n                        <span className=\"text-[9px] font-medium opacity-80\">对比</span>\n                    </button>\n\n                    <button \n                        onClick={() => setIsBatchEditOpen(true)}\n                        className=\"flex flex-col items-center justify-center w-16 h-12 rounded-xl hover:bg-white/10 dark:hover:bg-slate-900/10 transition-colors group\"\n                    >\n                        <Edit size={18} className=\"mb-0.5 group-hover:scale-110 transition-transform\" />\n                        <span className=\"text-[9px] font-medium opacity-80\">编辑</span>\n                    </button>\n\n                    <button \n                        onClick={() => setDeletingIds(Array.from(selectedIds))}\n                        className=\"flex flex-col items-center justify-center w-16 h-12 rounded-xl hover:bg-rose-500/20 text-rose-400 dark:text-rose-600 hover:text-rose-300 dark:hover:text-rose-700 transition-colors group\"\n                    >\n                        <Trash2 size={18} className=\"mb-0.5 group-hover:scale-110 transition-transform\" />\n                        <span className=\"text-[9px] font-medium opacity-80\">删除</span>\n                    </button>\n\n                    <div className=\"w-px h-8 bg-white/10 dark:bg-slate-800/10 mx-1\"></div>\n\n                    <button \n                        onClick={() => handleSelectionChange(new Set())}\n                        className=\"w-8 h-8 flex items-center justify-center rounded-full hover:bg-white/20 SortConfig, PropertyValue } from '../types';\nimport { Factory, Edit, Trash2, CheckSquare, Square, MinusSquare, ArrowUp, ArrowDown, ChevronLeft, ChevronRight, Eye, Info, BookOpen, X, GitCompare, FlaskConical, ChevronDown, Check, Layers, AlertCircle } from 'lucide-react';\nimport { useLanguage } from '../contexts/LanguageContext';\nimport { EditProductModal } from './EditProductModal';\nimport { DeleteConfirmationModal } from './DeleteConfirmationModal';\nimport { BatchEditModal } from './BatchEditModal';\nimport { REFERENCES } from '../constants';\nimport { ProductDetailDrawer } from './ProductDetailDrawer';\nimport { ComparisonView } from './ComparisonView';\n\ninterface DataGridProps {\n  data: Product[];\n  columns: ColumnConfig[];\n  isLoading: boolean;\n  onDelete: (ids: string[]) => void;\n  onUpdate: (product: Product) => void;\n  onBatchUpdate: (ids: string[], updates: Partial<Product>) => void;\n  onCategorySelect: (id: string) => void;\n  selectedIds?: Set<string>;\n  onSelectionChange?: (ids: Set<string>) => void;\n}\n\n/**\n * 鲁棒的属性值格式化工具\n * 确保即使后端返回非预期结构，前端界面也不会崩溃\n */\nconst safeRenderValue = (val: any, unit?: string): string => {\n    if (val === null || val === undefined) return '-';\n    \n    // 处理字符串\n    if (typeof val === 'string') {\n        const trimmed = val.trim();\n        if (!trimmed) return '-';\n        return `${trimmed}${unit ? ` ${unit}` : ''}`;\n    }\n    \n    // 处理数值（防御 NaN）\n    if (typeof val === 'number') {\n        if (isNaN(val)) return '-';\n        return `${val}${unit ? ` ${unit}` : ''}`;\n    }\n\n    // 处理日期对象\n    if (val instanceof Date) {\n        return val.toLocaleDateString();\n    }\n\n    // 处理复杂对象或递归 PropertyValue\n    if (typeof val === 'object') {\n        try {\n            if ('value' in val) return safeRenderValue(val.value, val.unit);\n            return JSON.stringify(val);\n        } catch (e) {\n            return '[数据解析错误]';\n        }\n    }\n\n    return String(val);\n};\n\nconst PropertyContextTooltip: React.FC<{ prop: PropertyValue; className?: string }> = ({ prop, className }) => {\n    const { t } = useLanguage();\n    if (!prop) return null;\n    \n    const reference = REFERENCES?.find(r => r.id === prop.referenceId);\n    \n    return (\n        <div className={`absolute bottom-full left-1/2 -translate-x-1/2 mb-2 z-[100] w-64 bg-slate-900/95 dark:bg-white/95 backdrop-blur-xl text-white dark:text-slate-900 rounded-2xl shadow-2xl p-4 pointer-events-none border border-slate-700 dark:border-slate-200 transition-all duration-200 ease-out origin-bottom ${className}`}>\n            <div className=\"flex items-center gap-2 mb-3 border-b border-white/10 dark:border-slate-900/10 pb-2\">\n                <Info size={14} className=\"text-primary-400 dark:text-primary-600\" />\n                <span className=\"text-[10px] font-black uppercase tracking-widest\">{t('details')}</span>\n            </div>\n            <div className=\"space-y-3\">\n                {prop.instrument && (\n                    <div>\n                        <p className=\"text-[9px] opacity-60 font-bold uppercase tracking-tighter mb-0.5\">测试设备 (Source)</p>\n                        <div className=\"flex items-center gap-1.5 mt-0.5\">\n                            <FlaskConical size={10} className=\"text-emerald-400 dark:text-emerald-600\" />\n                            <p className=\"text-xs font-medium\">{prop.instrument}</p>\n                        </div>\n                    </div>\n                )}\n                {prop.standard && (\n                    <div>\n                        <p className=\"text-[9px] opacity-60 font-bold uppercase tracking-tighter mb-0.5\">执行标准 (Standard)</p>\n                        <p className=\"text-xs font-medium\">{prop.standard}</p>\n                    </div>\n                )}\n                {prop.temperature && (\n                    <div>\n                        <p className=\"text-[9px] opacity-60 font-bold uppercase tracking-tighter mb-0.5\">测试条件 (Conditions)</p>\n                        <p className=\"text-xs font-medium\">{prop.temperature}</p>\n                    </div>\n                )}\n                {reference && (\n                    <div>\n                        <p className=\"text-[9px] opacity-60 font-bold uppercase tracking-tighter mb-0.5\">数据引用自</p>\n                        <div className=\"flex items-center gap-1.5 mt-0.5\">\n                            <BookOpen size={10} className=\"text-primary-400 dark:text-primary-600\" />\n                            <p className=\"text-[10px] italic opacity-80 truncate\">{reference.name}</p>\n                        </div>\n                    </div>\n                )}\n            </div>\n            <div className=\"absolute top-full left-1/2 -translate-x-1/2 w-3 h-3 bg-slate-900/95 dark:bg-white/95 rotate-45 -mt-1.5\"></div>\n        </div>\n    );\n};\n\n/**\n * 镜像级骨架屏\n * 使用 table 布局确保与实际表格列宽一致，防止加载瞬间的布局坍塌\n */\nconst GridSkeleton: React.FC<{ columns: ColumnConfig[]; pageSize: number }> = ({ columns, pageSize }) => (\n    <div className=\"animate-pulse bg-white dark:bg-slate-900/50 flex-1 flex flex-col min-h-0 overflow-hidden\">\n        {/* 表头占位 */}\n        <div className=\"h-10 bg-slate-50 dark:bg-slate-800/50 border-b border-slate-100 dark:border-slate-800 flex items-center px-4\">\n             <div className=\"w-6 h-6 rounded bg-slate-200 dark:bg-slate-700 mr-4\"></div>\n             {columns.filter(c => c.visible).slice(0, 5).map((_, i) => (\n                 <div key={i} className=\"h-4 bg-slate-200 dark:bg-slate-700 rounded w-24 mr-8\"></div>\n             ))}\n        </div>\n        {/* 行数据占位 */}\n        <div className=\"flex-1 overflow-hidden divide-y divide-slate-100 dark:divide-slate-800\">\n            {[...Array(pageSize)].map((_, i) => (\n                <div key={i} className=\"flex gap-4 items-center px-4 py-3 h-[53px]\">\n                    <div className=\"w-6 h-6 rounded-md bg-slate-200 dark:bg-slate-800 shrink-0\"></div>\n                    {columns.filter(c => c.visible).slice(0, 5).map((col, j) => (\n                        <div key={j} className={`h-4 rounded bg-slate-100 dark:bg-slate-800 ${j === 0 ? 'w-32' : 'flex-1'}`}></div>\n                    ))}\n                    <div className=\"w-20 h-4 rounded bg-slate-200 dark:bg-slate-800 shrink-0 ml-auto\"></div>\n                </div>\n            ))}\n        </div>\n    </div>\n);\n\nexport const DataGrid: React.FC<DataGridProps> = ({ \n    data = [], \n    columns = [], \n    isLoading, \n    onDelete, \n    onUpdate, \n    onBatchUpdate, \n    onCategorySelect, \n    selectedIds: propSelectedIds, \n    onSelectionChange \n}) => {\n  const { t, tProp } = useLanguage();\n  \n  // 防御性过滤可见列\n  const visibleColumns = useMemo(() => (columns || []).filter((c) => c.visible), [columns]);\n  \n  const [localSelectedIds, setLocalSelectedIds] = useState<Set<string>>(new Set());\n  const selectedIds = propSelectedIds || localSelectedIds;\n  const handleSelectionChange = onSelectionChange || setLocalSelectedIds;\n\n  const [sortConfig, setSortConfig] = useState<SortConfig | null>(null);\n  const [editingProduct, setEditingProduct] = useState<Product | null>(null);\n  const [deletingIds, setDeletingIds] = useState<string[]>([]);\n  const [isBatchEditOpen, setIsBatchEditOpen] = useState(false);\n  const [viewingProduct, setViewingProduct] = useState<Product | null>(null);\n  const [isComparisonOpen, setIsComparisonOpen] = useState(false);\n  \n  const [isSelectMenuOpen, setIsSelectMenuOpen] = useState(false);\n  const selectMenuRef = useRef<HTMLDivElement>(null);\n\n  const [currentPage, setCurrentPage] = useState(1);\n  const pageSize = 15;\n\n  // 全局点击监听，关闭选择菜单\n  useEffect(() => {\n      const handleClickOutside = (e: MouseEvent) => {\n          if (selectMenuRef.current && !selectMenuRef.current.contains(e.target as Node)) {\n              setIsSelectMenuOpen(false);\n          }\n      };\n      document.addEventListener('mousedown', handleClickOutside);\n      return () => document.removeEventListener('mousedown', handleClickOutside);\n  }, []);\n\n  // 当搜索条件或数据集规模大幅变动时，重置页码防止页面越界\n  useEffect(() => {\n      setCurrentPage(1);\n  }, [data?.length]);\n\n  const handleSort = (key: string) => {\n    let direction: 'asc' | 'desc' = 'asc';\n    if (sortConfig && sortConfig.key === key && sortConfig.direction === 'asc') {\n      direction = 'desc';\n    }\n    setSortConfig({ key, direction });\n  };\n\n  const sortedData = useMemo(() => {\n    if (!data || data.length === 0) return [];\n    if (!sortConfig) return data;\n\n    return [...data].sort((a, b) => {\n      // 深度提取排序值\n      let aVal: any = a.properties?.[sortConfig.key]?.value ?? (a as any)[sortConfig.key] ?? '';\n      let bVal: any = b.properties?.[sortConfig.key]?.value ?? (b as any)[sortConfig.key] ?? '';\n      \n      // 智能识别数值类型进行精准排序\n      const aNum = parseFloat(String(aVal));\n      const bNum = parseFloat(String(bVal));\n      const isANum = !isNaN(aNum) && String(aVal).trim() !== '';\n      const isBNum = !isNaN(bNum) && String(bVal).trim() !== '';\n\n      if (isANum && isBNum) {\n          aVal = aNum;\n          bVal = bNum;\n      } else {\n          aVal = String(aVal).toLowerCase();\n          bVal = String(bVal).toLowerCase();\n      }\n\n      if (aVal < bVal) return sortConfig.direction === 'asc' ? -1 : 1;\n      if (aVal > bVal) return sortConfig.direction === 'asc' ? 1 : -1;\n      return 0;\n    });\n  }, [data, sortConfig]);\n\n  const paginatedData = useMemo(() => {\n      const start = (currentPage - 1) * pageSize;\n      return (sortedData || []).slice(start, start + pageSize);\n  }, [sortedData, currentPage]);\n\n  const totalPages = Math.ceil((sortedData?.length || 0) / pageSize);\n\n  const toggleSelection = (id: string) => {\n    const newSelected = new Set(selectedIds);\n    if (newSelected.has(id)) newSelected.delete(id);\n    else newSelected.add(id);\n    handleSelectionChange(newSelected);\n  };\n\n  const togglePageSelection = () => {\n    if (!paginatedData.length) return;\n    const pageIds = paginatedData.map(p => p.id);\n    const allSelected = pageIds.every(id => selectedIds.has(id));\n    \n    const newSelected = new Set(selectedIds);\n    if (allSelected) {\n        pageIds.forEach(id => newSelected.delete(id));\n    } else {\n        pageIds.forEach(id => newSelected.add(id));\n    }\n    handleSelectionChange(newSelected);\n  };\n\n  const selectAllMatching = () => {\n      if (!sortedData.length) return;\n      const allIds = sortedData.map(p => p.id);\n      handleSelectionChange(new Set(allIds));\n      setIsSelectMenuOpen(false);\n  };\n\n  const deselectAll = () => {\n      handleSelectionChange(new Set());\n      setIsSelectMenuOpen(false);\n  };\n\n  const isPageSelected = paginatedData.length > 0 && paginatedData.every(p => selectedIds.has(p.id));\n  const isIndeterminate = paginatedData.some(p => selectedIds.has(p.id)) && !isPageSelected;\n\n  // 处理加载态\n  if (isLoading) return <GridSkeleton columns={visibleColumns} pageSize={pageSize} />;\n\n  return (\n    <div className=\"h-full flex flex-col bg-transparent relative min-h-0\">\n        {/* 浮动批量操作工具栏 */}\n        {selectedIds.size > 0 && (\n            <div className=\"absolute bottom-8 left-1/2 -translate-x-1/2 z-50 animate-in slide-in-from-bottom-6 duration-300\">\n                <div className=\"flex items-center gap-1 p-1.5 bg-slate-900/90 dark:bg-slate-100/90 backdrop-blur-xl rounded-2xl shadow-float border border-white/10 dark:border-slate-300 text-white dark:text-slate-900 ring-1 ring-black/5\">\n                    <div className=\"flex items-center gap-2 pl-3 pr-4 border-r border-white/10 dark:border-slate-800/10 mr-1\">\n                        <div className=\"flex items-center justify-center w-5 h-5 rounded-full bg-primary-500 text-white text-[10px] font-bold\">\n                            {selectedIds.size}\n                        </div>\n                        <span className=\"text-xs font-bold whitespace-nowrap\">{t('selected')}</span>\n                    </div>\n                    \n                    <button \n                        onClick={() => setIsComparisonOpen(true)}\n                        className=\"flex flex-col items-center justify-center w-16 h-12 rounded-xl hover:bg-white/10 dark:hover:bg-slate-900/10 transition-colors group\"\n                    >\n                        <GitCompare size={18} className=\"mb-0.5 group-hover:scale-110 transition-transform\" />\n                        <span className=\"text-[9px] font-medium opacity-80\">对比</span>\n                    </button>\n\n                    <button \n                        onClick={() => setIsBatchEditOpen(true)}\n                        className=\"flex flex-col items-center justify-center w-16 h-12 rounded-xl hover:bg-white/10 dark:hover:bg-slate-900/10 transition-colors group\"\n                    >\n                        <Edit size={18} className=\"mb-0.5 group-hover:scale-110 transition-transform\" />\n                        <span className=\"text-[9px] font-medium opacity-80\">编辑</span>\n                    </button>\n\n                    <button \n                        onClick={() => setDeletingIds(Array.from(selectedIds))}\n                        className=\"flex flex-col items-center justify-center w-16 h-12 rounded-xl hover:bg-rose-500/20 text-rose-400 dark:text-rose-600 hover:text-rose-300 dark:hover:text-rose-700 transition-colors group\"\n                    >\n                        <Trash2 size={18} className=\"mb-0.5 group-hover:scale-110 transition-transform\" />\n                        <span className=\"text-[9px] font-medium opacity-80\">删除</span>\n                    </button>\n\n                    <div className=\"w-px h-8 bg-white/10 dark:bg-slate-800/10 mx-1\"></div>\n\n                    <button \n                        onClick={() => handleSelectionChange(new Set())}\n                        className=\"w-8 h-8 flex items-center justify-center rounded-full hover:bg-white/20 dark:hover:bg-slate-900/10 transition-colors mr-1\"\n                    >\n                        <X size={14} />\n                    </button>\n                </div>\n            </div>\n        )}\n\n      <div className=\"flex-1 overflow-auto custom-scrollbar relative min-h-0\">\n        <table className=\"w-full text-sm text-left border-separate border-spacing-0\">\n          <thead className=\"text-xs text-slate-500 dark:text-slate-400 uppercase bg-white/80 dark:bg-slate-900/80 sticky top-0 z-20 backdrop-blur-md shadow-sm\">\n            <tr>\n              <th className=\"px-4 py-3 font-medium w-16 border-b border-slate-200 dark:border-slate-800 z-30\">\n                <div className=\"flex items-center\" ref={selectMenuRef}>\n                  <div className=\"flex items-center bg-slate-100 dark:bg-slate-800 rounded-lg p-0.5 border border-slate-200 dark:border-slate-700\">\n                      <button \n                        onClick={togglePageSelection} \n                        className={`p-1 rounded-md hover:bg-white dark:hover:bg-slate-700 transition-colors ${isPageSelected ? 'text-primary-600' : 'text-slate-400'}`}\n                      >\n                        {isPageSelected ? <CheckSquare size={16} /> : isIndeterminate ? <MinusSquare size={16} /> : <Square size={16} />}\n                      </button>\n                      <div className=\"w-px h-4 bg-slate-200 dark:bg-slate-700 mx-0.5\"></div>\n                      <button \n                        onClick={() => setIsSelectMenuOpen(!isSelectMenuOpen)}\n                        className=\"p-1 rounded-md hover:bg-white dark:hover:bg-slate-700 text-slate-500 hover:text-slate-700 dark:text-slate-400 dark:hover:text-slate-200 transition-colors\"\n                      >\n                        <ChevronDown size={12} />\n                      </button>\n                  </div>\n\n                  {isSelectMenuOpen && (\n                      <div className=\"absolute top-full left-2 mt-2 w-48 bg-white dark:bg-slate-900 rounded-xl shadow-xl border border-slate-200 dark:border-slate-700 p-1 z-50 animate-in fade-in zoom-in-95 origin-top-left\">\n                          <button \n                            onClick={() => { togglePageSelection(); setIsSelectMenuOpen(false); }}\n                            className=\"w-full text-left px-3 py-2 text-xs font-medium text-slate-700 dark:text-slate-200 hover:bg-slate-50 dark:hover:bg-slate-800 rounded-lg flex items-center gap-2\"\n                          >\n                              {isPageSelected ? <CheckSquare size={14} className=\"text-primary-500\" /> : <Square size={14} />}\n                              选择本页 ({paginatedData.length})\n                          </button>\n                          <button \n                            onClick={selectAllMatching}\n                            className=\"w-full text-left px-3 py-2 text-xs font-medium text-slate-700 dark:text-slate-200 hover:bg-slate-50 dark:hover:bg-slate-800 rounded-lg flex items-center gap-2\"\n                          >\n                              <Layers size={14} className={selectedIds.size === sortedData.length ? \"text-primary-500\" : \"text-slate-400\"} />\n                              全选匹配项 ({sortedData.length})\n                          </button>\n                          <div className=\"h-px bg-slate-100 dark:bg-slate-800 my-1\"></div>\n                          <button \n                            onClick={deselectAll}\n                            className=\"w-full text-left px-3 py-2 text-xs font-bold text-rose-500 hover:bg-rose-50 dark:hover:bg-rose-900/20 rounded-lg flex items-center gap-2\"\n                          >\n                              <X size={14} />\n                              取消全选\n                          </button>\n                      </div>\n                  )}\n                </div>\n              </th>\n              {visibleColumns.map((col) => {\n                  const isNumeric = !['gradeName', 'manufacturer', 'typicalApplication', '应用', '典型应用'].includes(col.key) && !col.isSystem;\n                  return (\n                    <th key={col.key} className={`px-4 py-3 font-bold border-b border-slate-200 dark:border-slate-800 hover:bg-slate-50 dark:hover:bg-slate-800/50 transition-colors cursor-pointer select-none whitespace-nowrap ${isNumeric ? 'text-right' : 'text-left'}`} onClick={() => handleSort(col.key)}>\n                      <div className={`flex items-center gap-1.5 ${isNumeric ? 'justify-end' : 'justify-start'}`}>\n                        {tProp(col.label)}\n                        {sortConfig?.key === col.key && (\n                          sortConfig.direction === 'asc' ? <ArrowUp size={12} className=\"text-primary-500\" /> : <ArrowDown size={12} className=\"text-primary-500\" />\n                        )}\n                      </div>\n                    </th>\n                  );\n              })}\n              <th className=\"px-4 py-3 font-medium text-right w-20 border-b border-slate-200 dark:border-slate-800 bg-white/80 dark:bg-slate-900/80 sticky right-0 z-30 shadow-[-4px_0_8px_-2px_rgba(0,0,0,0.05)] backdrop-blur-md\">{t('actions')}</th>\n            </tr>\n          </thead>\n          <tbody className=\"divide-y divide-slate-100 dark:divide-slate-800/50\">\n            {paginatedData.map((product) => {\n                const isSelected = selectedIds.has(product.id);\n                return (\n                    <tr \n                        key={product.id} \n                        className={`group transition-all hover:bg-white dark:hover:bg-slate-800 ${isSelected ? 'bg-primary-50/50 dark:bg-primary-900/10' : ''}`}\n                        onClick={() => toggleSelection(product.id)}\n                    >\n                        <td className=\"px-4 py-3 w-10 sticky left-0 z-10 bg-transparent\" onClick={e => e.stopPropagation()}>\n                            <div className=\"flex items-center justify-center\">\n                                <button onClick={() => toggleSelection(product.id)} className={`transition-colors ${isSelected ? 'text-primary-500' : 'text-slate-300 group-hover:text-slate-400'}`}>\n                                    {isSelected ? <CheckSquare size={16} /> : <Square size={16} />}\n                                </button>\n                            </div>\n                        </td>\n                        {visibleColumns.map((col) => {\n                            // 牌号列特殊逻辑\n                            if (col.key === 'gradeName') {\n                                return (\n                                    <td key={col.key} className=\"px-4 py-3 font-bold text-slate-800 dark:text-white whitespace-nowrap\">\n                                        <div className=\"flex items-center gap-2 cursor-pointer hover:text-primary-600\" onClick={(e) => { e.stopPropagation(); setViewingProduct(product); }}>\n                                            {product.gradeName || <span className=\"text-slate-300 italic\">未命名牌号</span>}\n                                            {/* \n                                              * FIX: Lucide icons do not support the 'title' prop directly in TypeScript.\n                                              * Wrapped FlaskConical in a span to provide the tooltip.\n                                              */}\n                                            {product.properties?.['密度']?.instrument && <span title=\"包含实验室元数据\"><FlaskConical size={10} className=\"text-emerald-500\" /></span>}\n                                        </div>\n                                    </td>\n                                );\n                            }\n                            // 厂家列特殊逻辑\n                            if (col.key === 'manufacturer') {\n                                return (\n                                    <td key={col.key} className=\"px-4 py-3 text-slate-600 dark:text-slate-300 whitespace-nowrap\">\n                                        <div className=\"flex items-center gap-2 max-w-[180px]\">\n                                            <div className=\"p-1 rounded bg-slate-100 dark:bg-slate-800 text-slate-500 shrink-0\"><Factory size={10} /></div>\n                                            <span className=\"truncate\" title={product.manufacturer}>{product.manufacturer || '-'}</span>\n                                        </div>\n                                    </td>\n                                );\n                            }\n                            \n                            const prop = product.properties?.[col.key];\n                            const isNumeric = typeof prop?.value === 'number';\n                            \n                            return (\n                                <td key={col.key} className={`px-4 py-3 text-slate-600 dark:text-slate-400 whitespace-nowrap relative group/cell ${isNumeric ? 'text-right' : 'text-left'}`}>\n                                    {prop ? (\n                                        <div className={`flex items-baseline gap-1 ${isNumeric ? 'justify-end' : 'justify-start'} max-w-[200px]`}>\n                                            <span className={`block truncate ${isNumeric ? 'font-mono tabular-nums text-primary-600 dark:text-primary-400 font-bold' : ''}`} title={String(prop.value)}>\n                                                {safeRenderValue(prop.value)}\n                                            </span>\n                                            {prop.unit && <span className=\"text-[10px] text-slate-400 select-none shrink-0\">{prop.unit}</span>}\n                                            \n                                            {(prop.instrument || prop.standard) && (\n                                                <div className=\"opacity-0 group-hover/cell:opacity-100 transition-opacity absolute right-2 top-1/2 -translate-y-1/2 z-20\">\n                                                     <Info size={12} className=\"text-slate-300 hover:text-primary-500 cursor-help\" />\n                                                </div>\n                                            )}\n                                            {(prop.instrument || prop.standard) && (\n                                                <PropertyContextTooltip \n                                                    prop={prop} \n                                                    className=\"opacity-0 group-hover/cell:opacity-100 invisible group-hover/cell:visible scale-95 group-hover/cell:scale-100\"\n                                                />\n                                            )}\n                                        </div>\n                                    ) : (\n                                        <span className=\"text-slate-300 text-xs\">-</span>\n                                    )}\n                                </td>\n                            );\n                        })}\n                        <td className=\"px-4 py-3 text-right w-20 sticky right-0 z-10 bg-transparent group-hover:bg-white dark:group-hover:bg-slate-800 shadow-[-4px_0_8px_-2px_rgba(0,0,0,0.05)] transition-colors\" onClick={e => e.stopPropagation()}>\n                            <div className=\"flex items-center justify-end gap-1 opacity-0 group-hover:opacity-100 transition-opacity\">\n                                <button onClick={() => setViewingProduct(product)} className=\"p-1.5 text-slate-400 hover:text-primary-500 hover:bg-primary-50 dark:hover:bg-primary-900/20 rounded-lg transition-colors\" title={t('details')}><Eye size={14} /></button>\n                                <button onClick={() => setEditingProduct(product)} className=\"p-1.5 text-slate-400 hover:text-amber-500 hover:bg-amber-50 dark:hover:bg-amber-900/20 rounded-lg transition-colors\" title={t('editProduct')}><Edit size={14} /></button>\n                                <button onClick={() => setDeletingIds([product.id])} className=\"p-1.5 text-slate-400 hover:text-rose-500 hover:bg-rose-50 dark:hover:bg-rose-900/20 rounded-lg transition-colors\" title={t('delete')}><Trash2 size={14} /></button>\n                            </div>\n                        </td>\n                    </tr>\n                );\n            })}\n            \n            {/* 描述性空状态 */}\n            {!isLoading && paginatedData.length === 0 && (\n                <tr>\n                    <td colSpan={visibleColumns.length + 2} className=\"py-24 text-center\">\n                        <div className=\"flex flex-col items-center justify-center gap-4 animate-in fade-in duration-500\">\n                             <div className=\"w-16 h-16 bg-slate-50 dark:bg-slate-800/50 rounded-full flex items-center justify-center border border-slate-100 dark:border-slate-800\">\n                                <AlertCircle size={32} className=\"text-slate-300\" />\n                             </div>\n                             <div>\n                                <p className=\"text-slate-500 font-bold\">未找到匹配项</p>\n                                <p className=\"text-xs text-slate-400 mt-1\">请尝试调整搜索词或分类过滤器以检索树脂数据。</p>\n                             </div>\n                        </div>\n                    </td>\n                </tr>\n            )}\n          </tbody>\n        </table>\n      </div>\n\n      {/* 分页页脚 */}\n      <div className=\"flex items-center justify-between px-4 py-3 border-t border-slate-200 dark:border-slate-800 bg-white/60 dark:bg-slate-900/60 backdrop-blur-sm shrink-0\">\n         <span className=\"text-xs text-slate-500 dark:text-slate-400 font-medium\">\n            {t('showing')} <span className=\"font-bold text-slate-800 dark:text-slate-200\">{paginatedData.length > 0 ? (currentPage - 1) * pageSize + 1 : 0}-{Math.min(currentPage * pageSize, sortedData.length)}</span> of <span className=\"font-bold text-slate-800 dark:text-slate-200\">{sortedData.length}</span>\n         </span>\n         <div className=\"flex items-center gap-2\">\n             <button \n                onClick={() => setCurrentPage(p => Math.max(1, p - 1))} \n                disabled={currentPage === 1}\n                className=\"p-1.5 rounded-lg border border-slate-200 dark:border-slate-700 text-slate-500 hover:bg-white dark:hover:bg-slate-800 disabled:opacity-50 disabled:cursor-not-allowed transition-all\"\n             >\n                <ChevronLeft size={16} />\n             </button>\n             <span className=\"text-xs font-bold text-slate-700 dark:text-slate-300 min-w-[3rem] text-center\">\n                {currentPage} / {totalPages || 1}\n             </span>\n             <button \n                onClick={() => setCurrentPage(p => Math.min(totalPages, p + 1))} \n                disabled={currentPage === totalPages || totalPages === 0}\n                className=\"p-1.5 rounded-lg border border-slate-200 dark:border-slate-700 text-slate-500 hover:bg-white dark:hover:bg-slate-800 disabled:opacity-50 disabled:cursor-not-allowed transition-all\"\n             >\n                <ChevronRight size={16} />\n             </button>\n         </div>\n      </div>\n\n      {/* 弹窗组件群 */}\n      <EditProductModal \n        isOpen={!!editingProduct} \n        onClose={() => setEditingProduct(null)} \n        product={editingProduct} \n        onSave={async (p) => { onUpdate(p); setEditingProduct(null); return true; }} \n      />\n      <DeleteConfirmationModal \n        isOpen={deletingIds.length > 0} \n        onClose={() => setDeletingIds([])} \n        onConfirm={() => { onDelete(deletingIds); setDeletingIds([]); handleSelectionChange(new Set()); }} \n        productNames={deletingIds.map(id => data.find(p => p.id === id)?.gradeName || 'Unknown')} \n      />\n      <BatchEditModal\n        isOpen={isBatchEditOpen}\n        onClose={() => setIsBatchEditOpen(false)}\n        selectedProducts={data.filter(p => selectedIds.has(p.id))}\n        onSave={(ids, updates) => { onBatchUpdate(ids, updates); handleSelectionChange(new Set()); }}\n      />\n      <ProductDetailDrawer \n        product={viewingProduct}\n        onClose={() => setViewingProduct(null)}\n        onCategoryClick={(id) => { onCategorySelect(id); setViewingProduct(null); }}\n      />\n      {isComparisonOpen && (\n          <ComparisonView \n              products={data.filter(p => selectedIds.has(p.id))}\n              onClose={() => setIsComparisonOpen(false)}\n              onRemoveProduct={(id) => toggleSelection(id)}\n          />\n      )}\n    </div>\n  );\n};\n"

'bg-emerald-950/80 text-emerald-100 border-emerald-800' :\n                t.type === 'error' ? 'bg-rose-950/80 text-rose-100 border-rose-800' :\n                'bg-slate-900/80 text-slate-100 border-slate-700'\n            }`}>\n                <CheckCircle2 size={16} className={t.type === 'success' ?
