JSON.parse(saved) : null;\n  });\n\n  const [toasts, setToasts] = useState<Toast[]>([]);\n  const addToast = useCallback((type: Toast['type'], message: string) => {\n      const id = Date.now().toString();\n      setToasts(prev => [...prev, { id, type, message }]);\n      setTimeout(() => setToasts(prev => prev.filter(t => t.id !== id)), 3000);\n  }, []);\n\n  const [allProducts, setAllProducts] = useState<Product[]>(MOCK_PRODUCTS);\n  const [selectedCategoryId, setSelectedCategoryId] = useState<string | null>(null);\n  const [searchQuery, setSearchQuery] = useState('');\n  const [columns, setColumns] = useState<ColumnConfig[]>([]);\n  const [isImportOpen, setIsImportOpen] = useState(false);\n  const [isProfileOpen, setIsProfileOpen] = useState(false);\n  const [isAdminOpen, setIsAdminOpen] = useState(false);\n  const [activeView, setActiveView] = useState<AppView>('dashboard');\n  const [isExporting, setIsExporting] = useState(false);\n\n  // Selection & Advanced Filter State\n  const [selectedIds, setSelectedIds] = useState<Set<string>>(new Set());\n  const [showFilters, setShowFilters] = useState(false);\n  const [numericFilters, setNumericFilters] = useState<Record<string, { min: string; max: string }>>({});\n\n  useEffect(() => {\n    setColumns(getDynamicColumns(allProducts));\n  }, []);\n\n  const filteredData = useMemo(() => {\n    return allProducts.filter(product => {\n      const matchesCategory = selectedCategoryId ? product.categoryIds.includes(selectedCategoryId) : true;\n      if (!matchesCategory) return false;\n      \n      const query = searchQuery.toLowerCase();\n      const matchesSearch = product.gradeName.toLowerCase().includes(query) || \n                            product.manufacturer.toLowerCase().includes(query) || \n                            Object.keys(product.properties).some(k => k.toLowerCase().includes(query));\n      if (!matchesSearch) return false;\n\n      // Apply Numeric Filters\n      return Object.entries(numericFilters).every(([key, range]) => {\n          const propVal = product.properties[key]?.value;\n          const num = typeof propVal === 'number' ? propVal : parseFloat(String(propVal));\n          if (isNaN(num)) return true; // Skip if non-numeric\n          const min = range.min === '' ? -Infinity : parseFloat(range.min);\n          const max = range.max === '' ? Infinity : parseFloat(range.max);\n          return num >= min && num <= max;\n      });\n    });\n  }, [allProducts, selectedCategoryId, searchQuery, numericFilters]);\n\n  const availableNumericProps = useMemo(() => {\n    const props = new Set<string>();\n    allProducts.forEach(p => {\n        Object.entries(p.properties).forEach(([k, v]) => {\n            if (typeof v.value === 'number') props.add(k);\n        });\n    });\n    return Array.from(props).sort();\n  }, [allProducts]);\n\n  const handleLogin = (user: User) => {\n    setCurrentUser(user);\n    localStorage.setItem('resindb-session', JSON.stringify(user));\n  };\n\n  const handleLogout = () => {\n    setCurrentUser(null);\n    localStorage.removeItem('resindb-session');\n  };\n\n  const handleToggleColumn = (key: string) => {\n    setColumns(cols => cols.map(c => c.key === key ? { ...c, visible: !c.visible } : c));\n  };\n\n  const handleExport = async () => {\n    setIsExporting(true);\n    await new Promise(r => setTimeout(r, 800));\n    addToast('success', '报告生成成功，已开始下载');\n    setIsExporting(false);\n  };\n\n  const handleBatchUpdate = (ids: string[], updates: any) => {\n      setAllProducts(prev => prev.map(p => ids.includes(p.id) ? { ...p, ...updates, updatedAt: new Date().toISOString().split('T')[0] } : p));\n      addToast('success', `批量更新了 ${ids.length} 条记录`);\n  };\n\n  const handleDelete = (ids: string[]) => {\n      setAllProducts(prev => prev.filter(p => !ids.includes(p.id)));\n      setSelectedIds(new Set());\n      addToast('success', `已删除 ${ids.length} 条记录`);\n  };\n\n  if (!currentUser) return <AuthScreen onLogin={handleLogin} />;\n\n  return (\n    <div className=\"flex h-screen bg-slate-50 dark:bg-slate-950 font-sans text-slate-900 dark:text-slate-100 overflow-hidden transition-colors duration-300\">\n      <ToastContainer toasts={toasts} removeToast={(id) => setToasts(prev => prev.filter(t => t.id !== id))} />\n\n      {/* Primary Sidebar */}\n      <nav className=\"w-16 md:w-20 bg-slate-900 dark:bg-slate-950 flex flex-col items-center py-6 gap-6 z-50 shrink-0 border-r border-white/5\">\n         <div className=\"w-10 h-10 bg-emerald-600 rounded-xl flex items-center justify-center shadow-lg shadow-emerald-900/40 mb-2 overflow-hidden relative group\">\n            <Beaker size={20} className=\"text-white group-hover:scale-110 transition-transform\" />\n         </div>\n         \n         <div className=\"flex-1 flex flex-col gap-5\">\n            {[\n                { id: 'dashboard', icon: LayoutDashboard, label: '仓库' },\n                { id: 'analytics', icon: PieChart, label: '可视化' },\n                { id: 'ai', icon: Bot, label: 'AI 空间' }\n            ].map((btn) => (\n                <button \n                    key={btn.id}\n                    onClick={() => setActiveView(btn.id as AppView)}\n                    className={`p-3 rounded-2xl transition-all duration-300 relative group ${activeView === btn.id ?       ))}\n        </div>\n    );\n};\n\nconst FormattedText: React.FC<{ text: string; className?: string }> = ({ text, className }) => {\n  if (!text) return null;\n  return (\n    <div </div>\n  );\n};\n\nexport const AIAssistant: React.FC<AIAssistantProps> = ({ contextData, inlineView = false }) => {\n  const [isOpen, setIsOpen] = useState(false);\n  const [isExpanded, JSON.parse(saved) : null;\n  });\n\n  const [toasts, setToasts] = useState<Toast[]>([]);\n  const addToast = useCallback((type: Toast['type'], message: string) => {\n      const id = Date.now().toString();\n      setToasts(prev => [...prev, { id, type, message }]);\n      setTimeout(() => setToasts(prev => prev.filter(t => t.id !== id)), 3000);\n  }, []);\n\n  const [allProducts, setAllProducts] = useState<Product[]>(MOCK_PRODUCTS);\n  const [selectedCategoryId, setSelectedCategoryId] = useState<string | null>(null);\n  const [searchQuery, setSearchQuery] = useState('');\n  const [columns, setColumns] = useState<ColumnConfig[]>([]);\n  const [isImportOpen, setIsImportOpen] = useState(false);\n  const [isProfileOpen, setIsProfileOpen] = useState(false);\n  const [isAdminOpen, setIsAdminOpen] = useState(false);\n  const [activeView, setActiveView] = useState<AppView>('dashboard');\n  const [isExporting, setIsExporting] = useState(false);\n\n  // Selection & Advanced Filter State\n  const [selectedIds, setSelectedIds] = useState<Set<string>>(new Set());\n  const [showFilters, setShowFilters] = useState(false);\n  const [numericFilters, setNumericFilters] = useState<Record<string, { min: string; max: string }>>({});\n\n  useEffect(() => {\n    setColumns(getDynamicColumns(allProducts));\n  }, []);\n\n  // Utility to resolve property key from search label\n  const resolvePropKey = (label: string): string | null => {\n      const cleanLabel = label.toLowerCase();\n      // Try direct match\n      const directMatch = columns.find(c => c.key.toLowerCase() === cleanLabel || tProp(c.label).toLowerCase() === cleanLabel);\n      if (directMatch) return directMatch.key;\n      \n      // Try propertyMap reverse lookup\n      const reverseKey = Object.keys(propertyMap).find(k => \n        k.toLowerCase() === cleanLabel || propertyMap[k].toLowerCase() === cleanLabel\n      );\n      return reverseKey || null;\n  };\n\n  const filteredData = useMemo(() => {\n    // 1. Parse Search Query into Text and Token Filters\n    const tokens = searchQuery.split(' ').filter(t => t.trim());\n    const textFilters: string[] = [];\n    const syntaxFilters: { key: string, condition: string }[] = [];\n\n    tokens.forEach(token => {\n        if (token.includes(':')) {\n            const [label, condition] = token.split(':');\n            const key = resolvePropKey(label);\n            if (key) syntaxFilters.push({ key, condition });\n            else textFilters.push(token); // Treat as text if label unknown\n        } else {\n            textFilters.push(token);\n        }\n    });\n\n    return allProducts.filter(product => {\n      // 2. Category Filter\n      const matchesCategory = selectedCategoryId ? product.categoryIds.includes(selectedCategoryId) : true;\n      if (!matchesCategory) return false;\n      \n      // 3. Text Search (Matches grade, manufacturer or property keys)\n      const matchesText = textFilters.every(query => {\n          const lQuery = query.toLowerCase();\n          return product.gradeName.toLowerCase().includes(lQuery) || \n                 product.manufacturer.toLowerCase().includes(lQuery) || \n                 Object.keys(product.properties).some(k => k.toLowerCase().includes(lQuery));\n      });\n      if (!matchesText) return false;\n\n      // 4. Syntax Filters from Search Bar (e.g., density:>0.95)\n      const matchesSyntax = syntaxFilters.every(f => {\n          const propVal = product.properties[f.key]?.value;\n          const val = typeof propVal === 'number' ? propVal : parseFloat(String(propVal));\n          const cond = f.condition;\n\n          if (isNaN(val)) return String(propVal).toLowerCase().includes(cond.toLowerCase());\n\n          if (cond.startsWith('>')) return val > parseFloat(cond.slice(1));\n          if (cond.startsWith('<')) return val < parseFloat(cond.slice(1));\n          if (cond.includes('-')) {\n              const [min, max] = cond.split('-').map(Number);\n              return val >= min && val <= max;\n          }\n          return val === parseFloat(cond);\n      });\n      if (!matchesSyntax) return false;\n\n      // 5. Explicit Sidebar Hub Filters\n      return Object.entries(numericFilters).every(([key, range]) => {\n          const propVal = product.properties[key]?.value;\n          const num = typeof propVal === 'number' ? propVal : parseFloat(String(propVal));\n          if (isNaN(num)) return true;\n          const min = range.min === '' ? -Infinity : parseFloat(range.min);\n          const max = range.max === '' ? Infinity : parseFloat(range.max);\n          return num >= min && num <= max;\n      });\n    });\n  }, [allProducts, selectedCategoryId, searchQuery, numericFilters, columns, tProp]);\n\n  const availableNumericProps = useMemo(() => {\n    const props = new Set<string>();\n    allProducts.forEach(p => {\n        Object.entries(p.properties).forEach(([k, v]) => {\n            if (typeof v.value === 'number') props.add(k);\n        });\n    });\n    return Array.from(props).sort();\n  }, [allProducts]);\n\n  const handleLogin = (user: User) => {\n    setCurrentUser(user);\n 'bg-emerald-950/80 text-emerald-100 border-emerald-800' :\n                t.type === 'error' ? 'bg-rose-950/80 text-rose-100 border-rose-800' :\n                'bg-slate-900/80 text-slate-100 border-slate-700'\n            }`}>\n                <CheckCircle2 size={16} className={t.type === 'success' ? \"text-emerald-400\" : \"hidden\"} />\n                <AlertCircle size={16} className={t.type === 'error' ? \"text-rose-400\" : \"hidden\"} />\n                <span className=\"text-xs font-bold tracking-wide\">{t.message}</span>\n                <button onClick={() => removeToast(t.id)} className=\"ml-2 hover:bg-white/10 p-1 rounded-full transition-colors\"><X size={12} /></button>\n            </div>\n        ))}\n    </div>\n);\n\nconst getDynamicColumns = (products: Product[]): ColumnConfig[] => {\n  const propertyKeys = new Set<string>();\n  products.forEach(p => {\n    Object.keys(p.properties).forEach(k => propertyKeys.add(k));\n  });\n\n  const defaultVisible = ['密度', '熔体质量流动速率', '拉伸屈服应力', '弯曲模量', '悬臂梁缺口冲击强度', '典型应用'];\n\n  const dynamicCols: ColumnConfig[] = Array.from(propertyKeys).map(key => ({\n    key, label: key, visible: defaultVisible.includes(key), isSystem: false\n  })).sort((a, b) => {\n      const aIsLikelyImportant = defaultVisible.includes(a.key);\n      const bIsLikelyImportant = defaultVisible.includes(b.key);\n      if (aIsLikelyImportant && !bIsLikelyImportant) return -1;\n      if (!aIsLikelyImportant && bIsLikelyImportant) return 1;\n      return a.label.localeCompare(b.label);\n  });\n\n  const systemCols: ColumnConfig[] = [\n    { key: 'gradeName', label: '牌号', visible: true, isSystem: true },\n    { key: 'manufacturer', label: '所属分类', visible: true, isSystem: true },\n    { key: 'updatedAt', label: '更新时间', visible: false, isSystem: false },\n  ];\n\n  return [...systemCols, ...dynamicCols];\n};\n\ntype AppView = 'dashboard' | 'analytics' | 'ai';\n\nconst AppContent: React.FC = () => {\n  const { t, tProp } = useLanguage();\n  const [currentUser, setCurrentUser] = useState<User | null>(() => {\n    const saved = localStorage.getItem('resindb-session');\n    return saved ? JSON.parse(saved) : null;\n  });\n\n  const [toasts, setToasts] = useState<Toast[]>([]);\n  const addToast = useCallback((type: Toast['type'], message: string) => {\n      const id = Date.now().toString();\n      setToasts(prev => [...prev, { id, type, message }]);\n      setTimeout(() => setToasts(prev => prev.filter(t => t.id !== id)), 3000);\n  }, []);\n\n  const [allProducts, setAllProducts] = useState<Product[]>(MOCK_PRODUCTS);\n  const [selectedCategoryId, setSelectedCategoryId] = useState<string | null>(null);\n  const [searchQuery, setSearchQuery] = useState('');\n  const [columns, setColumns] = useState<ColumnConfig[]>([]);\n  const [isImportOpen, setIsImportOpen] = useState(false);\n  const [isProfileOpen, setIsProfileOpen] = useState(false);\n  const [isAdminOpen, setIsAdminOpen] = useState(false);\n  const [activeView, setActiveView] = useState<AppView>('dashboard');\n  const [isExporting, setIsExporting] = useState(false);\n\n  // Selection & Advanced Filter State\n  const [selectedIds, setSelectedIds] = useState<Set<string>>(new Set());\n  const [showFilters, setShowFilters] = useState(false);\n  const [numericFilters, setNumericFilters] = useState<Record<string, { min: string; max: string }>>({});\n\n  useEffect(() => {\n    setColumns(getDynamicColumns(allProducts));\n  }, []);\n\n  // Utility to resolve property key from search label\n  const resolvePropKey = useCallback((label: string): string | null => {\n      const cleanLabel = label.toLowerCase();\n      \n      // 1. Direct match with standard properties (CN/EN)\n      const directMatch = columns.find(c => \n        c.key.toLowerCase() === cleanLabel || \n        tProp(c.label).toLowerCase() === cleanLabel\n      );\n      if (directMatch) return directMatch.key;\n      \n      // 2. Lookup in propertyMap (including aliases)\n      const reverseKey = Object.keys(propertyMap).find(k => \n        k.toLowerCase() === cleanLabel || \n        propertyMap[k].toLowerCase() === cleanLabel\n      );\n      if (reverseKey) return reverseKey;\n\n      // 3. Common technical aliases\n      const commonAliases: Record<string, string> = {\n          'mfr': '熔体质量流动速率',\n          '熔指': '熔体质量流动速率',\n          'mfi': '熔体质量流动速率',\n          '密度': '密度',\n          'density': '密度',\n          '屈服': '拉伸屈服应力',\n          'impact': '悬臂梁缺口冲击强度',\n          '冲击': '悬臂梁缺口冲击强度',\n          '模量': '弯曲模量',\n          'modulus': '弯曲模量'\n      };\n      \n      return commonAliases[cleanLabel] || null;\n  }, [columns, tProp]);\n\n  const filteredData = useMemo(() => {\n    // Advanced Query Parser using Regex\n    // Pattern: (Property Name):(Operator/Value)\n    // Operators: >, <, >=, <=, min-max\n    const syntaxRegex = /([\\u4e00-\\u9fa5\\w]+):([<>]=?|[-.0-9a-zA-Z]+)/g;\n    const syntaxFilters: { key: string, operator: string, value: string | number, max?: number }[] = [];\n    \n    let processedQuery = searchQuery;\n    let match;\n    \n    // Extract syntax filters and clean the query for text search\n    while ((match = syntaxRegex.exec(searchQuery)) !== null) {\n        const [full, label, condition] = match;\n        const key = resolvePropKey(label);\n        \n        if (key) {\n            processedQuery = processedQuery.replace(full, '');\n            \n            // Handle range: \"100-200\"\n            if (condition.includes('-') && !condition.startsWith('-')) {\n                const parts = condition.split('-');\n                syntaxFilters.push({ \n                    key, \n                    operator: 'range', \n                    value: parseFloat(parts[0]), \n                    max: parseFloat(parts[1]) \n                });\n            } \n            // Handle operators: \">10\", \"<5\", \">=2\"\n            else if (condition.match(/^[<>]=?/)) {\n                const op = condition.match(/^[<>]=?/)?.[0] || '';\n                const val = parseFloat(condition.replace(op, ''));\n                syntaxFilters.push({ key, operator: op, value: val });\n            } \n            // Handle equality or text search within property: \"grade:5000S\"\n            else {\n                const numVal = parseFloat(condition);\n                syntaxFilters.push({ \n                    key, \n                    operator: '=', \n                    value: isNaN(numVal) ? condition : numVal \n                });\n            }\n        }\n    }\n\n    const textKeywords = processedQuery.toLowerCase().split(' ').filter(k => k.trim());\n\n    return allProducts.filter(product => {\n      // 1. Category Filter\n      const matchesCategory = selectedCategoryId ? product.categoryIds.includes(selectedCategoryId) : true;\n      if (!matchesCategory) return false;\n      \n      // 2. Keyword Text Search\n      const matchesText = textKeywords.every(query => {\n          return product.gradeName.toLowerCase().includes(query) || \n                 product.manufacturer.toLowerCase().includes(query) || \n                 Object.keys(product.properties).some(k => k.toLowerCase().includes(query));\n      });\n      if (!matchesText) return false;\n\n      // 3. Advanced Syntax Filters (Smart Range/Operator Search)\n      const matchesSyntax = syntaxFilters.every(f => {\n          const propVal = product.properties[f.key]?.value;\n          const val = typeof propVal === 'number' ? propVal : parseFloat(String(propVal));\n          \n          // Non-numeric handling\n          if (isNaN(val) || typeof f.value === 'string') {\n              return String(propVal).toLowerCase().includes(String(f.value).toLowerCase());\n          }\n\n          // Numeric handling\n          switch(f.operator) {\n              case '>': return val > (f.value as number);\n              case '<': return val < (f.value as number);\n              case '>=': return val >= (f.value as number);\n              case '<=': return val <= (f.value as number);\n              case 'range': return val >= (f.value as number) && val <= (f.max || Infinity);\n              case '=': return val === (f.value as number);\n              default: return true;\n          }\n      });\n      if (!matchesSyntax) return false;\n\n      // 4. Sidebar Hub UI Filters (Manual Input)\n      return Object.entries(numericFilters).every(([key, range]) => {\n          const propVal = product.properties[key]?.value;\n          const num = typeof propVal === 'number' ? propVal : parseFloat(String(propVal));\n          if (isNaN(num)) return true;\n          const min = range.min === '' ? -Infinity : parseFloat(range.min);\n          const max = range.max === '' ? Infinity : parseFloat(range.max);\n          return num >= min && num <= max;\n      });\n    });\n  }, [allProducts, selectedCategoryId, searchQuery, numericFilters, resolvePropKey]);\n\n  const availableNumericProps = useMemo(() => {\n    const props = new Set<string>();\n    allProducts.forEach(p => {\n        Object.entries(p.properties).forEach(([k, v]) => {\n            if (typeof v.value === 'number') props.add(k);\n        });\n    });\n    return Array.from(props).sort();\n  }, [allProducts]);\n\n  const handleLogin = (user: User) => {\n    setCurrentUser(user);\n } from 'react';\nimport { Send, Image as ImageIcon, Sparkles, X, Loader2, BrainCircuit, Bot, User, ScanEye, Trash2, Maximize2, Minimize2, ShieldCheck, PieChart, BarChart3, TrendingUp, Search, Database, ChevronRight, Zap } from 'lucide-react';\nimport { Product } from '../types';\nimport { useLanguage } from '../contexts/LanguageContext';\nimport { useTheme } from '../contexts/ThemeContext';\n\ninterface AIAssistantProps {\n  contextData: Product[];\n  inlineView?: boolean;\n  onNavigateToChart?: (chartType: string) => void;\n  onGradeClick?: (gradeName: string) => void;\n}\n\ninterface Message {\n  id: string;\n  role: 'user' | 'model';\n  text: string;\n  image?: string;\n}\n\nconst ChartSuggestion: React.FC<{ type: string, onClick: () => void }> = ({ type, onClick }) => {\n    const { t } = useLanguage();\n    return (\n        <button \n            onClick={onClick}\n            className=\"flex items-center gap-2 px-3 py-1.5 bg-primary-50 dark:bg-primary-900/20 text-primary-600 dark:text-primary-400 rounded-lg border border-primary-200 dark:border-primary-800 hover:bg-primary-100 transition-all text-[10px] font-bold uppercase tracking-wider group\"\n        >\n            <TrendingUp size={12} className=\"group-hover:translate-y-[-1px] transition-transform\" />\n            查看{type}分析\n        </button>\n    );\n};\n\nconst FormattedText: React.FC<{ \n    text: string; \n    onNavigateToChart?: (type: string) => void;\n    onGradeClick?: (name: string) => void;\n    className?: string \n}> = ({ text, onNavigateToChart, onGradeClick, className }) => {\n  if (!text) return null;\n\n  return (\n    <div className={className}>\n      {text.split('\\n').map((line, i) => {\n        const trimmed = line.trim();\n        if (trimmed.startsWith('- ') || trimmed.startsWith('* ') || trimmed.match(/^\\d+\\./)) {\n             const cleanLine = trimmed.replace(/^[-*]\\s+|\\d+\\.\\s+/, '');\n             const parts = cleanLine.split(/(\\*\\*.*?\\*\\*)/g);\n             return (\n                <div key={i} className=\"flex gap-2.5 ml-1 mb-1.5 items-start\">\n                    <span className=\"text-emerald-500 dark:text-emerald-400 mt-1.5 shrink-0 text-[10px]\">•</span>\n                    <span className=\"leading-relaxed text-sm\">\n                        {parts.map((part, j) => {\n                            if (part.startsWith('**') && part.endsWith('**')) {\n                                const grade = part.slice(2, -2);\n                                return <strong key={j} onClick={() => onGradeClick?.(grade)} className=\"font-bold text-slate-800 dark:text-white hover:text-primary-600 hover:underline cursor-pointer transition-colors\">{grade}</strong>;\n                            }\n                            return <span key={j}>{part}</span>;\n                        })}\n                    </span>\n                </div>\n             );\n        }\n\n        const parts = line.split(/(\\*\\*.*?\\*\\*)/g);\n        if (line.startsWith('##')) {\n             return <h3 key={i} className=\"font-bold text-emerald-700 dark:text-emerald-400 mt-5 mb-2 text-base border-l-2 border-emerald-500 pl-3\">{line.replace(/#/g, '')}</h3>\n        }\n\n        if (!trimmed) return <div key={i} className=\"h-4\"></div>;\n\n        return (\n          <p key={i} className=\"mb-2 last:mb-0 leading-relaxed text-sm\">\n            {parts.map((part, j) => {\n              if (part.startsWith('**') && part.endsWith('**')) {\n                const grade = part.slice(2, -2);\n                return <strong key={j} onClick={() => onGradeClick?.(grade)} className=\"font-bold text-slate-800 dark:text-white hover:text-primary-600 hover:underline cursor-pointer transition-colors\">{grade}</strong>;\n              }\n              return <span key={j}>{part}</span>;\n            })}\n          </p>\n        );\n      })}\n      \n      {/* Dynamic Chart Triggers */}\n      <div className=\"flex flex-wrap gap-2 mt-4 pt-4 border-t border-slate-100 dark:border-slate-800\">\n          {(text.includes('Ashby') || text.includes('散点') || text.includes('构效')) && (\n              <ChartSuggestion type=\"Ashby\" onClick={() => onNavigateToChart?.('ashby')} />\n          )}\n          {(text.includes('Radar') || text.includes('雷达') || text.includes('指纹')) && (\n              <ChartSuggestion type=\"Radar\" onClick={() => onNavigateToChart?.('radar')} />\n          )}\n          {(text.includes('GPC') || text.includes('分布')) && (\n              <ChartSuggestion type=\"GPC\" onClick={() => onNavigateToChart?.('gpc')} />\n          )}\n      </div>\n    </div>\n  );\n};\n\nexport const AIAssistant: React.FC<AIAssistantProps> = ({ contextData, inlineView = false, onNavigateToChart, onGradeClick }) => {\n  const [isOpen, setIsOpen] = useState(false);\n  const [isExpanded, setIsExpanded] = useState(false);\n  const [input, setInput] = useState('');\n  const { t, language } = useLanguage();\n  const [messages, setMessages] = useState<Message[]>([]);\n  const [isLoading, setIsLoading] = useState(false);\n  const [useThinking, setUseThinking] = useState(true); // Default to on for lab context\n  const [attachedImage, setAttachedImage] = useState<string | null>(null);\n  \n  const messagesEndRef = useRef<HTMLDivElement>(null);\n  const fileInputRef = useRef<HTMLInputElement>(null);\n  const chatContainerRef = useRef<HTMLDivElement>(null);\n\n  useEffect(() => {\n    if (messages.length === 0) {\n        setMessages([{ \n            id: 'welcome', \n            role: 'model', \n            text: t('welcomeMessage') \n        }]);\n    }\n  }, [t]);\n\n  useEffect(() => {\n    messagesEndRef.current?.scrollIntoView({ behavior: 'smooth' });\n  }, [messages, isLoading, isOpen]);\n\n  const handleSendMessage = async (customInput?: string) => {\n    const textToSend = customInput || input;\n    if ((!textToSend.trim() && !attachedImage) || isLoading) return;\n\n    const userMsg: Message = {\n      id: Date.now().toString(),\n      role: 'user',\n      text: textToSend,\n      image: attachedImage || undefined\n    };\n\n    setMessages(prev => [...prev, userMsg]);\n    setInput('');\n    setAttachedImage(null);\n    setIsLoading(true);\n\n    try {\n      const ai = new GoogleGenAI({ apiKey: process.env.API_KEY });\n      \n      const parts: any[] = [];\n      let systemInstruction = \"You are ResinAI. A senior materials scientist at PetroChina Research Institute. Your goal is to analyze data specifically and precisely. When you mention a grade name, wrap it in **double asterisks** like **HDPE 5000S**. Suggest using specific charts if appropriate (Ashby, Radar, GPC).\";\n\n      if (userMsg.image) {\n         const base64Data = userMsg.image.split(',')[1];\n         const mimeType = userMsg.image.split(';')[0].split(':')[1] || 'image/jpeg';\n         parts.push({ inlineData: { mimeType, data: base64Data } });\n         systemInstruction += \"\\nYou are now focused on image-based QC analysis. Look for defects like specks or gels.\";\n         parts.push({ text: userMsg.text || \"Analyze this resin sample.\" });\n      } else {\n         parts.push({ text: userMsg.text });\n         if (contextData.length > 0) {\n            const contextStr = JSON.stringify(contextData.slice(0, 20).map(p => ({\n                grade: p.gradeName,\n                manufacturer: p.manufacturer,\n                mfr: p.properties['熔体质量流动速率']?.value,\n                density: p.properties['密度']?.value,\n                flex: p.properties['弯曲模量']?.value,\n                impact: p.properties['悬臂梁缺口冲击强度']?.value,\n                app: p.properties['典型应用']?.value\n            })));\n            parts.push({ text: `\\n[Experimental Context - Selected Records]: ${contextStr}` });\n         }\n      }\n\n      const response = await ai.models.generateContent({\n        model: 'gemini-3-flash-preview',\n        contents: [{ role: 'user', parts: parts }],\n        config: {\n            systemInstruction: systemInstruction,\n            thinkingConfig: useThinking ? { thinkingBudget: 2048 } : undefined,\n        }\n      });\n\n      setMessages(prev => [...prev, {\n        id: Date.now().toString(),\n        role: 'model',\n        text: response.text || \"Analysis result empty.\"\n      }]);\n\n    } catch (error) {\n      console.error(\"AI Error:\", error);\n      setMessages(prev => [...prev, {\n        id: Date.now().toString(),\n        role: 'model',\n        text: \"## 连接异常\\nResinAI 暂时无法访问中心计算节点。请检查网络状态或系统授权。\"\n      }]);\n    } finally {\n      setIsLoading(false);\n    }\n  };\n\n  const renderInput = () => (\n    <div className=\"flex items-end gap-2 bg-slate-100 dark:bg-slate-800/50 p-2 rounded-[2rem] border border-slate-200 dark:border-slate-700 focus-within:ring-4 focus-within:ring-primary-500/10 focus-within:border-primary-500 transition-all shadow-inner\">\n        <input type=\"file\" ref={fileInputRef} accept=\"image/*\" className=\"hidden\" onChange={(e) => {\n            const f = e.target.files?.[0];\n            if(f){ const r = new FileReader(); r.onloadend = () => setAttachedImage(r.result as string); r.readAsDataURL(f); }\n        }} />\n        <button \n            onClick={() => fileInputRef.current?.click()} \n            className={`p-3 rounded-2xl transition-all shrink-0 ${attachedImage ? 'text-emerald-600 bg-emerald-100 dark:bg-emerald-900/30' : 'text-slate-400 hover:text-primary-600 hover:bg-white dark:hover:bg-slate-800'}`}\n        >\n            <ImageIcon size={22} />\n        </button>\n        <textarea\n            value={input} onChange={(e) => setInput(e.target.value)}\n            onKeyDown={(e) => { if(e.key === 'Enter' && !e.shiftKey) { e.preventDefault(); handleSendMessage(); }}}\n            placeholder={t('aiPlaceholder')}\n            className=\"w-full max-h-48 min-h-[44px] py-3 bg-transparent text-sm text-slate-800 dark:text-slate-200 outline-none resize-none leading-relaxed\"\n            rows={1}\n        />\n        <div className=\"flex items-center gap-2 self-center pr-1\">\n            <button \n                onClick={() => setUseThinking(!useThinking)}\n                className={`p-3 rounded-2xl transition-all ${useThinking ? 'text-indigo-600 bg-indigo-100 dark:bg-indigo-900/30' : 'text-slate-400 hover:text-primary-600'}`}\n                title=\"深度逻辑引擎\"\n            >\n                <BrainCircuit size={22} />\n            </button>\n            <button \n                onClick={() => handleSendMessage()} \n                disabled={isLoading || (!input.trim() && !attachedImage)} \n                className=\"p-3 bg-slate-900 dark:bg-primary-600 hover:bg-primary-700 disabled:opacity-20 text-white rounded-2xl shadow-xl transition-all active:scale-95 flex items-center justify-center shrink-0\"\n            >\n                {isLoading ? <Loader2 size={22} className=\"animate-spin\" /> : <Send size={22} />}\n            </button>\n        </div>\n    </div>\n  );\n\n  if (inlineView) {\n      return (\n          <div className=\"flex flex-col h-full w-full bg-slate-50/30 dark:bg-transparent\">\n              <div className=\"flex-1 overflow-y-auto p-6 space-y-10 custom-scrollbar\" ref={chatContainerRef}>\n                <div className=\"max-w-4xl mx-auto space-y-8\">\n                  {messages.map(m => (\n                      <div key={m.id} className={`flex ${m.role === 'user' ? 'justify-end' : 'justify-start'} animate-in fade-in slide-in-from-bottom-2`}>\n                         <div className={`flex gap-4 max-w-[90%] ${m.role === 'user' ? v : parseFloat(String(v)) || 0;\n        });\n\n        myChart.setOption({\n            radar: {\n                indicator: props.map(p => ({ name: tProp(p).slice(0,6), max: 100 })), \n                shape: 'circle', splitNumber: 3, axisName: { fontSize: 8, color: '#94a3b8' }\n            },\n            series: [{ type: 'radar', data: [{ value: values, areaStyle: { color: 'rgba(79, 70, 229, 0.3)' }, lineStyle: { color: '#4f46e5' } }], symbol: 'none' }]\n        });\n        return () => myChart.dispose();\n    }, [product, tProp]);\n\n    const rect = anchorRef.current?.getBoundingClientRect();\n    if (!rect) return null;\n\n    return (\n        <div className=\"fixed z-[100] w-48 h-48 bg-white dark:bg-slate-900 rounded-2xl shadow-2xl border border-primary-500/20 p-2 animate-in fade-in zoom-in-95 pointer-events-none\" \n             style={{ left: rect.left + 40, top: rect.top - 60 }}>\n            <div ref={chartRef} className=\"w-full h-full\" />\n        </div>\n    );\n};\n\nconst renderCellContent = (val: any, unit?: string): React.ReactNode => {\n    if (val === null || val === undefined || val === '') {\n        return <span className=\"text-slate-300 dark:text-slate-700 font-mono\">-</span>;\n    }\n    \n    if (typeof val === 'number') {\n        return (\n            <div className=\"flex items-baseline gap-1\">\n                <span className=\"font-mono font-bold text-primary-600 dark:text-primary-400 tracking-tight\">{val}</span>\n                {unit && <span className=\"text-[9px] font-black text-slate-400 uppercase tracking-tighter\">{unit}</span>}\n            </div>\n        );\n    }\n    \n    const displayStr = typeof val === 'object' ? JSON.stringify(val) : String(val);\n    return <span className=\"text-slate-700 dark:text-slate-300 font-medium truncate max-w-[200px]\">{displayStr}</span>;\n};\n\nexport const DataGrid: React.FC<DataGridProps> = ({ \n    data = [], \n    columns = [], \n    isLoading, \n    onDelete, \n    onUpdate, \n    onBatchUpdate, \n    onCategorySelect, \n    selectedIds = new Set(), \n    onSelectionChange \n}) => {\n  const { t, tProp } = useLanguage();\n  const visibleColumns = useMemo(() => (columns || []).filter((c) => c.visible), [columns]);\n  const [sortConfig, setSortConfig] = useState<SortConfig | null>(null);\n  const [editingProduct, setEditingProduct] = useState<Product | null>(null);\n  const [deletingIds, setDeletingIds] = useState<string[]>([]);\n  const [viewingProduct, setViewingProduct] = useState<Product | null>(null);\n  const [hoveredProduct, setHoveredProduct] = useState<Product | null>(null);\n  const radarAnchorRef = useRef<HTMLDivElement>(null);\n\n  const [currentPage, setCurrentPage] = useState(1);\n  const pageSize = 15;\n\n  const sortedData = useMemo(() => {\n    if (!data) return [];\n    if (!sortConfig) return data;\n\n    const { key, direction } = sortConfig;\n\n    return [...data].sort((a, b) => {\n      // 1. Extract values based on whether key is a system field or a dynamic property\n      let aVal: string | number | undefined;\n      let bVal: string | number | undefined;\n\n      if (key === 'gradeName' || key === 'manufacturer' || key === 'updatedAt') {\n          aVal = (a as any)[key];\n          bVal = (b as any)[key];\n      } else {\n          aVal = a.properties?.[key]?.value;\n          bVal = b.properties?.[key]?.value;\n      }\n\n      // 2. Handle nulls/undefined for consistent sorting\n      const aRaw = aVal ?? '';\n      const bRaw = bVal ?? '';\n\n      // 3. Intelligent Comparison (Numerical vs String)\n      const aNum = typeof aRaw === 'number' ? aRaw : parseFloat(String(aRaw));\n      const bNum = typeof bRaw === 'number' ? bRaw : parseFloat(String(bRaw));\n\n      if (!isNaN(aNum) && !isNaN(bNum)) {\n          return direction === 'asc' ? aNum - bNum : bNum - aNum;\n      }\n\n      // Default to locale-aware string comparison\n      return direction === 'asc' \n        ? String(aRaw).localeCompare(String(bRaw)) \n        : String(bRaw).localeCompare(String(aRaw));\n    });\n  }, [data, sortConfig]);\n\n  const paginatedData = useMemo(() => {\n    const start = (currentPage - 1) * pageSize;\n    return sortedData.slice(start, start + pageSize);\n  }, [sortedData, currentPage]);\n\n  const totalPages = Math.ceil(sortedData.length / pageSize);\n\n   const next = new Set(selectedIds);\n    if (next.has(id)) next.delete(id); else next.add(id);\n    onSelectionChange(next);\n  };\n\n  const toggleAllSelection = () => {\n    if (selectedIds.size === paginatedData.length && paginatedData.length > 0) {\n        onSelectionChange(new Set());\n    } else {\n        onSelectionChange(new Set(paginatedData.map(p => p.id)));\n    }\n  };\n\n  if mb-2\">未找到匹配结果</h3>\n              <p className=\"text-sm text-slate-500\">尝试调整过滤条件或搜索关键词。</p>\n          </div>\n      );\n  }\n\n  return (\n    <div className=\"h-full flex flex-col relative paginatedData.length \n                        ? <CheckSquare size={18} className=\"text-primary-600\" /> \n                        : <Square size={18} />}\n                </button>\n  className={`px-4 py-4 font-black text-[10px] uppercase tracking-[0.15em] border-b border-slate-100 dark:border-slate-800 cursor-pointer transition-all hover:text-primary-600 group/head ${isSorted ? 'text-primary-600 dark:text-primary-400 bg-primary-50/20 dark:bg-primary-900/10' : 'text-slate-400'}`} \n                      onClick={() => setSortConfig({ key: col.key, direction: isSorted && sortConfig.direction === 'asc' ? 'desc' : 'asc' })}>\n                    <div className=\"flex items-center gap-1.5\">\n                      {tProp(col.label)}\n                      <span className={`transition-all duration-300 ${isSorted ? 'opacity-100 translate-y-0' : 'opacity-0 translate-y-1 group-hover/head:opacity-40 group-hover/head:translate-y-0'}`}>\n                          {isSorted && sortConfig.direction === 'desc' ? <ArrowDown size={12} /> : <ArrowUp size={12} />}\n                      </span>\n                    </div>\n                  </th>\n                );\n              })}\n              <th className=\"px-4 py-4 border-b border-slate-100 dark:border-slate-800 text-right w-24 font-black text-[10px] text-slate-400 uppercase tracking-widest\">操作</th>\n            </tr>\n          </thead>\n          <tbody className=\"divide-y divide-slate-50 dark:divide-slate-900\">\n            {paginatedData.map((p) => (\n                <tr key={p.id} \n                    className={`group transition-all duration-200 cursor-pointer ${selectedIds.has(p.id) ? v : parseFloat(String(v)) || 0;\n        });\n\n        myChart.setOption({\n            radar: {\n                indicator: props.map(p => ({ name: tProp(p).slice(0,6), max: 100 })), \n                shape: 'circle', splitNumber: 3, axisName: { fontSize: 8, color: '#94a3b8' }\n            },\n            series: [{ type: 'radar', data: [{ value: values, areaStyle: { color: 'rgba(79, 70, 229, 0.3)' }, lineStyle: { color: '#4f46e5' } }], symbol: 'none' }]\n        });\n        return () => myChart.dispose();\n    }, [product, tProp]);\n\n    const rect = anchorRef.current?.getBoundingClientRect();\n    if (!rect) return null;\n\n    return (\n        <div className=\"fixed z-[100] w-48 h-48 bg-white dark:bg-slate-900 rounded-2xl shadow-2xl border border-primary-500/20 p-2 animate-in fade-in zoom-in-95 pointer-events-none\" \n             style={{ left: rect.left + 40, top: rect.top - 60 }}>\n            <div ref={chartRef} className=\"w-full h-full\" />\n        </div>\n    );\n};\n\nconst renderCellContent = (val: any, unit?: string, compactMode?: boolean): React.ReactNode => {\n    if (val === null || val === undefined || val === '') {\n        return <span className=\"text-slate-300 dark:text-slate-700 font-mono\">-</span>;\n    }\n    \n    if (typeof val === 'number') {\n        return (\n            <div className={`flex items-baseline gap-1 ${compactMode ? 'text-[11px]' : 'text-sm'}`}>\n                <span className=\"font-mono font-bold text-primary-600 dark:text-primary-400 tracking-tight\">{val}</span>\n                {unit && <span className={`${compactMode ? 'text-[8px]' : 'text-[9px]'} font-black text-slate-400 uppercase tracking-tighter`}>{unit}</span>}\n            </div>\n        );\n    }\n    \n    const displayStr = typeof val === 'object' ? JSON.stringify(val) : String(val);\n    return <span className={`${compactMode ? 'text-[11px]' : 'text-sm'} text-slate-700 dark:text-slate-300 font-medium truncate max-w-[200px]`}>{displayStr}</span>;\n};\n\nexport const DataGrid: React.FC<DataGridProps> = ({ \n    data = [], \n    columns = [], \n    isLoading, \n    onDelete, \n    onUpdate, \n    onBatchUpdate, \n    onCategorySelect, \n    selectedIds = new Set(), \n    onSelectionChange,\n    compactMode = false\n}) => {\n  const { t, tProp } = useLanguage();\n  const visibleColumns = useMemo(() => (columns || []).filter((c) => c.visible), [columns]);\n  const [sortConfig, setSortConfig] = useState<SortConfig | null>(null);\n  const [editingProduct, setEditingProduct] = useState<Product | null>(null);\n  const [deletingIds, setDeletingIds] = useState<string[]>([]);\n  const [viewingProduct, setViewingProduct] = useState<Product | null>(null);\n  const [hoveredProduct, setHoveredProduct] = useState<Product | null>(null);\n  const radarAnchorRef = useRef<HTMLDivElement>(null);\n\n  const [currentPage, setCurrentPage] = useState(1);\n  const pageSize = compactMode ? 25 : 15;\n\n  const sortedData = useMemo(() => {\n    if (!data) return [];\n    if (!sortConfig) return data;\n\n    const { key, direction } = sortConfig;\n\n    return [...data].sort((a, b) => {\n      let aVal: string | number | undefined;\n      let bVal: string | number | undefined;\n\n      if (key === 'gradeName' || key === 'manufacturer' || key === 'updatedAt') {\n          aVal = (a as any)[key];\n          bVal = (b as any)[key];\n      } else {\n          aVal = a.properties?.[key]?.value;\n          bVal = b.properties?.[key]?.value;\n      }\n\n      const aRaw = aVal ?? '';\n      const bRaw = bVal ?? '';\n\n      const aNum = typeof aRaw === 'number' ? aRaw : parseFloat(String(aRaw));\n      const bNum = typeof bRaw === 'number' ? bRaw : parseFloat(String(bRaw));\n\n      if (!isNaN(aNum) && !isNaN(bNum)) {\n          return direction === 'asc' ? aNum - bNum : bNum - aNum;\n      }\n\n      return direction === 'asc' \n        ? String(aRaw).localeCompare(String(bRaw)) \n        : String(bRaw).localeCompare(String(aRaw));\n    });\n  }, [data, sortConfig]);\n\n  const paginatedData = useMemo(() => {\n    const start = (currentPage - 1) * pageSize;\n    return sortedData.slice(start, start + pageSize);\n  }, [sortedData, currentPage, pageSize]);\n\n  const totalPages = Math.ceil(sortedData.length / pageSize);\n\n  useEffect(() => {\n    if (currentPage > totalPages && totalPages > 0) {\n        setCurrentPage(totalPages);\n    }\n  }, [totalPages, currentPage]);\n\n  const toggleSelection = (id: string) => {\n    const next = new Set(selectedIds);\n    if (next.has(id)) next.delete(id); else next.add(id);\n    onSelectionChange(next);\n  };\n\n  const toggleAllSelection = () => {\n    if (selectedIds.size === paginatedData.length && paginatedData.length > 0) {\n        onSelectionChange(new Set());\n    } else {\n        onSelectionChange(new Set(paginatedData.map(p => p.id)));\n    }\n  };\n\n  if (isLoading) {\n    return <div className=\"h-full flex items-center justify-center\"><Loader2 className=\"animate-spin text-primary-600\" size={32} /></div>;\n  }\n\n  if (data.length === 0) {\n      return (\n          <div className=\"h-full flex flex-col items-center justify-center p-12 text-center bg-slate-50/50 dark:bg-slate-900/30 rounded-[3rem] border border-dashed border-slate-200 dark:border-slate-800\">\n              <SearchX size={32} className=\"text-slate-300 dark:text-slate-600 mb-4\" />\n              <h3 className=\"text-lg font-bold text-slate-800 dark:text-slate-100 mb-2\">未找到匹配结果</h3>\n              <p className=\"text-sm text-slate-500\">尝试调整过滤条件或搜索关键词。</p>\n          </div>\n      );\n  }\n\n  return (\n    <div className=\"h-full flex flex-col relative overflow-hidden\">\n      <div className=\"flex-1 overflow-auto custom-scrollbar\">\n        <table className=\"w-full text-left border-separate border-spacing-0\">\n          <thead className=\"sticky top-0 z-30 bg-white/95 dark:bg-slate-950/95 backdrop-blur-xl\">\n            <tr>\n              <th className={`${compactMode ? 'px-3 py-2 w-10' : 'px-4 py-4 w-12'} border-b border-slate-100 dark:border-slate-800`}>\n                <button onClick={toggleAllSelection} className=\"text-slate-400 hover:text-primary-600 transition-colors\">\n                    {selectedIds.size > 0 && selectedIds.size === paginatedData.length \n                        ? <CheckSquare size={compactMode ? 14 : 18} className=\"text-primary-600\" /> \n                        : <Square size={compactMode ? 14 : 18} />}\n                </button>\n              </th>\n              {visibleColumns.map((col) => {\n                const isSorted = sortConfig?.key === col.key;\n                return (\n                  <th key={col.key} \n                      className={`${compactMode ? 'px-3 py-2 text-[9px]' : 'px-4 py-4 text-[10px]'} font-black uppercase tracking-[0.15em] border-b border-slate-100 dark:border-slate-800 cursor-pointer transition-all hover:text-primary-600 group/head ${isSorted ? 'text-primary-600 dark:text-primary-400 bg-primary-50/20 dark:bg-primary-900/10' : 'text-slate-400'}`} \n                      onClick={() => setSortConfig({ key: col.key, direction: isSorted && sortConfig.direction === 'asc' ? 'desc' : 'asc' })}>\n                    <div className=\"flex items-center gap-1.5\">\n                      {tProp(col.label)}\n                      <span className={`transition-all duration-300 ${isSorted ? 'opacity-100 translate-y-0' : 'opacity-0 translate-y-1 group-hover/head:opacity-40 group-hover/head:translate-y-0'}`}>\n                          {isSorted && sortConfig.direction === 'desc' ? <ArrowDown size={compactMode ? 10 : 12} /> : <ArrowUp size={compactMode ? 10 : 12} />}\n                      </span>\n                    </div>\n                  </th>\n                );\n              })}\n              <th className={`${compactMode ? 'px-3 py-2' : 'px-4 py-4'} border-b border-slate-100 dark:border-slate-800 text-right w-24 font-black text-[10px] text-slate-400 uppercase tracking-widest`}>操作</th>\n            </tr>\n          </thead>\n          <tbody className=\"divide-y divide-slate-50 dark:divide-slate-900\">\n            {paginatedData.map((p) => (\n                <tr key={p.id} \n                    className={`group transition-all duration-200 cursor-pointer ${selectedIds.has(p.id) ? 'bg-primary-50/40 dark:bg-primary-950/20' : 'hover:bg-slate-50/50 dark:hover:bg-slate-900/40'}`} \n                    onClick={() => toggleSelection(p.id)}>\n                    <td className={`${compactMode ? this.state = { hasError: false }; }\n  static getDerivedStateFromError() { return { hasError: true }; }\n  componentDidCatch(error: any, errorInfo: any) { console.error(\"ErrorBoundary caught:\", error, errorInfo); }\n  render() {\n    if (this.state.hasError) return this.props.fallback || <div className=\"p-8 text-center text-slate-400\">Component Error</div>;\n    return this.props.children;\n  }\n}\n\n// --- Toast Component ---\ninterface Toast { id: string; type: 'success' | 'error' | 'info'; message: string; }\nconst ToastContainer: React.FC<{ toasts: Toast[], removeToast: (id: string) => void }> = ({ toasts, removeToast }) => (\n    <div className=\"fixed bottom-6 left-1/2 -translate-x-1/2 z-[100] flex flex-col gap-2 pointer-events-none\">\n        {toasts.map(t => (\n            <div key={t.id} className={`pointer-events-auto flex items-center gap-3 px-4 py-3 rounded-2xl shadow-2xl animate-in slide-in-from-bottom-5 fade-in duration-300 border backdrop-blur-md ${\n                t.type === 'success' ? 'bg-emerald-950/80 text-emerald-100 border-emerald-800' :\n                t.type === 'error' ? 'bg-rose-950/80 text-rose-100 border-rose-800' :\n                'bg-slate-900/80 text-slate-100 border-slate-700'\n            }`}>\n                {t.type === 'success' && <CheckCircle2 size={18} className=\"text-emerald-400\" />}\n                {t.type === 'error' && <AlertCircle size={18} className=\"text-rose-400\" />}\n                {t.type === 'info' && <Info size={18} className=\"text-primary-400\" />}\n                <span className=\"text-sm font-medium tracking-wide\">{t.message}</span>\n                <button onClick={() => removeToast(t.id)} className=\"ml-2 hover:bg-white/10 p-1 rounded-full transition-colors\"><X size={14} /></button>\n            </div>\n        ))}\n    </div>\n);\n\n// --- Cartoon Polymer Logo ---\nconst PolymerLogo: React.FC<{ className?: string }> = ({ className }) => (\n    <svg viewBox=\"0 0 100 100\" className={className} fill=\"none\" xmlns=\"http://www.w3.org/2000/svg\">\n        <path d=\"M50 50 L20 35\" stroke=\"currentColor\" strokeWidth=\"8\" strokeLinecap=\"round\" className=\"text-slate-300 dark:text-slate-600\" />\n        <path d=\"M50 50 L80 35\" stroke=\"currentColor\" strokeWidth=\"8\" strokeLinecap=\"round\" className=\"text-slate-300 dark:text-slate-600\" />\n        <path d=\"M50 50 L50 80\" stroke=\"currentColor\" strokeWidth=\"8\" strokeLinecap=\"round\" className=\"text-slate-300 dark:text-slate-600\" />\n        <circle cx=\"50\" cy=\"50\" r=\"20\" className=\"fill-emerald-500\" />\n        <circle cx=\"42\" cy=\"42\" r=\"6\" fill=\"white\" fillOpacity=\"0.4\" />\n        <circle cx=\"20\" cy=\"35\" r=\"14\" className=\"fill-sky-500\" />\n        <circle cx=\"16\" cy=\"31\" r=\"4\" fill=\"white\" fillOpacity=\"0.4\" />\n        <circle cx=\"80\" cy=\"35\" r=\"14\" className=\"fill-indigo-500\" />\n        <circle cx=\"76\" cy=\"31\" r=\"4\" fill=\"white\" fillOpacity=\"0.4\" />\n        <circle cx=\"50\" cy=\"80\" r=\"14\" className=\"fill-amber-500\" />\n        <circle cx=\"46\" cy=\"76\" r=\"4\" fill=\"white\" fillOpacity=\"0.4\" />\n    </svg>\n);\n\nconst getDynamicColumns = (products: Product[]): ColumnConfig[] => {\n  const propertyKeys = new Set<string>();\n  products.forEach(p => Object.keys(p.properties).forEach(k => propertyKeys.add(k)));\n  const defaultVisible = ['密度', '熔体质量流动速率', '拉伸屈服应力', '弯曲模量', '悬臂梁缺口冲击强度', '热变形温度', '典型应用'];\n  const dynamicCols: ColumnConfig[] = Array.from(propertyKeys).map(key => ({\n    key, label: key, visible: defaultVisible.includes(key), isSystem: false\n  })).sort((a, b) => {\n      const aPrio = defaultVisible.includes(a.key);\n      const bPrio = defaultVisible.includes(b.key);\n      if (aPrio && !bPrio) return -1;\n      if (!aPrio && bPrio) return 1;\n      return a.label.localeCompare(b.label);\n  });\n  return [\n    { key: 'gradeName', label: '牌号', visible: true, isSystem: true },\n    { key: 'manufacturer', label: '所属分类', visible: true, isSystem: true },\n    { key: 'updatedAt', label: '更新时间', visible: false, isSystem: false },\n    ...dynamicCols\n  ];\n};\n\nconst Breadcrumbs: React.FC<{ categoryId: string | null, onReset: () => void }> = ({ categoryId, onReset }) => {\n    const { t, language } = useLanguage();\n\n    const path = useMemo(() => {\n        if (!categoryId) return [];\n        const findPath = (nodes: Category[], targetId: string, currentPath: Category[]): Category[] | null => {\n            for (const node of nodes) {\n                if (node.id === targetId) return [...currentPath, node];\n                if (node.children) {\n                    const childResult = findPath(node.children, targetId, [...currentPath, node]);\n                    if (childResult) return childResult;\n                }\n            }\n            return null;\n        };\n        return findPath(CATEGORY_TREE, categoryId, []) || [];\n    }, [categoryId]);\n\n    return (\n        <nav className=\"flex items-center text-sm text-slate-500 dark:text-slate-400 mb-6 px-1 animate-in fade-in slide-in-from-left-2\">\n            <button \n                className=\"flex items-center hover:text-primary-600 dark:hover:text-primary-400 transition-colors cursor-pointer group focus:outline-none\" \n                onClick={onReset}\n            >\n                <div className=\"p-1.5 rounded-lg group-hover:bg-primary-50 dark:group-hover:bg-primary-900/20 transition-colors\">\n                    <Home size={16} className=\"transition-transform group-hover:scale-110\" />\n                </div>\n                <span className=\"font-bold ml-1\">{t('home')}</span>\n            </button>\n            {path.map((cat) => (\n                <React.Fragment key={cat.id}>\n                    <ChevronRight size={14} className=\"mx-1 text-slate-300 dark:text-slate-600\" />\n                    <span className=\"font-bold text-slate-800 dark:text-slate-200 hover:text-primary-600 dark:hover:text-primary-400 transition-colors cursor-pointer\">\n                        {language === 'en' && cat.nameEn ? cat.nameEn : cat.name}\n                    </span>\n                </React.Fragment>\n            ))}\n        </nav>\n    );\n};\n\nconst SummaryStats: React.FC<{ data: Product[] }> = ({ data }) => {\n    const { t, tProp } = useLanguage();\n    const [isExpanded, setIsExpanded] = useState(true);\n\n    const stats = useMemo(() => {\n        if (!data || data.length === 0) return {\n            count: 0, manufacturers: 0, avgDensity: '-', avgMfr: '-', refCoverage: '0'\n        };\n\n        const manufacturers = new Set(data.map(p => p.manufacturerId || p.manufacturer)).size;\n        let densitySum = 0, densityCount = 0, mfrSum = 0, mfrCount = 0, totalPropsWithRefs = 0, totalPropsCount = 0;\n        \n        data.forEach(p => {\n            const dVal = p.properties['密度']?.value;\n            const d = dVal === undefined || dVal === null ? NaN : parseFloat(String(dVal));\n            if (!isNaN(d)) { densitySum += d; densityCount++; }\n            \n            const mVal = p.properties['熔体质量流动速率']?.value;\n            const m = mVal === undefined || mVal === null ? NaN : parseFloat(String(mVal));\n            if (!isNaN(m)) { mfrSum += m; mfrCount++; }\n            \n            const props = p.properties || {};\n            (Object.values(props) as PropertyValue[]).forEach(prop => {\n                totalPropsCount++;\n                if (prop?.referenceId) totalPropsWithRefs++;\n            });\n        });\n        \n        return {\n            count: data.length,\n            manufacturers,\n            avgDensity: densityCount ? (densitySum / densityCount).toFixed(3) : '-',\n            avgMfr: mfrCount ? (mfrSum / mfrCount).toFixed(2) : '-',\n            refCoverage: totalPropsCount > 0 ? ((totalPropsWithRefs / totalPropsCount) * 100).toFixed(1) : '0'\n        };\n    }, [data]);\n\n    const Card = ({ icon: Icon, colorClass, label, value, sub, delay }: any) => (\n        <div className={`relative overflow-hidden bg-white dark:bg-slate-850 rounded-[1.8rem] p-5 shadow-sm border border-slate-100 dark:border-slate-800 transition-all hover:border-primary-200 dark:hover:border-primary-800 hover:shadow-glow group animate-in fade-in slide-in-from-bottom-4 duration-700`} style={{ animationDelay: delay }}>\n            <div className={`absolute -top-4 -right-4 p-8 opacity-[0.03] dark:opacity-[0.05] group-hover:scale-110 group-hover:rotate-6 transition-transform duration-500`}>\n                <Icon size={100} />\n            </div>\n            <div className=\"relative z-10 flex flex-col h-full justify-between\">\n                <div className=\"flex items-center gap-3 mb-4\">\n                    <div className={`w-10 h-10 rounded-2xl flex items-center justify-center ${colorClass} bg-opacity-10 dark:bg-opacity-20`}>\n                        <Icon size={18} className={colorClass.replace('bg-', 'text-').replace('text-white', '')} />\n                    </div>\n                    <span className=\"text-[10px] font-bold text-slate-400 dark:text-slate-500 uppercase tracking-widest\">{label}</span>\n                </div>\n                <div>\n                    <div className=\"text-2xl font-black text-slate-800 dark:text-slate-100 tracking-tighter tabular-nums\">{value}</div>\n                    <div className=\"text-[10px] font-bold text-slate-400 mt-1\">{sub}</div>\n                </div>\n            </div>\n        </div>\n    );\n\n    return (\n        <div className=\"mb-8\">\n            <div className=\"flex items-center justify-between mb-4 select-none\">\n                <button \n                    onClick={() => setIsExpanded(!isExpanded)}\n                    className=\"flex items-center gap-2 group focus:outline-none\"\n                >\n                    <div className={`p-1.5 rounded-lg bg-white dark:bg-slate-800 border border-slate-200 dark:border-slate-700 text-slate-400 group-hover:text-primary-500 transition-all`}>\n                        <ChevronDown size={14} className={`transition-transform duration-300 ${isExpanded ? 'rotate-0' : '-rotate-90'}`} />\n                    </div>\n                    <span className=\"text-xs font-black text-slate-400 dark:text-slate-500 uppercase tracking-widest group-hover:text-slate-600 dark:group-hover:text-slate-300 transition-colors\">\n                        Analytics Overview\n                    </span>\n                </button>\n                \n                {!isExpanded && (\n                    <div className=\"flex items-center gap-2 animate-in fade-in slide-in-from-left-2 duration-300\">\n                        <div className=\"px-3 py-1 bg-white dark:bg-slate-800 rounded-full border border-slate-200 dark:border-slate-700 flex items-center gap-2 shadow-sm\">\n                            <Database size={12} className=\"text-primary-500\" />\n                            <span className=\"text-[10px] font-bold text-slate-600 dark:text-slate-300\">{stats.count}</span>\n                        </div>\n                    </div>\n                )}\n            </div>\n\n            <div className={`grid grid-cols-2 lg:grid-cols-4 xl:grid-cols-5 gap-4 transition-all duration-500 ease-in-out overflow-hidden ${isExpanded ? 'opacity-100 max-h-[400px]' : 'opacity-0 max-h-0'}`}>\n                <Card icon={Database} colorClass=\"bg-primary-600 text-primary-600\" label={t('total')} value={stats.count} sub={tProp('牌号')} delay=\"0ms\" />\n                <Card icon={Factory} colorClass=\"bg-indigo-600 text-indigo-600\" label={t('manufacturers')} value={stats.manufacturers} sub=\"Active Entities\" delay=\"75ms\" />\n                <Card icon={FlaskConical} colorClass=\"bg-teal-500 text-teal-500\" label={`${t('avg')} ${tProp('密度')}`} value={stats.avgDensity} sub=\"g/cm³\" delay=\"150ms\" />\n                <Card icon={TrendingUp} colorClass=\"bg-amber-500 text-amber-500\" label={`${t('avg')} MFR`} value={stats.avgMfr} sub=\"g/10min\" delay=\"225ms\" />\n                \n                <div className=\"hidden xl:flex relative overflow-hidden bg-gradient-to-br from-slate-800 to-slate-900 rounded-[1.8rem] p-5 shadow-lg border border-slate-700 group animate-in fade-in slide-in-from-bottom-4 duration-700\" style={{ animationDelay: '300ms' }}>\n                    <div className=\"absolute inset-0 bg-[url('https://grainy-gradients.vercel.app/noise.svg')] opacity-20\"></div>\n                    <div className=\"relative z-10 w-full flex flex-col justify-between\">\n                        <div className=\"flex items-center justify-between\">\n                            <div className=\"p-1.5 bg-white/10 rounded-lg text-emerald-400 border border-white/5\"><ShieldCheck size={16} /></div>\n                            <span className=\"text-[9px] font-black text-slate-400 uppercase tracking-widest\">Confidence</span>\n                        </div>\n                        <div>\n                            <div className=\"flex items-baseline gap-1\">\n                                <span className=\"text-3xl font-black text-white tracking-tighter tabular-nums\">{stats.refCoverage}<span className=\"text-lg text-slate-500\">%</span></span>\n                            </div>\n                            <div className=\"w-full h-1 bg-slate-700 rounded-full mt-3 overflow-hidden\">\n                                <div className=\"h-full bg-emerald-500 rounded-full transition-all duration-1000 group-hover:shadow-[0_0_10px_rgba(16,185,129,0.5)]\" style={{ width: `${Math.max(0, Math.min(100, Number(stats.refCoverage)))}%` }}></div>\n                            </div>\n                        </div>\n                    </div>\n                </div>\n            </div>\n        </div>\n    );\n};\n\ntype AppView = 'dashboard' | 'analytics' | 'ai';\n\nconst AppContent: React.FC = () => {\n  const [currentUser, setCurrentUser] = useState<User | null>(() => {\n    const saved = localStorage.getItem('resindb-session');\n    return saved ? JSON.parse(saved) : null;\n  });\n\n  const [toasts, setToasts] = useState<Toast[]>([]);\n  const addToast = useCallback((type: Toast['type'], message: string) => {\n      const id = Date.now().toString();\n      setToasts(prev => [...prev, { id, type, message }]);\n      setTimeout(() => setToasts(prev => prev.filter(t => t.id !== id)), 4000);\n  }, []);\n\n  const [allProducts, setAllProducts] = useState<Product[]>(MOCK_PRODUCTS);\n  const [displayedProducts, setDisplayedProducts] = useState<Product[]>(MOCK_PRODUCTS);\n  const [selectedCategoryId, setSelectedCategoryId] = useState<string | null>(null);\n  const [searchQuery, setSearchQuery] = useState('');\n  const [columns, setColumns] = useState<ColumnConfig[]>([]);\n  const [isImportOpen, setIsImportOpen] = useState(false);\n  const [isProfileOpen, setIsProfileOpen] = useState(false);\n  const [isAdminOpen, setIsAdminOpen] = useState(false);\n  const [activeView, setActiveView] = useState<AppView>('dashboard');\n  const [isNavCollapsed, setIsNavCollapsed] = useState(false);\n  \n  const [selectedProductIds, setSelectedProductIds] = useState<Set<string>>(new Set());\n  \n  const [isSearching, setIsSearching] = useState(false);\n  const [isExporting, setIsExporting] = useState(false);\n\n  // Added missing states to fix TopBarProps errors\n  const [showFilters, setShowFilters] = useState(false);\n  const [numericFilters, setNumericFilters] = useState<Record<string, { min: string; max: string }>>({});\n  \n  // Fix: Added missing compactMode state to resolve TypeScript errors and enable layout density control.\n  const [compactMode, setCompactMode] = useState(() => localStorage.getItem('resindb-compact') === 'true');\n\n  useEffect(() => { setColumns(getDynamicColumns(allProducts)); }, []);\n  useEffect(() => {\n     const newCols = getDynamicColumns(allProducts);\n     if (newCols.length !== columns.length) setColumns(newCols);\n  }, [allProducts.length]);\n\n  // Fix: Added effect to persist compactMode state to localStorage for user experience consistency.\n  useEffect(() => {\n    localStorage.setItem('resindb-compact', String(compactMode));\n  }, [compactMode]);\n\n  // Debounced Search Effect\n  useEffect(() => {\n    const timer = setTimeout(async () => {\n      setIsSearching(true);\n      try {\n        const results = await api.search(searchQuery, selectedCategoryId);\n        setDisplayedProducts(results);\n        // Do not clear selection on search, allowing operations on selection across searches if needed\n        // But for clarity, we might want to clear or keep. Keeping is more powerful.\n      } catch (err: any) {\n        console.error(\"Search failed:\", err);\n        setDisplayedProducts([]); \n        addToast('error', `Search Failed: ${err.message}`);\n      } finally {\n        setIsSearching(false);\n      }\n    }, 400); \n\n    return () => clearTimeout(timer);\n  }, [searchQuery, selectedCategoryId, addToast]);\n\n  const categoryCounts = useMemo(() => {\n    const counts: Record<string, number> = {};\n    allProducts.forEach(product => {\n        product.categoryIds.forEach(catId => {\n            counts[catId] = (counts[catId] || 0) + 1;\n        });\n    });\n    return counts;\n  }, [allProducts]);\n\n  const handleImportData = () => {\n      const newProducts: Product[] = Array.from({ length: 5 }).map((_, i) => ({\n        id: `imported-${Date.now()}-${i}`,\n        gradeName: `New-Grade-${1000 + i} (Imported)`,\n        manufacturer: 'China Petroleum (Imported)',\n        manufacturerId: 'm-cnpc-1',\n        categoryIds: ['cat_epdm_path_1'],\n        updatedAt: new Date().toISOString().split('T')[0],\n        properties: {\n          '密度': { value: 0.92 + (Math.random() * 0.05), unit: 'g/cm³' },\n          '熔体质量流动速率': { value: 1 + (Math.random() * 5), unit: 'g/10min' },\n          '应用': { value: 'Imported batch test' }\n        }\n      }));\n      setAllProducts(prev => [...newProducts, ...prev]);\n      setDisplayedProducts(prev => [...newProducts, ...prev]); // Optimistic Update for now since import is local simulation\n      addToast('success', `${newProducts.length} items imported successfully`);\n      setIsImportOpen(false);\n  };\n\n  const handleUpdateProduct = async (updatedProduct: Product) => {\n    try {\n      const result = await api.update(updatedProduct);\n      setAllProducts(prev => prev.map(p => p.id === result.id ? result : p));\n      setDisplayedProducts(prev => prev.map(p => p.id === result.id ? result : p));\n      addToast('success', 'Product updated successfully');\n      return true;\n    } catch (err: any) {\n      addToast('error', `Update Failed: ${err.message}`);\n      throw err;\n    }\n  };\n\n  const handleExport = async () => {\n    if (isExporting) return;\n    setIsExporting(true);\n    try {\n        const blob = await api.exportReport(displayedProducts, 'csv');\n        const url = window.URL.createObjectURL(blob);\n        const a = document.createElement('a');\n        a.href = url;\n        a.download = `resin_report_${new Date().toISOString().slice(0,10)}.csv`;\n        document.body.appendChild(a);\n        a.click();\n        window.URL.revokeObjectURL(url);\n        document.body.removeChild(a);\n        addToast('success', 'Report exported successfully');\n    } catch (err: any) {\n        addToast('error', `Export Failed: ${err.message}`);\n    } finally {\n        setIsExporting(false);\n    }\n  };\n\n  const handleDeleteProducts = async (ids: string[]) => {\n    try {\n        await api.delete(ids);\n        setAllProducts(prev => prev.filter(p => !ids.includes(p.id)));\n        setDisplayedProducts(prev => prev.filter(p => !ids.includes(p.id)));\n        setSelectedProductIds(new Set());\n        addToast('success', `${ids.length} products deleted`);\n    } catch (err: any) {\n        addToast('error', `Delete Failed: ${err.message}`);\n    }\n  };\n\n  const handleBatchUpdate = async (ids: string[], updates: Partial<Product>) => {\n    try {\n        await api.batchUpdate(ids, updates);\n        \n        // Optimistic UI Update after API success\n        const updater = (prev: Product[]) => prev.map(p => {\n            if (!ids.includes(p.id)) return p;\n            \n            // Extract special property updates\n            const { _propertyUpdates, ...directUpdates } = updates as any;\n            let newProperties = { ...p.properties };\n            \n            if (_propertyUpdates) {\n                Object.entries(_propertyUpdates).forEach(([key, val]) => {\n                    newProperties[key] = val as PropertyValue;\n                });\n            }\n            \n            return { \n                ...p, \n                ...directUpdates, \n                properties: newProperties, \n                updatedAt: new Date().toISOString().split('T')[0] \n            };\n        });\n\n        setAllProducts(updater);\n        setDisplayedProducts(updater);\n        addToast('success', 'Batch update completed');\n    } catch (err: any) {\n        addToast('error', `Batch Update Failed: ${err.message}`);\n    }\n  };\n\n  const handleUpdateUserProfile = (updatedInfo: any) => {\n    if (!currentUser) return;\n    const newUser = { ...currentUser, ...updatedInfo };\n    setCurrentUser(newUser);\n    localStorage.setItem('resindb-session', JSON.stringify(newUser));\n    addToast('success', 'Profile updated');\n  };\n\n  if (!currentUser) return <AuthScreen onLogin={(u) => { setCurrentUser(u); localStorage.setItem('resindb-session', JSON.stringify(u)); }} />;\n\n  return (\n    <div className=\"flex h-screen bg-[#f8fafc] dark:bg-[#020617] font-sans text-slate-900 dark:text-slate-100 overflow-hidden transition-colors duration-500\">\n      <ToastContainer toasts={toasts} removeToast={(id) => setToasts(prev => prev.filter(t => t.id !== id))} />\n      \n      {/* Floating Navigation Dock */}\n      <nav className={`fixed left-4 top-1/2 -translate-y-1/2 z-[60] flex flex-col items-center py-5 gap-6 bg-slate-900/90 dark:bg-slate-950/90 backdrop-blur-2xl border border-slate-700/50 dark:border-slate-800/50 shadow-2xl shadow-slate-900/20 rounded-[2.5rem] transition-all duration-500 ease-out ${isNavCollapsed ? 'w-0 opacity-0 overflow-hidden py-0 border-0 pointer-events-none' : 'w-20'}`}>\n         <div className=\"w-12 h-12 bg-white/10 rounded-full flex items-center justify-center shadow-glow shadow-white/5 mb-2 group cursor-pointer hover:scale-110 active:scale-95 transition-transform overflow-hidden relative\">\n            <PolymerLogo className=\"w-8 h-8\" />\n         </div>\n         \n         <div className=\"flex flex-col gap-5 w-full px-3 items-center\">\n            {[\n                { id: 'dashboard', icon: LayoutDashboard },\n                { id: 'analytics', icon: PieChart },\n                { id: 'ai', icon: Bot }\n            ].map((item) => (\n                <button \n                    key={item.id}\n                    onClick={() => setActiveView(item.id as AppView)}\n                    className={`relative w-12 h-12 rounded-2xl flex items-center justify-center transition-all duration-300 group ${activeView === item.id ? 'bg-primary-600 text-white shadow-lg shadow-primary-900/50 scale-110' : 'text-slate-400 hover:bg-slate-800 hover:text-white'}`}\n                >\n                    <item.icon size={22} />\n                    {activeView === item.id && <div className=\"absolute -right-3 top-1/2 -translate-y-1/2 w-1 h-3 bg-primary-400 rounded-l-full shadow-glow\"></div>}\n                </button>\n            ))}\n         </div>\n\n         <div className=\"mt-auto flex flex-col gap-3 w-full px-3 items-center\">\n            <button onClick={() => setIsAdminOpen(true)} className=\"w-12 h-12 rounded-2xl text-slate-500 hover:bg-slate-800 hover:text-white transition-all flex items-center justify-center hover:scale-105 active:scale-95\">\n                <ShieldCheck size={22} />\n            </button>\n         </div>\n      </nav>\n\n      {/* Main Layout Grid */}\n      <div className={`flex-1 flex flex-col h-full transition-all duration-500 p-4 gap-4 ${isNavCollapsed ? 'ml-0' : 'ml-24'}`}>\n        \n        <div className=\"shrink-0 z-[50]\">\n            <TopBar \n                user={currentUser}\n                onLogout={() => { setCurrentUser(null); localStorage.removeItem('resindb-session'); }}\n                onOpenProfile={() => setIsProfileOpen(true)}\n                onOpenAdmin={() => setIsAdminOpen(true)}\n                searchQuery={searchQuery}\n                onSearchChange={setSearchQuery}\n                isSearching={isSearching}\n                columns={columns}\n                onToggleColumn={(k) => setColumns(c => c.map(col => col.key === k ? {...col, visible: !col.visible} : col))}\n                onToggleAllColumns={() => {}}\n                onOpenImport={() => setIsImportOpen(true)}\n                onExport={handleExport}\n                isExporting={isExporting}\n                viewMode={activeView === 'analytics' ? 'chart' : 'grid'}\n                onViewModeChange={(m) => setActiveView(m === 'chart' ? 'analytics' : 'dashboard')}\n                // Fix: Added missing props for TopBar to resolve TypeScript errors and integrate layout density controls.\n                showAdvancedFilters={showFilters}\n                onToggleFilters={() => setShowFilters(!showFilters)}\n                activeFilterCount={Object.keys(numericFilters).length}\n                compactMode={compactMode}\n                onToggleCompact={() => setCompactMode(!compactMode)}\n            />\n        </div>\n\n        <div className=\"flex-1 flex min-h-0 gap-6\">\n            {/* Secondary Sidebar Panel */}\n            {(activeView === 'dashboard' || activeView === 'analytics') && (\n                <div className=\"w-72 shrink-0 flex flex-col animate-in fade-in slide-in-from-left-4 duration-500\">\n                    <div className=\"flex-1 bg-white/60 dark:bg-slate-900/60 backdrop-blur-2xl border border-white/40 dark:border-slate-800 rounded-[2.5rem]
