${className}`} style={{ height, minHeight: '300px' }}>\n              <AlertCircle className=\"text-rose-500 mb-2\" size={24} />\n              <p className=\"text-xs font-bold text-rose-600 dark:text-rose-400\">Visualization Error</p>\n              <p className=\"text-[10px] text-rose-400 mt-1 max-w-[200px] text-center\">{error}</p>\n          </div>\n      );\n  }\n\n  return (\n    <div className={`relative w-full ${className}`} style={{ height, minHeight: '300px' }}>\n        {/* Chart Container */}\n        <div \n            ref={chartRef} \n            className={`w-full h-full transition-opacity duration-500 ${loading || isChartEmpty ? 'opacity-0' : 'opacity-100'}`} \n        />\n\n        {/* Loading Overlay (Layer 2: Visual State) */}\n        {loading && (\n            <div className=\"absolute inset-0 z-10 flex flex-col items-center justify-center bg-white/80 dark:bg-slate-900/80 backdrop-blur-sm rounded-2xl transition-all duration-300\">\n                <Loader2 className=\"w-8 h-8 text-emerald-500 animate-spin mb-3\" />\n                <span className=\"text-xs font-bold text-slate-500 dark:text-slate-400 animate-pulse\">Processing Data...</span>\n            </div>\n        )}\n\n        {/* Empty State Overlay */}\n        {!loading && isChartEmpty && (\n            <div className=\"absolute inset-0 z-10 flex flex-col items-center justify-center bg-slate-50/50 dark:bg-slate-900/50 rounded-2xl border border-dashed border-slate-200 dark:border-slate-800\">\n                <div className=\"p-4 bg-white dark:bg-slate-800 rounded-full shadow-sm mb-3\">\n                    <BarChart3 className=\"text-slate-300 dark:text-slate-600\" size={24} />\n                </div>\n                <p className=\"text-sm font-bold text-slate-500 dark:text-slate-400\">No Data Available</p>\n                <p className=\"text-[10px] text-slate-400 mt-1\">Select products to visualize {type} analysis</p>\n            </div>\n        )}\n    </div>\n  );\n};"
./migrated_prompt_history/prompt_2026-01-28T02-46-15.509Z.json:              "replacement": "import React, { useState, useMemo, useRef, useEffect } from 'react';\nimport { \n  Settings, Activity, X, FileJson, Image as ImageIcon, \n  Hexagon, ScatterChart, Waves, Triangle, Info, Loader2,\n  Filter, Plus, Trash2, ChevronDown, Check, AlertTriangle,\n  Thermometer, Target\n} from 'lucide-react';\nimport * as echarts from 'echarts';\nimport { Product } from '../types';\nimport { useLanguage } from '../contexts/LanguageContext';\nimport { ScientificChart, ChartType } from './ScientificChart';\n\ninterface DataVisualizerProps {\n  data: Product[];\n  selectedProducts?: Product[];\n  initialChartType?: string;\n}\n\nexport const DataVisualizer: React.FC<DataVisualizerProps> = ({ data, selectedProducts, initialChartType }) => {\n  const { t, tProp } = useLanguage();\n  const [chartInstance, setChartInstance] = useState<echarts.ECharts | null>(null);\n  const [activeChart, setActiveChart] = useState<ChartType>('radar');\n  const [showConfig, setShowConfig] = useState(true);\n  const [isExporting, setIsExporting] = useState(false);\n\n  // Rheology specific configuration\n  const [selectedRheologyTemps, setSelectedRheologyTemps] = useState<number[]>([190, 210, 230]);\n\n  // Sync with initialChartType from props (navigation from AI)\n  useEffect(() => {\n    if (initialChartType && ['radar', 'ashby', 'mfr_density', 'gpc', 'rheology', 'ternary'].includes(initialChartType)) {\n      setActiveChart(initialChartType as ChartType);\n    }\n  }, [initialChartType]);\n\n  // Filter State\n  const [filters, setFilters] = useState<Record<string, { min: string; max: string }>>({});\n  const [isFilterDropdownOpen, setIsFilterDropdownOpen] = useState(false);\n  const filterDropdownRef = useRef<HTMLDivElement>(null);\n\n  useEffect(() => {\n      const handleClickOutside = (event: MouseEvent) => {\n          if (filterDropdownRef.current && !filterDropdownRef.current.contains(event.target as Node)) {\n              setIsFilterDropdownOpen(false);\n          }\n      };\n      document.addEventListener('mousedown', handleClickOutside);\n      return () => document.removeEventListener('mousedown', handleClickOutside);\n  }, []);\n\n  // Determine base data set\n  const baseData = useMemo(() => {\n    return (selectedProducts && selectedProducts.length > 0) ? selectedProducts : data;\n  }, [data, selectedProducts]);\n\n  // Extract available numeric properties for filtering - Memoized to prevent heavy loop on every render\n  const numericProperties = useMemo(() => {\n      if (!baseData) return [];\n      const props = new Set<string>();\n      baseData.forEach(p => {\n          Object.entries(p.properties).forEach(([key, val]) => {\n              const num = parseFloat(String(val.value));\n              if (!isNaN(num)) props.add(key);\n          });\n      });\n      return Array.from(props).sort();\n  }, [baseData]);\n\n  // Apply filters to baseData\n  const filteredData = useMemo(() => {\n      if (!baseData) return [];\n      if (Object.keys(filters).length === 0) return baseData;\n\n      return baseData.filter(p => {\n          return Object.entries(filters).every(([key, { min, max }]) => {\n              const val = p.properties[key]?.value;\n              const numVal = parseFloat(String(val));\n              \n              if (isNaN(numVal)) return false; \n\n              const minVal = min === '' ? -Infinity : parseFloat(min);\n              const maxVal = max === '' ? Infinity : parseFloat(max);\n\n              return numVal >= minVal && numVal <= maxVal;\n          });\n      });\n  }, [baseData, filters]);\n\n  // Helper: Safe Float Parser (Layer 1: Anti-Crash)\n  const safeParse = (val: any, fallback = 0): number => {\n      if (val === undefined || val === null || val === '') return fallback;\n      const num = parseFloat(String(val));\n      return isNaN(num) ? fallback : num;\n  };\n\n  const handleAddFilter = (key: string) => {\n      if (!filters[key]) {\n          setFilters(prev => ({ ...prev, [key]: { min: '', max: '' } }));\n      }\n      setIsFilterDropdownOpen(false);\n  };\n\n  const updateFilter = (key: string, field: 'min' | 'max', val: string) => {\n      // Allow only numbers and decimals\n      if (val && !/^-?\\d*\\.?\\d*$/.test(val)) return;\n      setFilters(prev => ({\n          ...prev,\n          [key]: { ...prev[key], [field]: val }\n      }));\n  };\n\n  const removeFilter = (key: string) => {\n      setFilters(prev => {\n          const next = { ...prev };\n          delete next[key];\n          return next;\n      });\n  };\n\n  // --- Data Preparation Logic (Defensive) using filteredData ---\n\n  // 1. Radar Data: Compare top 5 (or selected) products\n  const radarData = useMemo(() => {\n    if (!filteredData) return [];\n    try {\n        const source = filteredData.slice(0, 5); \n        return source.map(p => ({\n          name: p.gradeName,\n          value: [\n            safeParse(p.properties['熔体质量流动速率']?.value),\n            safeParse(p.properties['密度']?.value),\n            safeParse(p.properties['弯曲模量']?.value),\n            safeParse(p.properties['拉伸屈服应力']?.value),\n            safeParse(p.properties['悬臂梁缺口冲击强度']?.value)\n          ]\n        }));\n    } catch (e) {\n        console.error(\"Radar Prep Error:\", e);\n        return [];\n    }\n  }, [filteredData]);\n\n  // 2. Ashby Data: MFR vs Impact\n  const ashbyData = useMemo(() => {\n    if (!filteredData) return [];\n    try {\n        const groups: Record<string, any[]> = {};\n        filteredData.forEach(p => {\n          const man = p.manufacturer || 'Unknown';\n          if (!groups[man]) groups[man] = [];\n          \n          const mfr = safeParse(p.properties['熔体质量流动速率']?.value, -1);\n          const impact = safeParse(p.properties['悬臂梁缺口冲击强度']?.value, -1);\n          \n          if (mfr > 0 && impact > 0) {\n            groups[man].push([mfr, impact, p.gradeName]);\n          }\n        });\n\n        return Object.entries(groups).map(([name, points]) => ({\n          name,\n          data: points\n        }));\n    } catch(e) {\n        console.error(\"Ashby Prep Error:\", e);\n        return [];\n    }\n  }, [filteredData]);\n\n  // 3. MFR vs Density Data\n  const mfrDensityData = useMemo(() => {\n    if (!filteredData) return [];\n    try {\n        const groups: Record<string, any[]> = {};\n        filteredData.forEach(p => {\n          const man = p.manufacturer || 'Unknown';\n          if (!groups[man]) groups[man] = [];\n          \n          const mfr = safeParse(p.properties['熔体质量流动速率']?.value, -1);\n          const density = safeParse(p.properties['密度']?.value, -1);\n          \n          if (mfr > 0 && density > 0) {\n            groups[man].push([mfr, density, p.gradeName]);\n          }\n        });\n\n        return Object.entries(groups).map(([name, points]) => ({\n          name,\n          data: points\n        }));\n    } catch(e) {\n        console.error(\"MFR-Density Prep Error:\", e);\n        return [];\n    }\n  }, [filteredData]);\n\n  // 5. Ternary Data: Mock Formulation (Simulated based on properties)\n  const ternaryData = useMemo(() => {\n    if (!filteredData) return [];\n    try {\n        const source = filteredData.length > 0 ? filteredData : [];\n        return source.slice(0, 100).map((p, i) => {\n            // Simulation logic to create 3 clusters based on density/MFR\n            const mfr = safeParse(p.properties['熔体质量流动速率']?.value, 1);\n            let a, b, c;\n\n            if (mfr < 1) {\n                a = 0.6 + Math.random() * 0.3;\n                b = Math.random() * (0.9 - a);\n                c = 1 - a - b;\n            } else if (mfr > 10) {\n                b = 0.6 + Math.random() * 0.3;\n                a = Math.random() * (0.9 - b);\n                c = 1 - a - b;\n            } else {\n                c = 0.5 + Math.random() * 0.4;\n                a = Math.random() * (0.9 - c);\n                b = 1 - a - c;\n            }\n            \n            const sum = a + b + c;\n            a = a / sum;\n            b = b / sum;\n            c = c / sum;\n            \n            return {\n                a, b, c,\n                name: p.gradeName,\n                value: safeParse(p.properties['拉伸强度']?.value, 50) + (Math.random() * 10 - 5)\n            };\n        });\n    } catch(e) {\n        return [];\n    }\n  }, [filteredData]);\n\n  // Select the correct data based on chart type to pass to ScientificChart\n  const currentChartData = useMemo(() => {\n      switch(activeChart) {\n          case 'radar': return radarData;\n          case 'ashby': return ashbyData;\n          case 'mfr_density': return mfrDensityData;\n          case 'gpc': return filteredData; \n          case 'rheology': return { products: filteredData, temps: selectedRheologyTemps }; \n          case 'ternary': return ternaryData;\n          default: return [];\n      }\n  }, [activeChart, radarData, ashbyData, mfrDensityData, filteredData, ternaryData, selectedRheologyTemps]);\n\n  const handleExport = async (format: 'png' | 'json') => {\n      setIsExporting(true);\n      if (format === 'png' && chartInstance) {\n          try {\n            const dataUrl = chartInstance.getDataURL({\n                type: 'png',\n                pixelRatio: 2,\n                backgroundColor: '#fff'\n            });\n            const a = document.createElement('a');\n            a.href = dataUrl;\n            a.download = `resindb_${activeChart}_analysis.png`;\n            a.click();\n          } catch(e) { console.error(e); }\n      } else if (format === 'json') {\n          const jsonStr = JSON.stringify(currentChartData, null, 2);\n          const blob = new Blob([jsonStr], {type: 'application/json'});\n          const url = URL.createObjectURL(blob);\n          const a = document.createElement('a');\n          a.href = url;\n          a.download = `resindb_${activeChart}_data.json`;\n          a.click();\n      }\n      setIsExporting(false);\n  };\n\n  const chartDescriptions = {\n      radar: t('desc_radar'),\n      ashby: t('desc_ashby'),\n      mfr_density: t('desc_mfr_density'),\n      gpc: t('desc_gpc'),\n      rheology: t('desc_rheology'),\n      ternary: t('desc_ternary')\n  };\n\n  const toggleRheologyTemp = (temp: number) => {\n    setSelectedRheologyTemps(prev => \n      prev.includes(temp) \n        ? prev.filter(t => t !== temp) \n        : [...prev, temp].sort()\n    );\n  };\n\n  // Check if we have valid data for the current view to show improved empty state\n  const hasValidData = filteredData.length > 0 && currentChartData && (Array.isArray(currentChartData) ? currentChartData.length > 0 : true);\n\n  return (\n    <div className=\"flex flex-col md:flex-row h-full gap-4 overflow-hidden\">\n      {/* Scientific Controls Sidebar */}\n      <div className={`flex flex-col bg-white dark:bg-slate-900 border border-slate-200 dark:border-slate-800 rounded-3xl transition-all duration-500 ease-out shrink-0 overflow-hidden shadow-xl ${showConfig ? ./migrated_prompt_history/prompt_2026-01-28T02-46-15.509Z.json:              "replacement": "import * as echarts from 'echarts';\n\n// Chart 4: Rheology Viscosity Curve Option Configuration\n// Fix: Updated signature to accept optional 'temps' array to match usage in ScientificChart\nexport const getRheologyChartOption = (products: any[], theme: 'light' | 'dark', temps: number[] = [190, 210, 230]): echarts.EChartsOption => {\n  const isDark = theme === 'dark';\n  const colorPalette = ['#0284c7', '#06b6d4', '#14b8a6', '#6366f1', '#f59e0b'];\n  const gridColor = isDark ? '#334155' : '#e0e0e0';\n  const axisColor = isDark ? '#94a3b8' : '#333333';\n\n  // Cross Model Simulation based on MFR\n  const generateData = (mfr: number, tempOffset: number) => {\n    const data = [];\n    // Base Zero Shear Viscosity modified by Temp\n    const eta0 = (30000 * Math.pow(mfr, -0.8)) * Math.exp(tempOffset * -0.02);\n    const n = 0.45; // Shear thinning index\n\n    for (let i = 0; i <= 4; i += 0.2) { // 10^0 to 10^4\n      const rate = Math.pow(10, i);\n      const viscosity = eta0 / (1 + Math.pow(rate * 0.05, 1 - n));\n      data.push([rate, viscosity]);\n    }\n    return data;\n  };\n\n  const series = products.flatMap((p: any, idx: number) => {\n      const mfr = parseFloat(p.properties['熔体质量流动速率']?.value || 5);\n      const safeMfr = isNaN(mfr) ? 5 : mfr;\n      const baseColor = colorPalette[idx % colorPalette.length];\n\n      // Fix: Use provided temps. If multiple products, typically only the first temperature is shown to maintain chart clarity\n      const tempsToUse = products.length === 1 ? temps : [temps[0] || 190];\n\n      return tempsToUse.map((temp, tIdx) => ({\n          name: `${p.gradeName} @ ${temp}°C`,\n          type: 'line',\n          smooth: true,\n          showSymbol: false,\n          data: generateData(safeMfr, temp - 190),\n          lineStyle: { \n            width: tIdx === 0 ? 3 : 2, \n            type: tIdx === 0 ? 'solid' : (tIdx === 1 ? 'dashed' : 'dotted'), \n            color: baseColor, \n            opacity: tIdx === 0 ? 1 : (tIdx === 1 ? 0.7 : 0.5) \n          }\n      }));\n  });\n\n  return {\n    backgroundColor: 'transparent',\n    color: colorPalette,\n    title: {\n      text: '流变行为曲线 (Rheology Curve)',\n      subtext: 'Double Log Plot: Shear Rate vs Viscosity',\n      left: 'center',\n      textStyle: { color: isDark ? a.click();\n        window.URL.revokeObjectURL(url);\n        document.body.removeChild(a);\n        addToast('success', 'Report exported successfully');\n    } catch (err: any) {\n        addToast('error', `Export Failed: ${err.message}`);\n    } finally {\n        setIsExporting(false);\n    }\n  };\n\n  const handleDeleteProducts = async (ids: string[]) => {\n    try {\n        await api.delete(ids);\n        setAllProducts(prev => prev.filter(p => !ids.includes(p.id)));\n        setDisplayedProducts(prev => prev.filter(p => !ids.includes(p.id)));\n };\n\n  const handleBatchUpdate = async (ids: string[], updates: Partial<Product>) => {\n    try {\n        await api.batchUpdate(ids, updates);\n        \n        const updater = (prev: Product[]) => ...p.properties };\n            \n            if (_propertyUpdates) {\n                Object.entries(_propertyUpdates).forEach(([key, val]) => {\n                    newProperties[key] = val as './charts/RheologyCurve';\nimport { getTernaryChartOption } from './charts/TernaryBlend';\nimport { getMfrDensityChartOption } from './charts/MfrDensityScatter';\n\nexport type ChartType = 'radar' | 'ashby' | 'gpc' | 'rheology' | 'ternary' | 'mfr_density';\n\ninterface ScientificChartProps {\n  type: ChartType;\n  data: any;\n  loading?: boolean;\n  className?: string;\n  height?: string | 0;\n    if (Array.isArray(data) && data.length === 0) return false;\n    if ((type === 'ashby' || type === 'mfr_density') && Array.isArray(data) && data.every(s => !s.data || s.data.length === 0)) break;\n            case 'gpc': option = getGpcChartOption(data, theme); break;\n            case 'rheology': option = getRheologyChartOption(data.products, theme, data.temps); break;\n            case 'ternary': option = getTernaryChartOption(data, theme); break;\n            default: throw new Error(`Unknown chart type: ${type}`);\n        }\n\n        if (option.grid) { Z-Index for Tooltip to stay above UI overlays\n        option.tooltip.extraCssText = 'z-index: 99999 !important; box-shadow: 0 10px 30px rgba(0,0,0,0.2); border-radius: 12px; pointer-events: none;';\n\n        ['xAxis', 'yAxis'].forEach(axis => {\n            if (option[axis] && option[axis].type === 'log') {\n               option[axis].logBase = 10;\n               if (!option[axis].min) option[axis].min = (v: any) => v.min > 0 ? v.min * 0.9 : 0.01; \n            }\n        });\n        return option;\n    } catch (err: any) {\n        throw new Error(err.message || \"Failed to generate visualization\");\n    }\n  }, [type, data, theme]);\n\n  useEffect(() => {\n    if (!chartRef.current) return;\n    if (!validateData()) {\n        setIsChartEmpty(true);\n        if (chartInstance.current) chartInstance.current.clear();\n        return;\n    }\n    setIsChartEmpty(false);\n    setError(null);\n    if (!chartInstance.current) {\n  <div className={`flex flex-col items-center justify-center bg-rose-50/50 dark:bg-rose-900/10 border border-rose-100 dark:border-rose-900/30 rounded-2xl ${className}`} style={{ height, minHeight: Please use an image under 2MB.\");\n        return;\n      }\n      const reader = new FileReader();\n      reader.onloadend = () => {\n        setAvatar(reader.result as string);\n      };\n      reader.readAsDataURL(file);\n    }\n  };\n\n  const resetToDefault = () => {\n    setAvatar(`https://api.dicebear.com/7.x/avataaars/svg?seed=${name}`);\n  };\n\n  const handleSubmit = (e: React.FormEvent) => {\n    e.preventDefault();\n    setIsSaving(true);\n\n    setTimeout(() => {\n      const updatedData: any = {\n        name,\n        email,\n        avatar\n      };\n      if (password) updatedData.password = password;\n\n      onSave(updatedData);\n      setIsSaving(false);\n      setShowSuccess(true);\n      \n      setTimeout(() => {\n        onClose();\n      }, 1500);\n    }, 1000);\n  };\n\n  return (\n    <div className=\"fixed inset-0 z-[100] flex items-center justify-center bg-black/60 backdrop-blur-sm p-4 animate-in fade-in duration-300\">\n      <div className=\"w-full max-w-lg bg-white dark:bg-slate-900 border border-slate-200 dark:border-slate-800 rounded-3xl shadow-2xl overflow-hidden animate-in zoom-in-95 duration-300\">\n        <div className=\"px-6 py-5 border-b border-slate-100 dark:border-slate-800 flex items-center justify-between bg-slate-50/50 dark:bg-slate-950/50\">\n          <div className=\"flex items-center gap-3\">\n             <div className=\"p-2 bg-emerald-100 dark:bg-emerald-900/30 text-emerald-600 dark:text-emerald-400 rounded-xl\">\n                <User size={20} />\n             </div>\n             <h3 className=\"text-lg font-bold text-slate-900 dark:text-white\">{t('editProfile')}</h3>\n          </div>\n          <button onClick={onClose} className=\"text-slate-400 hover:text-slate-600 dark:hover:text-slate-200\">\n            <X size={20} />\n          </button>\n        </div>\n\n        {showSuccess ? this.state = { hasError: false }; }\n  static getDerivedStateFromError() { return { hasError: true }; }\n  componentDidCatch(error: any, errorInfo: any) { console.error(\"ErrorBoundary caught:\", error, errorInfo); }\n  render() {\n    if (this.state.hasError) return this.props.fallback || <div className=\"p-8 text-center text-slate-400\">Component Error</div>;\n    return this.props.children;\n  }\n}\n\n// --- Toast Component ---\ninterface Toast { id: string;
